`source/apps/CS2RankSpooferConsole/main.cpp`:

```cpp
// CS2 Rank Spoofer console v1.14 — interactive TUI (v2 protocol).
// Rewrite of Phase-1 status-monitor. Requires driver v2 (protocol=2).
//
// Layout:
//   [ 1] .. [ 60]   preamble, includes, version, globals, glyphs
//   [ 61] .. [180]  VT100/console helpers, small utils
//   [181] .. [280]  snapshot struct + torn-read reader
//   [281] .. [360]  SHM writers (Interlocked for bool/mask, plain for int)
//   [361] .. [500]  main-screen renderer (header, sections, keybar)
//   [501] .. [640]  block editor (field navigator, digit-buffer, +/-, PgUp/PgDn)
//   [641] .. [720]  freeze-mask editor + preset picker
//   [721] .. [860]  12 hardcoded presets + preset table
//   [861] .. [980]  JSON save/load (hand-rolled, minimal)
//   [981] .. [end]  command-line flags, sanity_check, main()

#define WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN
#define NOMINMAX
#include <windows.h>
#include <conio.h>
#include <cstdio>
#include <cstdarg>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdlib>
#include <cstddef>

#include "shared.h"

#define CONSOLE_VERSION_STR "v1.14"

// ===========================================================================
// Globals
// ===========================================================================
static HANDLE            g_shmHandle    = nullptr;
static RANKSPOOF_STATE*  g_state        = nullptr;
static HANDLE            g_stopEvent    = nullptr;
static HANDLE            g_doneEvent    = nullptr;
static HANDLE            g_hOut         = INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE;
static HANDLE            g_hIn          = INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE;
static DWORD             g_savedOutMode = 0;
static DWORD             g_savedInMode  = 0;
static UINT              g_savedOutCP   = 0;
static bool              g_utf8Ok       = false;
static int               g_refreshHz    = 4;
static char              g_configPath[MAX_PATH] = {};
static char              g_statusLine[256] = {};
static ULONGLONG         g_statusExpire = 0;
static volatile LONG     g_quitRequested = 0;
static char              g_exitMessage[512] = {};   // printed AFTER RestoreConsole

// ---- ASCII / UTF-8 glyphs (chosen at startup based on SetConsoleOutputCP) --
struct Glyphs {
    const char* check;
    const char* dot;
    const char* warn;
    const char* arrow;
    const char* h;      // horizontal
    const char* v;      // vertical
    const char* tl;
    const char* tr;
    const char* bl;
    const char* br;
    const char* tsplit; // top-tee
    const char* bsplit;
    const char* lsplit;
    const char* rsplit;
};
static Glyphs g_g{
    "X", ".", "!", "->",
    "-", "|", "+", "+", "+", "+", "+", "+", "+", "+"
};
static const Glyphs kGlyphsUtf8 = {
    "\xE2\x9C\x94",       // ✔
    "\xC2\xB7",           // ·
    "\xE2\x9A\xA0",       // ⚠
    "\xE2\x86\x92",       // →
    "\xE2\x94\x80",       // ─
    "\xE2\x94\x82",       // │
    "\xE2\x94\x8C",       // ┌
    "\xE2\x94\x90",       // ┐
    "\xE2\x94\x94",       // └
    "\xE2\x94\x98",       // ┘
    "\xE2\x94\xAC",       // ┬
    "\xE2\x94\xB4",       // ┴
    "\xE2\x94\x9C",       // ├
    "\xE2\x94\xA4",       // ┤
};

// ---- ANSI SGR helpers (only emit escape sequences on our stdout) -----------
static const char* kReset   = "\x1b[0m";
static const char* kBold    = "\x1b[1m";
static const char* kDim     = "\x1b[2m";
static const char* kFgRed   = "\x1b[31m";
static const char* kFgGreen = "\x1b[32m";
static const char* kFgYell  = "\x1b[33m";
static const char* kFgBlue  = "\x1b[34m";
static const char* kFgMage  = "\x1b[35m";
static const char* kFgCyan  = "\x1b[36m";
static const char* kFgWhite = "\x1b[37m";
static const char* kFgGray  = "\x1b[90m";
static const char* kFgBrCyn = "\x1b[96m";
static const char* kFgBrYel = "\x1b[93m";
static const char* kBgBlue  = "\x1b[44m";
static const char* kInv     = "\x1b[7m";

// ===========================================================================
// Console setup / teardown
// ===========================================================================
static void SetStatus(const char* fmt, ...) {
    va_list ap; va_start(ap, fmt);
    _vsnprintf_s(g_statusLine, sizeof(g_statusLine), _TRUNCATE, fmt, ap);
    va_end(ap);
    g_statusExpire = GetTickCount64() + 3000;
}

static void FormatWinErr(DWORD code, char* buf, size_t cap) {
    DWORD n = FormatMessageA(
        FORMAT_MESSAGE_FROM_SYSTEM | FORMAT_MESSAGE_IGNORE_INSERTS,
        NULL, code, MAKELANGID(LANG_NEUTRAL, SUBLANG_DEFAULT),
        buf, (DWORD)cap, NULL);
    if (n == 0) { _snprintf_s(buf, cap, _TRUNCATE, "(no system text for %lu)", code); return; }
    while (n && (buf[n-1] == '\r' || buf[n-1] == '\n' || buf[n-1] == ' ')) buf[--n] = 0;
}

static bool EnableVT100() {
    g_hOut = GetStdHandle(STD_OUTPUT_HANDLE);
    g_hIn  = GetStdHandle(STD_INPUT_HANDLE);
    if (g_hOut == INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE || g_hOut == nullptr) return false;

    if (GetConsoleMode(g_hOut, &g_savedOutMode)) {
        DWORD m = g_savedOutMode | ENABLE_VIRTUAL_TERMINAL_PROCESSING | DISABLE_NEWLINE_AUTO_RETURN;
        SetConsoleMode(g_hOut, m);
    }
    if (g_hIn != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE && GetConsoleMode(g_hIn, &g_savedInMode)) {
        // Leave line-buffered mode ON; _kbhit/_getch works either way.
    }

    g_savedOutCP = GetConsoleOutputCP();
    if (SetConsoleOutputCP(CP_UTF8)) {
        g_utf8Ok = true;
        g_g = kGlyphsUtf8;
    }
    return true;
}

static void RestoreConsole() {
    if (g_hOut != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE) {
        // show cursor, reset SGR, clear screen so a follow-up prompt is clean
        printf("\x1b[?25h" "\x1b[0m" "\x1b[2J" "\x1b[H");
        fflush(stdout);
        if (g_savedOutMode) SetConsoleMode(g_hOut, g_savedOutMode);
    }
    if (g_savedOutCP) SetConsoleOutputCP(g_savedOutCP);
}

static BOOL WINAPI CtrlHandler(DWORD ctrl) {
    if (ctrl == CTRL_C_EVENT || ctrl == CTRL_BREAK_EVENT ||
        ctrl == CTRL_CLOSE_EVENT || ctrl == CTRL_LOGOFF_EVENT || ctrl == CTRL_SHUTDOWN_EVENT) {
        InterlockedExchange(&g_quitRequested, 1);
        return TRUE;
    }
    return FALSE;
}

// ===========================================================================
// Snapshot (torn-read protected)
// ===========================================================================
struct Snap {
    bool               valid;
    unsigned int       tick;
    unsigned int       cs2_pid;
    unsigned long long client_base;
    unsigned long long callsite_va;
    unsigned long long callsite_rva;
    unsigned long long original_fn_va;
    unsigned long long controller_va;
    unsigned long long inventory_va;
    unsigned long long gamerules_va;
    unsigned int       hook_status;
    unsigned int       protocol_version;
    unsigned int       write_error_count;
    unsigned long long write_count;

    RANKSPOOF_MODE        premier;
    RANKSPOOF_MODE        wingman;
    RANKSPOOF_MODE        competitive;
    RANKSPOOF_PROFILE     profile;
    RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING matchmaking;
    RANKSPOOF_SCHEMA      schema;
    unsigned int          freeze_mask;
    unsigned int          write_generation;
    unsigned int          driver_write_generation;
};

static bool ReadSnap(Snap& s) {
    memset(&s, 0, sizeof(s));
    if (!g_state) return false;
    for (int attempt = 0; attempt < 8; ++attempt) {
        unsigned m1 = g_state->magic;
        if (m1 != RANKSPOOF_MAGIC) { Sleep(1); continue; }
        _ReadWriteBarrier();
        s.tick                    = g_state->driver_tick;
        s.cs2_pid                 = g_state->cs2_pid;
        s.client_base             = g_state->client_base;
        s.callsite_va             = g_state->callsite_va;
        s.callsite_rva            = g_state->callsite_rva;
        s.original_fn_va          = g_state->original_fn_va;
        s.controller_va           = g_state->controller_va;
        s.inventory_va            = g_state->inventory_va;
        s.gamerules_va            = g_state->gamerules_va;
        s.hook_status             = g_state->hook_status;
        s.protocol_version        = g_state->protocol_version;
        s.write_error_count       = g_state->write_error_count;
        s.write_count             = g_state->write_count;
        s.premier                 = g_state->premier;
        s.wingman                 = g_state->wingman;
        s.competitive             = g_state->competitive;
        s.profile                 = g_state->profile;
        s.matchmaking             = g_state->matchmaking;
        s.schema                  = g_state->schema;
        s.freeze_mask             = g_state->freeze_mask;
        s.write_generation        = g_state->write_generation;
        s.driver_write_generation = g_state->driver_write_generation;
        _ReadWriteBarrier();
        unsigned m2 = g_state->magic;
        if (m1 == m2 && m2 == RANKSPOOF_MAGIC) { s.valid = true; return true; }
    }
    return false;
}

static const char* HookStatusName(unsigned int s) {
    switch (s) {
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_IDLE:          return "IDLE";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_SCANNING:      return "SCANNING";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_INSTALLED:     return "INSTALLED";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_REMOVED:       return "REMOVED";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_PATTERN_FOUND: return "PATTERN_FOUND";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_WRITING:       return "WRITING";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_NO_CS2:    return "ERR_NO_CS2";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_NO_CLIENT: return "ERR_NO_CLIENT";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_PATTERN:   return "ERR_PATTERN";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_ALLOC:     return "ERR_ALLOC";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_WRITE:     return "ERR_WRITE";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_PROTECT:   return "ERR_PROTECT";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_LPC:       return "ERR_LPC";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_INV:       return "ERR_INV";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_OFFSETS:   return "ERR_OFFSETS";
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_INTERNAL:  return "ERR_INTERNAL";
    default:                           return "ERR_UNKNOWN";
    }
}

static const char* HookStatusColor(unsigned int s) {
    switch (s) {
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_INSTALLED:
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_WRITING:       return kFgGreen;
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_SCANNING:
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_PATTERN_FOUND:
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_IDLE:
    case RANKSPOOF_HOOK_REMOVED:       return kFgYell;
    default:                           return kFgRed;
    }
}

// ===========================================================================
// SHM writers
// ===========================================================================
static void BumpGeneration() {
    if (!g_state) return;
    InterlockedIncrement((volatile LONG*)&g_state->write_generation);
}

static void WriteBool(unsigned int* addr, int v) {
    if (!addr) return;
    InterlockedExchange((volatile LONG*)addr, v ? 1 : 0);
    BumpGeneration();
}

static void WriteInt(int* addr, int v) {
    if (!addr) return;
    *addr = v;
    _ReadWriteBarrier();
    BumpGeneration();
}

static void WriteMask(unsigned int* addr, unsigned int v) {
    if (!addr) return;
    InterlockedExchange((volatile LONG*)addr, (LONG)v);
    BumpGeneration();
}

static void WriteString16(char* addr, const char* v) {
    if (!addr) return;
    char buf[16] = {};
    if (v) strncpy_s(buf, sizeof(buf), v, _TRUNCATE);
    memcpy(addr, buf, sizeof(buf));
    _ReadWriteBarrier();
    BumpGeneration();
}

// Apply an entire mode block in one shot (used by presets / config load).
static void ApplyMode(RANKSPOOF_MODE* dst, const RANKSPOOF_MODE& src) {
    if (!dst) return;
    InterlockedExchange((volatile LONG*)&dst->enabled, (LONG)src.enabled);
    dst->rank              = src.rank;
    dst->wins              = src.wins;
    dst->losses            = src.losses;
    dst->draws             = src.draws;
    dst->rank_type_id      = src.rank_type_id;
    dst->cs_rating_premier = src.cs_rating_premier;
    _ReadWriteBarrier();
}
static void ApplyProfile(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE* dst, const RANKSPOOF_PROFILE& src) {
    if (!dst) return;
    InterlockedExchange((volatile LONG*)&dst->enabled, (LONG)src.enabled);
    dst->private_rank_level      = src.private_rank_level;
    dst->private_rank_xp         = src.private_rank_xp;
    dst->commends_leader         = src.commends_leader;
    dst->commends_teacher        = src.commends_teacher;
    dst->commends_friendly       = src.commends_friendly;
    dst->music_kit_id            = src.music_kit_id;
    dst->music_kit_mvps          = src.music_kit_mvps;
    dst->controller_mvps         = src.controller_mvps;
    dst->controller_score        = src.controller_score;
    dst->service_medal_year      = src.service_medal_year;
    dst->service_medal_level     = src.service_medal_level;
    dst->coin_id                 = src.coin_id;
    memcpy(dst->clan_tag, src.clan_tag, sizeof(dst->clan_tag));
    _ReadWriteBarrier();
}
static void ApplyMatchmaking(RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING* dst, const RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING& src) {
    if (!dst) return;
    InterlockedExchange((volatile LONG*)&dst->enabled, (LONG)src.enabled);
    dst->queued_matchmaking_mode = src.queued_matchmaking_mode;
    _ReadWriteBarrier();
}

// ===========================================================================
// Main screen renderer
// ===========================================================================
static void ClearHome() { fputs("\x1b[2J\x1b[H", stdout); }

// Render a chevron `[X val]` where val is either the check or dot glyph.
static void RenderFreezeBadge(char* out, size_t cap, char letter, bool set) {
    if (set) {
        _snprintf_s(out, cap, _TRUNCATE, "%s[%c %s]%s",
                    kFgCyan, letter, g_g.check, kReset);
    } else {
        _snprintf_s(out, cap, _TRUNCATE, "%s[%c %s]%s",
                    kFgGray, letter, g_g.dot, kReset);
    }
}

static void RenderMainScreen(const Snap& s, int refreshHz) {
    ClearHome();

    const char* driverText   = s.valid ? "RUNNING" : "STALE";
    const char* driverColor  = s.valid ? kFgGreen : kFgRed;
    const char* statusName   = HookStatusName(s.hook_status);
    const char* statusColor  = HookStatusColor(s.hook_status);

    // ---- Header banner -----------------------------------------------------
    printf("%s%s CS2 Rank Spoofer %s %s\n",
           kBold, kFgBrCyn, CONSOLE_VERSION_STR, kReset);
    printf("%s%s%s\n", kFgGray,
           "===============================================================================",
           kReset);

    // ---- Driver line -------------------------------------------------------
    printf(" Driver: %s%-8s%s  tick=%-8u  cs2.pid=%-6u  client.dll=%s0x%016llX%s\n",
           driverColor, driverText, kReset,
           s.tick, s.cs2_pid,
           kFgYell, (unsigned long long)s.client_base, kReset);

    // ---- Hook line ---------------------------------------------------------
    const char* syncMark = (s.write_generation == s.driver_write_generation) ? "in sync" : "pending";
    const char* syncColor = (s.write_generation == s.driver_write_generation) ? kFgGreen : kFgYell;
    printf(" Hook:   %s[%-14s]%s writes=%-8llu errors=%-4u gen=%u %s %u (%s%s%s)\n",
           statusColor, statusName, kReset,
           (unsigned long long)s.write_count, s.write_error_count,
           s.write_generation, g_g.arrow, s.driver_write_generation,
           syncColor, syncMark, kReset);

    // ---- Object addresses --------------------------------------------------
    printf(" LPC:    %s0x%016llX%s   Inv: %s0x%016llX%s   GR: %s0x%016llX%s\n",
           kFgYell, (unsigned long long)s.controller_va, kReset,
           kFgYell, (unsigned long long)s.inventory_va,  kReset,
           kFgYell, (unsigned long long)s.gamerules_va,  kReset);

    // ---- Schema line -------------------------------------------------------
    if (s.schema.source_is_registry) {
        printf(" Schema: %sregistry %s%s (cs2-dumper HEAD offsets loaded from HKLM)\n",
               kFgGreen, g_g.check, kReset);
    } else {
        printf(" Schema: %shardcoded %s%s (registry offsets missing — using fallback)\n",
               kFgYell, g_g.warn, kReset);
    }

    // ---- Freeze mask banner ------------------------------------------------
    char bP[64], bW[64], bC[64], bO[64], bM[64];
    RenderFreezeBadge(bP, sizeof(bP), 'P', (s.freeze_mask & RANKSPOOF_FRZ_PREMIER)     != 0);
    RenderFreezeBadge(bW, sizeof(bW), 'W', (s.freeze_mask & RANKSPOOF_FRZ_WINGMAN)     != 0);
    RenderFreezeBadge(bC, sizeof(bC), 'C', (s.freeze_mask & RANKSPOOF_FRZ_COMPETITIVE) != 0);
    RenderFreezeBadge(bO, sizeof(bO), 'O', (s.freeze_mask & RANKSPOOF_FRZ_PROFILE)     != 0);
    RenderFreezeBadge(bM, sizeof(bM), 'M', (s.freeze_mask & RANKSPOOF_FRZ_MATCHMAKING) != 0);
    printf("%s---%s Freeze mask %s---%s  %s %s %s %s %s\n",
           kFgGray, kReset, kFgGray, kReset,
           bP, bW, bC, bO, bM);

    // ---- Per-block summaries ----------------------------------------------
    auto printMode = [&](const char* name, const RANKSPOOF_MODE& m) {
        char en[8]; _snprintf_s(en, sizeof(en), _TRUNCATE, "[%s]",
                                m.enabled ? "X" : " ");
        const char* enColor = m.enabled ? kFgGreen : kFgGray;
        printf("%s--- %-13s ---%s %s%s%s  rank=%-5d wins=%-5d losses=%-4d draws=%-3d type=%-2d cs_rat=%d\n",
               kFgGray, name, kReset, enColor, en, kReset,
               m.rank, m.wins, m.losses, m.draws, m.rank_type_id, m.cs_rating_premier);
    };
    printMode("Premier",     s.premier);
    printMode("Wingman",     s.wingman);
    printMode("Competitive", s.competitive);

    {
        const RANKSPOOF_PROFILE& p = s.profile;
        char en[8]; _snprintf_s(en, sizeof(en), _TRUNCATE, "[%s]",
                                p.enabled ? "X" : " ");
        const char* enColor = p.enabled ? kFgGreen : kFgGray;
        char clanCopy[17] = {}; memcpy(clanCopy, p.clan_tag, 16);
        printf("%s--- %-13s ---%s %s%s%s  level=%-3d xp=%-8d MVPs=%-4d Score=%-5d MK=%-3d clan=\"%s\"\n",
               kFgGray, "Profile", kReset, enColor, en, kReset,
               p.private_rank_level, p.private_rank_xp,
               p.controller_mvps, p.controller_score, p.music_kit_id, clanCopy);
    }
    {
        const RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING& m = s.matchmaking;
        char en[8]; _snprintf_s(en, sizeof(en), _TRUNCATE, "[%s]",
                                m.enabled ? "X" : " ");
        const char* enColor = m.enabled ? kFgGreen : kFgGray;
        printf("%s--- %-13s ---%s %s%s%s  queued_mode=%d\n",
               kFgGray, "Matchmaking", kReset, enColor, en, kReset,
               m.queued_matchmaking_mode);
    }

    // ---- Key bar -----------------------------------------------------------
    printf("%s%s%s\n", kFgGray,
           "-------------------------------------------------------------------------------",
           kReset);
    printf(" %s[P]%s premier  %s[W]%s wingman  %s[C]%s competitive  %s[O]%s profile  %s[M]%s mm  %s[S]%s presets\n",
           kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset);
    printf(" %s[F]%s freeze mask  %s[R]%s refresh (%dHz)  %s[J]%s save cfg  %s[L]%s load cfg  %s[B]%s bump gen\n",
           kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset, refreshHz, kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset);
    printf(" %s[U]%s unload driver   %s[Q]%s quit\n",
           kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset);

    // ---- Status message (transient) ---------------------------------------
    if (g_statusLine[0] && GetTickCount64() < g_statusExpire) {
        printf("%s---%s %s%s%s\n", kFgGray, kReset, kFgBrYel, g_statusLine, kReset);
    } else {
        printf("\n");
    }
    fflush(stdout);
}

// ===========================================================================
// Field spec + block editor
// ===========================================================================
enum FieldKind { FK_BOOL, FK_INT, FK_STR };

struct FieldSpec {
    const char* label;
    size_t      byte_offset;
    int         kind;      // FieldKind
    int         strmax;
    int         lo;        // clamp low; if lo == hi == 0, no clamp
    int         hi;
    int         step_big;  // PgUp/PgDn step (default 10)
};

// --- Field tables for each block ------------------------------------------
static const FieldSpec kPremierFields[] = {
    { "enabled",            offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, enabled),           FK_BOOL, 0, 0, 1,     10 },
    { "rank",               offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, rank),              FK_INT,  0, 0, 40000, 10 },
    { "wins",               offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, wins),              FK_INT,  0, 0, 99999, 10 },
    { "losses",             offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, losses),            FK_INT,  0, 0, 99999, 10 },
    { "draws",              offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, draws),             FK_INT,  0, 0, 99999, 10 },
    { "rank_type_id",       offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, rank_type_id),      FK_INT,  0, 0, 20,    1  },
    { "cs_rating_premier",  offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, cs_rating_premier), FK_INT,  0, 0, 40000, 100},
};
static const FieldSpec kWingmanFields[] = {
    { "enabled",            offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, enabled),           FK_BOOL, 0, 0, 1,   10 },
    { "rank",               offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, rank),              FK_INT,  0, 0, 18,  1  },
    { "wins",               offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, wins),              FK_INT,  0, 0, 99999, 10 },
    { "losses",             offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, losses),            FK_INT,  0, 0, 99999, 10 },
    { "draws",              offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, draws),             FK_INT,  0, 0, 99999, 10 },
    { "rank_type_id",       offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, rank_type_id),      FK_INT,  0, 0, 20,  1  },
};
static const FieldSpec kCompFields[] = {
    { "enabled",            offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, enabled),           FK_BOOL, 0, 0, 1,   10 },
    { "rank",               offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, rank),              FK_INT,  0, 0, 18,  1  },
    { "wins",               offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, wins),              FK_INT,  0, 0, 99999, 10 },
    { "losses",             offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, losses),            FK_INT,  0, 0, 99999, 10 },
    { "draws",              offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, draws),             FK_INT,  0, 0, 99999, 10 },
    { "rank_type_id",       offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MODE, rank_type_id),      FK_INT,  0, 0, 20,  1  },
};
static const FieldSpec kProfileFields[] = {
    { "enabled",             offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, enabled),                     FK_BOOL, 0, 0, 1,       10 },
    { "private_rank_level",  offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, private_rank_level),          FK_INT,  0, 0, 40,      1  },
    { "private_rank_xp",     offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, private_rank_xp),             FK_INT,  0, 0, 2000000, 1000 },
    { "commends_leader",     offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, commends_leader),             FK_INT,  0, 0, 999999,  10 },
    { "commends_teacher",    offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, commends_teacher),            FK_INT,  0, 0, 999999,  10 },
    { "commends_friendly",   offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, commends_friendly),           FK_INT,  0, 0, 999999,  10 },
    { "music_kit_id",        offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, music_kit_id),                FK_INT,  0, 0, 100,     1  },
    { "music_kit_mvps",      offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, music_kit_mvps),              FK_INT,  0, 0, 9999,    10 },
    { "controller_mvps",     offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, controller_mvps),             FK_INT,  0, 0, 9999,    10 },
    { "controller_score",    offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, controller_score),            FK_INT,  0, 0, 99999,   10 },
    { "service_medal_year",  offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, service_medal_year),          FK_INT,  0, 0, 2050,    1  },
    { "service_medal_level", offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, service_medal_level),         FK_INT,  0, 0, 30,      1  },
    { "coin_id",             offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, coin_id),                     FK_INT,  0, 0, 999999,  1  },
    { "clan_tag",            offsetof(RANKSPOOF_PROFILE, clan_tag),                    FK_STR,  15,0, 0,       0  },
};
static const FieldSpec kMatchmakingFields[] = {
    { "enabled",                 offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING, enabled),                 FK_BOOL, 0, 0, 1,   0 },
    { "queued_matchmaking_mode", offsetof(RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING, queued_matchmaking_mode), FK_INT,  0, 0, 20,  1 },
};

struct BlockEditor {
    const char*      name;
    void*            block;   // pointer to live block inside SHM
    const FieldSpec* fields;
    int              count;
};

// Return pointer inside block to the given field's raw storage.
static void* FieldAddr(const BlockEditor& be, int idx) {
    return (unsigned char*)be.block + be.fields[idx].byte_offset;
}

// Value getters/setters --- act directly on SHM to keep display live.
static int FieldGetInt(const BlockEditor& be, int idx) {
    void* p = FieldAddr(be, idx);
    if (be.fields[idx].kind == FK_BOOL) return (int)(*(unsigned int*)p ? 1 : 0);
    if (be.fields[idx].kind == FK_INT)  return *(int*)p;
    return 0;
}
static void FieldSetInt(const BlockEditor& be, int idx, int v) {
    const FieldSpec& fs = be.fields[idx];
    if (!(fs.lo == 0 && fs.hi == 0)) {
        if (v < fs.lo) v = fs.lo;
        if (v > fs.hi) v = fs.hi;
    } else if (v < 0) v = 0;
    void* p = FieldAddr(be, idx);
    if (fs.kind == FK_BOOL)      WriteBool((unsigned int*)p, v);
    else if (fs.kind == FK_INT)  WriteInt((int*)p, v);
}

// ===========================================================================
// Blocking text input for clan_tag
// ===========================================================================
static void ReadTextInput(char* buf, int cap, int maxlen) {
    memset(buf, 0, cap);
    int n = 0;
    while (true) {
        int c = _getch();
        if (c == 13) break;                    // Enter
        if (c == 27) { buf[0] = 0; return; }   // Esc = cancel
        if (c == 8) {                          // Backspace
            if (n > 0) { n--; buf[n] = 0; fputs("\b \b", stdout); fflush(stdout); }
            continue;
        }
        if (c == 0 || c == 224) { _getch(); continue; } // eat extended prefix
        if (n < maxlen && c >= 32 && c < 127) {
            buf[n++] = (char)c;
            buf[n] = 0;
            fputc(c, stdout); fflush(stdout);
        }
    }
    if (n > maxlen) buf[maxlen] = 0;
}

static void PromptClanTag(void* addr) {
    // Move to a fresh line, prompt, capture up to 15 chars. Text input is a
    // deliberate compromise: we drop to cooked-visible-cursor mode for the
    // duration so the user can see what they're typing, then restore.
    fputs("\x1b[?25h", stdout);                      // show cursor
    printf("\n%sEnter clan tag (<=15 chars, Enter to save, Esc to cancel):%s ",
           kBold, kReset);
    fflush(stdout);
    char buf[64] = {};
    ReadTextInput(buf, sizeof(buf), 15);
    fputs("\x1b[?25l", stdout);                      // hide cursor again
    fflush(stdout);
    if (buf[0] == 0) { SetStatus("clan_tag: unchanged"); return; }
    WriteString16((char*)addr, buf);
    SetStatus("clan_tag = \"%s\"", buf);
}

// ===========================================================================
// Editor screen (called from main loop when a block key is pressed)
// ===========================================================================
static void RenderEditor(const BlockEditor& be, int cursor, const char* pendBuf, const Snap& latest) {
    // Draw the main screen underneath for context…
    RenderMainScreen(latest, g_refreshHz);
    // …then overlay a tight editor panel.
    printf("%s%s%s\n", kFgGray,
           "-------------------------------------------------------------------------------",
           kReset);
    printf(" %sEditing: %s%s  (Tab / arrows switch  Space toggle  +/- adjust  Enter commit  Esc back)%s\n",
           kBold, be.name, kDim, kReset);

    for (int i = 0; i < be.count; ++i) {
        const FieldSpec& fs = be.fields[i];
        bool sel = (i == cursor);
        const char* marker = sel ? " > " : "   ";
        const char* col    = sel ? kFgBrCyn : kFgWhite;
        char valBuf[64] = {};
        if (fs.kind == FK_STR) {
            char tmp[32] = {}; memcpy(tmp, FieldAddr(be, i), fs.strmax);
            _snprintf_s(valBuf, sizeof(valBuf), _TRUNCATE, "\"%s\"", tmp);
        } else if (fs.kind == FK_BOOL) {
            unsigned int v = *(unsigned int*)FieldAddr(be, i);
            _snprintf_s(valBuf, sizeof(valBuf), _TRUNCATE, "%s",
                        v ? "1 (ON)" : "0 (off)");
        } else {
            int v = *(int*)FieldAddr(be, i);
            _snprintf_s(valBuf, sizeof(valBuf), _TRUNCATE, "%d", v);
        }
        if (sel && pendBuf && pendBuf[0]) {
            printf("%s%s%-20s = %s (pending: %s%s%s)%s\n",
                   col, marker, fs.label, valBuf, kFgYell, pendBuf, col, kReset);
        } else {
            printf("%s%s%-20s = %s%s\n", col, marker, fs.label, valBuf, kReset);
        }
    }
    fflush(stdout);
}

// Read one key press (blocking). Returns:
//   0..255 for normal keys,
//   0x1000|scan for extended keys.
static int ReadKeyBlocking() {
    int c = _getch();
    if (c == 0 || c == 224) {
        int s = _getch();
        return 0x1000 | (s & 0xFF);
    }
    return c;
}

#define KEY_UP    (0x1000 | 0x48)
#define KEY_DOWN  (0x1000 | 0x50)
#define KEY_LEFT  (0x1000 | 0x4B)
#define KEY_RIGHT (0x1000 | 0x4D)
#define KEY_PGUP  (0x1000 | 0x49)
#define KEY_PGDN  (0x1000 | 0x51)
#define KEY_HOME  (0x1000 | 0x47)
#define KEY_END   (0x1000 | 0x4F)
#define KEY_DEL   (0x1000 | 0x53)

// Run interactive edit loop over a block. Returns when user hits Esc/Enter-back.
static void RunEditor(const BlockEditor& be) {
    int cursor = 0;
    char pending[16] = {};
    int  pendLen = 0;
    // First draw
    Snap s{}; ReadSnap(s);
    RenderEditor(be, cursor, pending, s);

    while (true) {
        // Idle poll — redraw every ~250ms so live values from driver refresh.
        DWORD start = GetTickCount();
        while (!_kbhit()) {
            Sleep(30);
            if (GetTickCount() - start > 250) break;
        }
        if (!_kbhit()) {
            Snap ss{}; ReadSnap(ss);
            RenderEditor(be, cursor, pending, ss);
            continue;
        }
        int k = ReadKeyBlocking();

        // Quit editor
        if (k == 27) { return; }

        const FieldSpec& fs = be.fields[cursor];

        // Field navigation
        if (k == 9 || k == KEY_RIGHT || k == KEY_DOWN) {
            pending[0] = 0; pendLen = 0;
            cursor = (cursor + 1) % be.count;
        } else if (k == KEY_LEFT || k == KEY_UP) {
            pending[0] = 0; pendLen = 0;
            cursor = (cursor + be.count - 1) % be.count;
        } else if (k == ' ' && fs.kind == FK_BOOL) {
            int cur = FieldGetInt(be, cursor);
            FieldSetInt(be, cursor, cur ? 0 : 1);
            SetStatus("%s.%s = %d", be.name, fs.label, cur ? 0 : 1);
        } else if (k == '+' || k == '=') {
            int cur = FieldGetInt(be, cursor);
            FieldSetInt(be, cursor, cur + 1);
            SetStatus("%s.%s +1", be.name, fs.label);
        } else if (k == '-' || k == '_') {
            int cur = FieldGetInt(be, cursor);
            FieldSetInt(be, cursor, cur - 1);
            SetStatus("%s.%s -1", be.name, fs.label);
        } else if (k == KEY_PGUP) {
            int cur = FieldGetInt(be, cursor);
            FieldSetInt(be, cursor, cur + (fs.step_big ? fs.step_big : 10));
            SetStatus("%s.%s +%d", be.name, fs.label, fs.step_big ? fs.step_big : 10);
        } else if (k == KEY_PGDN) {
            int cur = FieldGetInt(be, cursor);
            FieldSetInt(be, cursor, cur - (fs.step_big ? fs.step_big : 10));
            SetStatus("%s.%s -%d", be.name, fs.label, fs.step_big ? fs.step_big : 10);
        } else if (k == KEY_HOME) {
            FieldSetInt(be, cursor, 0);
            SetStatus("%s.%s = 0", be.name, fs.label);
        } else if (k == KEY_END) {
            if (!(fs.lo == 0 && fs.hi == 0)) {
                FieldSetInt(be, cursor, fs.hi);
                SetStatus("%s.%s = %d (max)", be.name, fs.label, fs.hi);
            }
        } else if (k == 8) {
            if (pendLen > 0) { pendLen--; pending[pendLen] = 0; }
        } else if (k >= '0' && k <= '9' && fs.kind == FK_INT) {
            if (pendLen < (int)sizeof(pending) - 1) {
                pending[pendLen++] = (char)k; pending[pendLen] = 0;
            }
        } else if (k == 13) {
            // Enter — commit for int / open string prompt for str / toggle for bool
            if (fs.kind == FK_INT && pendLen > 0) {
                int v = atoi(pending);
                FieldSetInt(be, cursor, v);
                SetStatus("%s.%s = %d", be.name, fs.label, FieldGetInt(be, cursor));
                pending[0] = 0; pendLen = 0;
            } else if (fs.kind == FK_STR) {
                PromptClanTag(FieldAddr(be, cursor));
            } else if (fs.kind == FK_BOOL) {
                int cur = FieldGetInt(be, cursor);
                FieldSetInt(be, cursor, cur ? 0 : 1);
                SetStatus("%s.%s = %d", be.name, fs.label, cur ? 0 : 1);
            }
        }
        // redraw at top of loop
        Snap ss{}; ReadSnap(ss);
        RenderEditor(be, cursor, pending, ss);
    }
}

// ===========================================================================
// Freeze-mask editor
// ===========================================================================
static void RunFreezeEditor() {
    struct Bit { char key; const char* name; unsigned int mask; };
    static const Bit kBits[] = {
        { 'P', "Premier",     RANKSPOOF_FRZ_PREMIER     },
        { 'W', "Wingman",     RANKSPOOF_FRZ_WINGMAN     },
        { 'C', "Competitive", RANKSPOOF_FRZ_COMPETITIVE },
        { 'O', "Profile",     RANKSPOOF_FRZ_PROFILE     },
        { 'M', "Matchmaking", RANKSPOOF_FRZ_MATCHMAKING },
    };
    while (true) {
        Snap s{}; ReadSnap(s);
        RenderMainScreen(s, g_refreshHz);
        printf("%s%s%s\n", kFgGray,
               "-------------------------------------------------------------------------------",
               kReset);
        printf(" %sFreeze mask editor%s  press letter to toggle, %s[A]%s toggle all, %s[Enter]%s apply, %s[Esc]%s back\n",
               kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset);
        for (const auto& b : kBits) {
            bool set = (s.freeze_mask & b.mask) != 0;
            printf("   [%c] %s = %s%s%s\n", b.key, b.name,
                   set ? kFgCyan : kFgGray,
                   set ? "ENABLED" : "off",
                   kReset);
        }
        fflush(stdout);
        int k = ReadKeyBlocking();
        if (k == 27 || k == 13) return;
        char kc = (char)(k & 0xFF);
        if (kc >= 'a' && kc <= 'z') kc = (char)(kc - 'a' + 'A');
        if (kc == 'A') {
            unsigned int newMask = (s.freeze_mask == RANKSPOOF_FRZ_ALL) ? 0u : RANKSPOOF_FRZ_ALL;
            WriteMask(&g_state->freeze_mask, newMask);
            SetStatus("freeze_mask = 0x%02X", newMask);
            continue;
        }
        for (const auto& b : kBits) {
            if (b.key == kc) {
                unsigned int newMask = s.freeze_mask ^ b.mask;
                WriteMask(&g_state->freeze_mask, newMask);
                SetStatus("freeze_mask = 0x%02X (toggled %s)", newMask, b.name);
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}

// ===========================================================================
// Preset table & picker
// ===========================================================================
typedef void (*PresetFn)(RANKSPOOF_STATE*);

static void P_ResetAll(RANKSPOOF_STATE* st) {
    RANKSPOOF_MODE m{}; m.enabled = 0;
    ApplyMode(&st->premier, m);
    ApplyMode(&st->wingman, m);
    ApplyMode(&st->competitive, m);
    RANKSPOOF_PROFILE p{}; p.enabled = 0;
    ApplyProfile(&st->profile, p);
    RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING mm{}; mm.enabled = 0;
    ApplyMatchmaking(&st->matchmaking, mm);
}

static void P_SilverI(RANKSPOOF_STATE* st) {
    RANKSPOOF_MODE c{};
    c.enabled = 1; c.rank = 1; c.wins = 0; c.losses = 0; c.rank_type_id = 6;
    ApplyMode(&st->competitive, c);
}

    ApplyMode(&st->competitive, c);
}
```
