struct PresetEntry { const char* name; PresetFn fn; };
static const PresetEntry kPresets[] = {
    { "Silver I fresh",             &P_SilverI    },
    { "Gold Nova III",              &P_GNIII      },
    { "MG1",                        &P_MG1        },
    { "DMG",                        &P_DMG        },
    { "Legendary Eagle",            &P_LE         },
    { "SMFC",                       &P_SMFC       },
    { "Global Elite 25W",           &P_GE25       },
    { "Premier 25000 Elo",          &P_Prem25k    },
    { "Premier 35000 Elo",          &P_Prem35k    },
    { "Wingman Legendary Eagle",    &P_WingLE     },
    { "Prestige Level 40",          &P_Prestige40 },
    { "Everything maxed",           &P_Max        },
};
static const int kPresetCount = (int)(sizeof(kPresets) / sizeof(kPresets[0]));

static void ApplyPreset(int idx1based) {
    if (idx1based < 1 || idx1based > kPresetCount) return;
    kPresets[idx1based - 1].fn(g_state);
    BumpGeneration();
    SetStatus("preset #%d applied: %s", idx1based, kPresets[idx1based-1].name);
}

static void RunPresetPicker() {
    while (true) {
        Snap s{}; ReadSnap(s);
        RenderMainScreen(s, g_refreshHz);
        printf("%s%s%s\n", kFgGray,
               "-------------------------------------------------------------------------------",
               kReset);
        printf(" %sPreset picker%s  press number (0=reset all), %s[Esc]%s back\n",
               kBold, kReset, kBold, kReset);
        for (int i = 0; i < kPresetCount; ++i) {
            char digit = (i < 9) ? (char)('1' + i) : (char)('A' + i - 9);
            printf("   %s[%c]%s %s\n", kBold, digit, kReset, kPresets[i].name);
        }
        printf("   %s[0]%s Reset all (disable everything)\n", kBold, kReset);
        fflush(stdout);
        int k = ReadKeyBlocking();
        if (k == 27) return;
        if (k == '0') { P_ResetAll(g_state); BumpGeneration(); SetStatus("all blocks reset"); return; }
        if (k >= '1' && k <= '9') { ApplyPreset(k - '0'); return; }
        if (k >= 'a' && k <= 'z') k = k - 'a' + 'A';
        if (k >= 'A' && k <= 'C') { ApplyPreset(9 + (k - 'A' + 1)); return; }
    }
}

// ===========================================================================
// JSON save / load (hand-rolled)
// ===========================================================================
static void GetConfigPath(char* out, size_t cap) {
    char env[MAX_PATH] = {};
    DWORD n = GetEnvironmentVariableA("LOCALAPPDATA", env, sizeof(env));
    if (n && n < sizeof(env)) {
        char dir[MAX_PATH];
        _snprintf_s(dir, sizeof(dir), _TRUNCATE, "%s\\CS2RankSpoofer", env);
        CreateDirectoryA(dir, NULL);
        _snprintf_s(out, cap, _TRUNCATE, "%s\\config.json", dir);
    } else {
        strcpy_s(out, cap, "CS2RankSpoofer.config.json");
    }
}

static void JsonEscape(char* dst, size_t cap, const char* src) {
    size_t d = 0;
    for (; src && *src && d + 2 < cap; ++src) {
        char c = *src;
        if (c == '"' || c == '\\') {
            if (d + 3 >= cap) break;
            dst[d++] = '\\'; dst[d++] = c;
        } else if (c == '\n') { dst[d++] = '\\'; dst[d++] = 'n'; }
        else if (c == '\t') { dst[d++] = '\\'; dst[d++] = 't'; }
        else if ((unsigned char)c >= 0x20) { dst[d++] = c; }
    }
    dst[d] = 0;
}

static bool SaveConfig(const char* path) {
    if (!g_state) return false;
    FILE* fp = nullptr;
    if (fopen_s(&fp, path, "wb") != 0 || !fp) return false;

    auto wMode = [&](const char* name, const RANKSPOOF_MODE& m, bool trailingComma) {
        fprintf(fp,
                "  \"%s\": {\r\n"
                "    \"enabled\": %u,\r\n"
                "    \"rank\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"wins\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"losses\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"draws\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"rank_type_id\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"cs_rating_premier\": %d\r\n"
                "  }%s\r\n",
                name, (unsigned)m.enabled, m.rank, m.wins, m.losses,
                m.draws, m.rank_type_id, m.cs_rating_premier,
                trailingComma ? "," : "");
    };

    fprintf(fp, "{\r\n");
    fprintf(fp, "  \"protocol_version\": %u,\r\n", RANKSPOOF_PROTOCOL_VERSION);
    fprintf(fp, "  \"freeze_mask\": %u,\r\n", g_state->freeze_mask);

    wMode("premier",     g_state->premier,     true);
    wMode("wingman",     g_state->wingman,     true);
    wMode("competitive", g_state->competitive, true);

    {
        const RANKSPOOF_PROFILE& p = g_state->profile;
        char clan[64] = {}, tmp[17] = {}; memcpy(tmp, p.clan_tag, 16);
        JsonEscape(clan, sizeof(clan), tmp);
        fprintf(fp,
                "  \"profile\": {\r\n"
                "    \"enabled\": %u,\r\n"
                "    \"private_rank_level\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"private_rank_xp\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"commends_leader\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"commends_teacher\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"commends_friendly\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"music_kit_id\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"music_kit_mvps\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"controller_mvps\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"controller_score\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"service_medal_year\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"service_medal_level\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"coin_id\": %d,\r\n"
                "    \"clan_tag\": \"%s\"\r\n"
                "  },\r\n",
                (unsigned)p.enabled, p.private_rank_level, p.private_rank_xp,
                p.commends_leader, p.commends_teacher, p.commends_friendly,
                p.music_kit_id, p.music_kit_mvps, p.controller_mvps,
                p.controller_score, p.service_medal_year, p.service_medal_level,
                p.coin_id, clan);
    }
    {
        const RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING& m = g_state->matchmaking;
        fprintf(fp,
                "  \"matchmaking\": {\r\n"
                "    \"enabled\": %u,\r\n"
                "    \"queued_matchmaking_mode\": %d\r\n"
                "  }\r\n",
                (unsigned)m.enabled, m.queued_matchmaking_mode);
    }
    fprintf(fp, "}\r\n");
    fclose(fp);
    return true;
}

// ---- Minimal JSON reader --------------------------------------------------
// This is deliberately dumb: for each key we care about, we `strstr` inside
// the correct nested object and parse the following value. No arbitrary JSON.
struct JsonBuf {
    char*  data;
    size_t len;
};

static bool ReadFileAll(const char* path, JsonBuf& out) {
    out.data = nullptr; out.len = 0;
    HANDLE h = CreateFileA(path, GENERIC_READ, FILE_SHARE_READ, NULL,
                           OPEN_EXISTING, FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL, NULL);
    if (h == INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE) return false;
    LARGE_INTEGER sz; if (!GetFileSizeEx(h, &sz) || sz.QuadPart <= 0 || sz.QuadPart > (1<<20)) {
        CloseHandle(h); return false;
    }
    char* buf = (char*)malloc((size_t)sz.QuadPart + 1);
    if (!buf) { CloseHandle(h); return false; }
    DWORD n = 0;
    if (!ReadFile(h, buf, (DWORD)sz.QuadPart, &n, NULL)) { free(buf); CloseHandle(h); return false; }
    buf[n] = 0;
    CloseHandle(h);
    out.data = buf; out.len = n;
    return true;
}

static const char* FindObject(const char* root, const char* name) {
    // find "name" then ':', then '{', return pointer to '{'
    char pat[64];
    _snprintf_s(pat, sizeof(pat), _TRUNCATE, "\"%s\"", name);
    const char* p = strstr(root, pat);
    if (!p) return nullptr;
    p = strchr(p, ':'); if (!p) return nullptr;
    while (*p && *p != '{') p++;
    return (*p == '{') ? p : nullptr;
}

// Parse int for "key" in text bounded by end (or end-of-string if end==NULL).
static bool JsonGetInt(const char* text, const char* end, const char* key, int& out) {
    char pat[64];
    _snprintf_s(pat, sizeof(pat), _TRUNCATE, "\"%s\"", key);
    const char* p = strstr(text, pat);
    if (!p || (end && p >= end)) return false;
    p = strchr(p, ':'); if (!p || (end && p >= end)) return false;
    p++;
    while (*p == ' ' || *p == '\t' || *p == '\r' || *p == '\n') p++;
    int sign = 1;
    if (*p == '-') { sign = -1; p++; } else if (*p == '+') { p++; }
    int v = 0; bool any = false;
    while (*p >= '0' && *p <= '9') { v = v * 10 + (*p - '0'); p++; any = true; }
    if (!any) return false;
    out = v * sign;
    return true;
}
static bool JsonGetUint(const char* text, const char* end, const char* key, unsigned int& out) {
    int v; if (!JsonGetInt(text, end, key, v)) return false;
    out = (unsigned int)v; return true;
}
static bool JsonGetString(const char* text, const char* end, const char* key, char* buf, size_t cap) {
    char pat[64];
    _snprintf_s(pat, sizeof(pat), _TRUNCATE, "\"%s\"", key);
    const char* p = strstr(text, pat);
    if (!p || (end && p >= end)) return false;
    p = strchr(p, ':'); if (!p || (end && p >= end)) return false;
    p++;
    while (*p == ' ' || *p == '\t' || *p == '\r' || *p == '\n') p++;
    if (*p != '"') return false; p++;
    size_t o = 0;
    while (*p && *p != '"' && o + 1 < cap) {
        if (*p == '\\' && p[1]) {
            char e = p[1];
            if (e == 'n') buf[o++] = '\n';
            else if (e == 't') buf[o++] = '\t';
            else buf[o++] = e;
            p += 2;
        } else {
            buf[o++] = *p++;
        }
    }
    buf[o] = 0;
    return true;
}

// End-of-object finder: match braces starting at '{'.
static const char* ObjectEnd(const char* start) {
    if (!start || *start != '{') return nullptr;
    int depth = 0;
    for (const char* p = start; *p; ++p) {
        if (*p == '{') depth++;
        else if (*p == '}') { depth--; if (depth == 0) return p; }
    }
    return nullptr;
}

static void LoadModeFrom(const char* obj, const char* end, RANKSPOOF_MODE& out) {
    unsigned int u = 0;
    if (JsonGetUint(obj, end, "enabled", u)) out.enabled = u;
    JsonGetInt(obj, end, "rank",              out.rank);
    JsonGetInt(obj, end, "wins",              out.wins);
    JsonGetInt(obj, end, "losses",            out.losses);
    JsonGetInt(obj, end, "draws",             out.draws);
    JsonGetInt(obj, end, "rank_type_id",      out.rank_type_id);
    JsonGetInt(obj, end, "cs_rating_premier", out.cs_rating_premier);
}

static bool LoadConfig(const char* path, char* errBuf, size_t errCap) {
    JsonBuf jb{};
    if (!ReadFileAll(path, jb)) {
        _snprintf_s(errBuf, errCap, _TRUNCATE, "cannot read %s", path);
        return false;
    }
    const char* root = jb.data;

    unsigned int fmask = 0;
    if (JsonGetUint(root, nullptr, "freeze_mask", fmask)) {
        WriteMask(&g_state->freeze_mask, fmask);
    }

    auto loadModeInto = [&](const char* name, RANKSPOOF_MODE* live) {
        const char* obj = FindObject(root, name);
        if (!obj) return;
        const char* end = ObjectEnd(obj);
        RANKSPOOF_MODE cur = *live;
        LoadModeFrom(obj, end, cur);
        ApplyMode(live, cur);
    };
    loadModeInto("premier",     &g_state->premier);
    loadModeInto("wingman",     &g_state->wingman);
    loadModeInto("competitive", &g_state->competitive);

    {
        const char* obj = FindObject(root, "profile");
        if (obj) {
            const char* end = ObjectEnd(obj);
            RANKSPOOF_PROFILE cur = g_state->profile;
            unsigned int u = 0;
            if (JsonGetUint(obj, end, "enabled", u)) cur.enabled = u;
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "private_rank_level",  cur.private_rank_level);
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "private_rank_xp",     cur.private_rank_xp);
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "commends_leader",     cur.commends_leader);
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "commends_teacher",    cur.commends_teacher);
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "commends_friendly",   cur.commends_friendly);
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "music_kit_id",        cur.music_kit_id);
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "music_kit_mvps",      cur.music_kit_mvps);
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "controller_mvps",     cur.controller_mvps);
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "controller_score",    cur.controller_score);
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "service_medal_year",  cur.service_medal_year);
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "service_medal_level", cur.service_medal_level);
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "coin_id",             cur.coin_id);
            char clan[32] = {};
            if (JsonGetString(obj, end, "clan_tag", clan, sizeof(clan))) {
                memset(cur.clan_tag, 0, sizeof(cur.clan_tag));
                strncpy_s(cur.clan_tag, sizeof(cur.clan_tag), clan, _TRUNCATE);
            }
            ApplyProfile(&g_state->profile, cur);
        }
    }
    {
        const char* obj = FindObject(root, "matchmaking");
        if (obj) {
            const char* end = ObjectEnd(obj);
            RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING cur = g_state->matchmaking;
            unsigned int u = 0;
            if (JsonGetUint(obj, end, "enabled", u)) cur.enabled = u;
            JsonGetInt(obj, end, "queued_matchmaking_mode", cur.queued_matchmaking_mode);
            ApplyMatchmaking(&g_state->matchmaking, cur);
        }
    }
    BumpGeneration();
    free(jb.data);
    return true;
}

// ===========================================================================
// Sanity
// ===========================================================================
static bool SanityCheck(char* err, size_t cap) {
    static_assert(sizeof(RANKSPOOF_STATE) < 65536, "RANKSPOOF_STATE too large");
    if (g_state->protocol_version != RANKSPOOF_PROTOCOL_VERSION) {
        _snprintf_s(err, cap, _TRUNCATE,
                    "driver protocol v%u, console expects v%u. Rebuild.",
                    g_state->protocol_version, RANKSPOOF_PROTOCOL_VERSION);
        return false;
    }
    if (g_state->magic != RANKSPOOF_MAGIC) {
        _snprintf_s(err, cap, _TRUNCATE,
                    "SHM magic mismatch (got 0x%08X, expected 0x%08X). Driver stale?",
                    g_state->magic, RANKSPOOF_MAGIC);
        return false;
    }
    return true;
}

// ===========================================================================
// Command-line handlers (headless mode — skip TUI entirely)
// ===========================================================================
static int RunUnload() {
    HANDLE stop = OpenEventA(EVENT_MODIFY_STATE, FALSE, RANKSPOOF_STOP_USER_NAME);
    if (!stop) {
        printf("%s[!] driver stop-event not present — is the driver even loaded?%s\n", kFgRed, kReset);
        return 1;
    }
    HANDLE done = OpenEventA(SYNCHRONIZE, FALSE, RANKSPOOF_DONE_USER_NAME);
    SetEvent(stop);
    printf("[+] stop signal sent; waiting up to 2s for driver ack…\n");
    if (done) {
        DWORD w = WaitForSingleObject(done, 2000);
        if (w == WAIT_OBJECT_0)      printf("%s[+] driver reported clean shutdown.%s\n", kFgGreen, kReset);
        else if (w == WAIT_TIMEOUT)  printf("%s[!] timeout — driver may still be unloading.%s\n", kFgYell, kReset);
        else                         printf("%s[!] WaitForSingleObject failed (%lu)%s\n", kFgRed, (unsigned long)GetLastError(), kReset);
        CloseHandle(done);
    } else {
        printf("[i] no done-event; nothing to wait on.\n");
    }
    CloseHandle(stop);
    return 0;
}

static int RunPrintState() {
    HANDLE h = OpenFileMappingA(FILE_MAP_READ, FALSE, RANKSPOOF_SHM_USER_NAME);
    if (!h) { printf("SHM not open: %lu\n", GetLastError()); return 1; }
    RANKSPOOF_STATE* st = (RANKSPOOF_STATE*)MapViewOfFile(h, FILE_MAP_READ, 0, 0, sizeof(RANKSPOOF_STATE));
    if (!st) { printf("MapView failed: %lu\n", GetLastError()); CloseHandle(h); return 1; }
    printf("magic          = 0x%08X\n",   st->magic);
    printf("protocol       = %u\n",       st->protocol_version);
    printf("driver_tick    = %u\n",       st->driver_tick);
    printf("cs2_pid        = %u\n",       st->cs2_pid);
    printf("client_base    = 0x%016llX\n",(unsigned long long)st->client_base);
    printf("hook_status    = %u (%s)\n",  st->hook_status, HookStatusName(st->hook_status));
    printf("controller_va  = 0x%016llX\n",(unsigned long long)st->controller_va);
    printf("inventory_va   = 0x%016llX\n",(unsigned long long)st->inventory_va);
    printf("gamerules_va   = 0x%016llX\n",(unsigned long long)st->gamerules_va);
    printf("write_count    = %llu\n",     (unsigned long long)st->write_count);
    printf("write_errors   = %u\n",       st->write_error_count);
    printf("write_gen      = %u\n",       st->write_generation);
    printf("driver_wr_gen  = %u\n",       st->driver_write_generation);
    printf("freeze_mask    = 0x%08X\n",   st->freeze_mask);
    printf("schema.registry= %u\n",       st->schema.source_is_registry);
    printf("premier        en=%u rank=%d wins=%d losses=%d draws=%d type=%d cs_rat=%d\n",
        (unsigned)st->premier.enabled, st->premier.rank, st->premier.wins, st->premier.losses,
        st->premier.draws, st->premier.rank_type_id, st->premier.cs_rating_premier);
    printf("wingman        en=%u rank=%d wins=%d losses=%d\n",
        (unsigned)st->wingman.enabled, st->wingman.rank, st->wingman.wins, st->wingman.losses);
    printf("competitive    en=%u rank=%d wins=%d losses=%d\n",
        (unsigned)st->competitive.enabled, st->competitive.rank, st->competitive.wins, st->competitive.losses);
    printf("profile        en=%u level=%d xp=%d mvps=%d score=%d clan=\"%.16s\"\n",
        (unsigned)st->profile.enabled, st->profile.private_rank_level,
        st->profile.private_rank_xp, st->profile.controller_mvps,
        st->profile.controller_score, st->profile.clan_tag);
    printf("matchmaking    en=%u queued_mode=%d\n",
        (unsigned)st->matchmaking.enabled, st->matchmaking.queued_matchmaking_mode);
    UnmapViewOfFile(st);
    CloseHandle(h);
    return 0;
}

// ===========================================================================
// main()
// ===========================================================================
int main(int argc, char** argv) {
    // -------- parse flags first (they short-circuit TUI) -------------------
    bool flagUnload = false;
    bool flagPrint  = false;
    int  flagPreset = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i < argc; ++i) {
        if (!_stricmp(argv[i], "--unload") || !_stricmp(argv[i], "-u")) {
            flagUnload = true;
        } else if (!_stricmp(argv[i], "--print-state")) {
            flagPrint = true;
        } else if (!_stricmp(argv[i], "--set-preset") && i + 1 < argc) {
            flagPreset = atoi(argv[++i]);
        } else if (!_strnicmp(argv[i], "--set-preset=", 13)) {
            flagPreset = atoi(argv[i] + 13);
        }
    }

    // Enable VT for pretty error messages even before we open the SHM.
    EnableVT100();

    if (flagUnload) {
        int rc = RunUnload();
        RestoreConsole();
        return rc;
    }
    if (flagPrint) {
        int rc = RunPrintState();
        RestoreConsole();
        return rc;
    }

    // -------- Open SHM ------------------------------------------------------
    g_shmHandle = OpenFileMappingA(FILE_MAP_ALL_ACCESS, FALSE, RANKSPOOF_SHM_USER_NAME);
    if (!g_shmHandle) {
        DWORD e = GetLastError();
        char m[256]; FormatWinErr(e, m, sizeof(m));
        printf("%s[FATAL] Driver not loaded (%s missing).%s\n"
               "        Run Load-Spoofer.ps1 first.\n"
               "        OS error %lu: %s\n",
               kFgRed, RANKSPOOF_SHM_USER_NAME, kReset, e, m);
        RestoreConsole();
        return 1;
    }
    g_state = (RANKSPOOF_STATE*)MapViewOfFile(g_shmHandle, FILE_MAP_ALL_ACCESS,
                                              0, 0, sizeof(RANKSPOOF_STATE));
    if (!g_state) {
        DWORD e = GetLastError();
        char m[256]; FormatWinErr(e, m, sizeof(m));
        printf("%s[FATAL] MapViewOfFile failed (%lu: %s)%s\n", kFgRed, e, m, kReset);
        CloseHandle(g_shmHandle);
        RestoreConsole();
        return 1;
    }

    // Wait briefly for the driver to publish magic/protocol_version.
    for (int i = 0; i < 20 && g_state->magic != RANKSPOOF_MAGIC; ++i) Sleep(25);

    char err[256] = {};
    if (!SanityCheck(err, sizeof(err))) {
        printf("%s[FATAL] %s%s\n", kFgRed, err, kReset);
        UnmapViewOfFile(g_state); CloseHandle(g_shmHandle);
        RestoreConsole();
        return 1;
    }

    // -------- Open stop / done events (best-effort) ------------------------
    g_stopEvent = OpenEventA(EVENT_MODIFY_STATE, FALSE, RANKSPOOF_STOP_USER_NAME);
    g_doneEvent = OpenEventA(SYNCHRONIZE,        FALSE, RANKSPOOF_DONE_USER_NAME);

    // -------- Command-line preset (short-circuits TUI) ---------------------
    if (flagPreset > 0) {
        if (flagPreset > kPresetCount) {
            printf("%s[!] preset index %d out of range (1..%d)%s\n",
                   kFgRed, flagPreset, kPresetCount, kReset);
        } else {
            ApplyPreset(flagPreset);
            printf("%s[+] preset #%d applied: %s%s\n",
                   kFgGreen, flagPreset, kPresets[flagPreset-1].name, kReset);
        }
        if (g_stopEvent) CloseHandle(g_stopEvent);
        if (g_doneEvent) CloseHandle(g_doneEvent);
        UnmapViewOfFile(g_state); CloseHandle(g_shmHandle);
        RestoreConsole();
        return 0;
    }

    // -------- Interactive TUI ----------------------------------------------
    SetConsoleCtrlHandler(CtrlHandler, TRUE);
    GetConfigPath(g_configPath, sizeof(g_configPath));
    fputs("\x1b[?25l", stdout);           // hide cursor

    SetStatus("Console %s connected. Press [Q] to quit.", CONSOLE_VERSION_STR);

    while (!InterlockedExchangeAdd(&g_quitRequested, 0)) {
        Snap s{};
        ReadSnap(s);
        RenderMainScreen(s, g_refreshHz);

        DWORD frameMs = 1000u / (g_refreshHz > 0 ? g_refreshHz : 4);
        DWORD start = GetTickCount();
        while (GetTickCount() - start < frameMs) {
            if (_kbhit()) break;
            Sleep(15);
            if (InterlockedExchangeAdd(&g_quitRequested, 0)) break;
        }

        while (_kbhit()) {
            int k = ReadKeyBlocking();
            if (k >= 'a' && k <= 'z') k = k - 'a' + 'A';

            if (k == 'Q' || k == 27) {
                InterlockedExchange(&g_quitRequested, 1);
                break;
            }
            switch (k) {
            case 'P': {
                BlockEditor be = { "Premier", &g_state->premier,
                                   kPremierFields, (int)(sizeof(kPremierFields)/sizeof(kPremierFields[0])) };
                RunEditor(be);
                break;
            }
            case 'W': {
                BlockEditor be = { "Wingman", &g_state->wingman,
                                   kWingmanFields, (int)(sizeof(kWingmanFields)/sizeof(kWingmanFields[0])) };
                RunEditor(be);
                break;
            }
            case 'C': {
                BlockEditor be = { "Competitive", &g_state->competitive,
                                   kCompFields, (int)(sizeof(kCompFields)/sizeof(kCompFields[0])) };
                RunEditor(be);
                break;
            }
            case 'O': {
                BlockEditor be = { "Profile", &g_state->profile,
                                   kProfileFields, (int)(sizeof(kProfileFields)/sizeof(kProfileFields[0])) };
                RunEditor(be);
                break;
            }
            case 'M': {
                BlockEditor be = { "Matchmaking", &g_state->matchmaking,
                                   kMatchmakingFields, (int)(sizeof(kMatchmakingFields)/sizeof(kMatchmakingFields[0])) };
                RunEditor(be);
                break;
            }
            case 'F': RunFreezeEditor(); break;
            case 'S': RunPresetPicker(); break;
            case 'R': {
                if      (g_refreshHz <= 2)  g_refreshHz = 4;
                else if (g_refreshHz <= 4)  g_refreshHz = 10;
                else if (g_refreshHz <= 10) g_refreshHz = 30;
                else                        g_refreshHz = 2;
                SetStatus("refresh = %d Hz", g_refreshHz);
                break;
            }
            case 'J': {
                if (SaveConfig(g_configPath)) SetStatus("saved: %s", g_configPath);
                else                          SetStatus("save FAILED: %s", g_configPath);
                break;
            }
            case 'L': {
                char emsg[256] = {};
                if (LoadConfig(g_configPath, emsg, sizeof(emsg)))
                    SetStatus("loaded: %s", g_configPath);
                else
                    SetStatus("load FAILED: %s", emsg[0] ? emsg : g_configPath);
                break;
            }
            case 'B': BumpGeneration(); SetStatus("generation bumped -> %u",
                                                   g_state->write_generation); break;
            case 'U': {
                if (!g_stopEvent) { SetStatus("no stop-event; driver already gone"); break; }
                SetEvent(g_stopEvent);
                SetStatus("stop signalled — waiting up to 2s for driver ack…");
                RenderMainScreen(s, g_refreshHz);
                DWORD w = g_doneEvent ? WaitForSingleObject(g_doneEvent, 2000) : WAIT_TIMEOUT;
                if (w == WAIT_OBJECT_0) {
                    _snprintf_s(g_exitMessage, sizeof(g_exitMessage), _TRUNCATE,
                                "%s[+] driver acknowledged unload. bye.%s\n",
                                kFgGreen, kReset);
                } else {
                    _snprintf_s(g_exitMessage, sizeof(g_exitMessage), _TRUNCATE,
                                "%s[!] driver did NOT ack within 2s. It may still be unloading.%s\n",
                                kFgYell, kReset);
                }
                InterlockedExchange(&g_quitRequested, 1);
                break;
            }
            default: break;
            }
        }
    }

    // -------- Teardown -----------------------------------------------------
    if (g_stopEvent) CloseHandle(g_stopEvent);
    if (g_doneEvent) CloseHandle(g_doneEvent);
    if (g_state)     UnmapViewOfFile(g_state);
    if (g_shmHandle) CloseHandle(g_shmHandle);
    RestoreConsole();
    if (g_exitMessage[0]) { fputs(g_exitMessage, stdout); fflush(stdout); }
    return 0;
}

```

`source/apps/CS2RankSpooferConsole/shared.h`:

```h
#pragma once

// Shared header — usable from both kernel-mode driver and user-mode console.
// We intentionally do NOT include <cstdint> here so the kernel build does not
// drag in user-mode <stdint.h>; only built-in language types are used below.
//
// v2 protocol (2026-07-15, "spoof everything"):
//   - Extended RANKSPOOF_MODE with draws + rank_type + cs_rating_premier (append-only)
//   - New RANKSPOOF_PROFILE block (private_rank/XP/medals/music_kit/MVPs/score/clan tag)
//   - New RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING block (queued matchmaking mode)
//   - freeze_mask on RANKSPOOF_STATE — driver re-applies enabled fields every tick
//   - Runtime schema offsets pushed into SHM by Load-Spoofer.ps1 (registry-driven)
//   - Every existing user-mode field kept at the same offset for back-compat with v1 clients.
//   - RANKSPOOF_CS2_DATA extended with infra header (magic/version/generation/hit_count/scratch)

// ---- Object names ----------------------------------------------------------
#define RANKSPOOF_SHM_KERNEL_NAME    L"\\BaseNamedObjects\\CS2RankSpoofState"
#define RANKSPOOF_STOP_KERNEL_NAME   L"\\BaseNamedObjects\\CS2RankSpoofStop"
#define RANKSPOOF_DONE_KERNEL_NAME   L"\\BaseNamedObjects\\CS2RankSpoofStopped"

#define RANKSPOOF_SHM_USER_NAME      "Global\\CS2RankSpoofState"
#define RANKSPOOF_STOP_USER_NAME     "Global\\CS2RankSpoofStop"
#define RANKSPOOF_DONE_USER_NAME     "Global\\CS2RankSpoofStopped"

// ---- Magic + protocol version ---------------------------------------------
#define RANKSPOOF_MAGIC              0x52415358u   // 'RASX'
#define RANKSPOOF_PROTOCOL_VERSION   2u

// ---- Game-mode IDs (as observed in cs2 get_rank_data calls) ---------------
#define RANKSPOOF_MODE_PREMIER       11
#define RANKSPOOF_MODE_WINGMAN       7
#define RANKSPOOF_MODE_COMPETITIVE   1

// ---- Hook / worker status --------------------------------------------------
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_IDLE            0
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_SCANNING        1
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_INSTALLED       2   // direct-write path active (Phase 1.5)
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_REMOVED         3
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_PATTERN_FOUND   4   // Phase-2 trampoline pattern resolved (info)
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_WRITING         5   // actively pushing values into cs2 memory
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_NO_CS2      10
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_NO_CLIENT   11
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_PATTERN     12
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_ALLOC       13
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_WRITE       14
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_PROTECT     15
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_LPC         16   // could not resolve local-player-controller pointer
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_INV         17   // could not resolve InventoryServices sub-object
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_OFFSETS     18   // registry offsets missing / all zero
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_INTERNAL    99

// ---- Freeze bit-mask (RANKSPOOF_STATE.freeze_mask) ------------------------
#define RANKSPOOF_FRZ_PREMIER          (1u <<  0)
#define RANKSPOOF_FRZ_WINGMAN          (1u <<  1)
#define RANKSPOOF_FRZ_COMPETITIVE      (1u <<  2)
#define RANKSPOOF_FRZ_PROFILE          (1u <<  3)
#define RANKSPOOF_FRZ_MATCHMAKING      (1u <<  4)
#define RANKSPOOF_FRZ_ALL              0x0000001Fu

// ---- Per-mode block (Premier / Wingman / Competitive) --------------------
// v1 compatibility: first 16 bytes = original layout (enabled/rank/wins/losses).
#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct _RANKSPOOF_MODE {
    unsigned int   enabled;             // 0/1  (v1)
    int            rank;                // 0..18 (comp/wingman) OR 0..40000 (premier)  (v1)
    int            wins;                // (v1)
    int            losses;              // (v1)
    // ---- v2 additions (appended-only) ----
    int            draws;               // Premier match ties
    int            rank_type_id;        // 0=none, 6=classic-comp, 7=wingman, 11=premier
    int            cs_rating_premier;   // explicit Premier Elo when 'rank' semantics differ (0..40000)
    int            pad0;
} RANKSPOOF_MODE;
#pragma pack(pop)

// ---- Profile block (menu / scoreboard cosmetics) -------------------------
// InventoryServices sub-object fields + controller-level counters.
#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct _RANKSPOOF_PROFILE {
    unsigned int   enabled;
    int            private_rank_level;  // 1..40, InventoryServices.m_nPersonaDataPublicLevel
    int            private_rank_xp;     // InventoryServices.m_nPersonaDataXpTrailLevel
    int            commends_leader;     // InventoryServices.m_nPersonaDataPublicCommendsLeader
    int            commends_teacher;
    int            commends_friendly;
    int            music_kit_id;        // controller.m_iMusicKitID (mirror: InventoryServices.m_unMusicID)
    int            music_kit_mvps;      // controller.m_iMusicKitMVPs
    int            controller_mvps;     // controller.m_iMVPs
    int            controller_score;    // controller.m_iScore
    int            service_medal_year;  // InventoryServices.m_rank[0].year_earned
    int            service_medal_level; // InventoryServices.m_rank[0].rank
    int            coin_id;             // InventoryServices.m_rank[X] slot id
    // Clan tag: 15 chars + NUL. Writable — see driver notes on CUtlSymbolLarge.
    char           clan_tag[16];
    int            pad0;
} RANKSPOOF_PROFILE;
#pragma pack(pop)

// ---- Matchmaking / gamerules block ---------------------------------------
#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct _RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING {
    unsigned int   enabled;
    int            queued_matchmaking_mode; // C_CSGameRules.m_nQueuedMatchmakingMode
    int            pad0[2];
} RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING;
#pragma pack(pop)

// ---- Runtime schema offsets ------------------------------------------------
// Load-Spoofer.ps1 fetches a2x/cs2-dumper HEAD, writes into
// HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\CS2RankSpoofer; driver reads on
// DriverEntry, then publishes into SHM so the console can display "loaded
// from GitHub HEAD" vs "hardcoded fallback". All fields = zero means fallback.
#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct _RANKSPOOF_SCHEMA {
    unsigned long long dwLocalPlayerController; // client.dll global -> CCSPlayerController*
    unsigned long long dwGameRules;             // client.dll global -> C_CSGameRules*
    unsigned int       controller_CompetitiveRanking;
    unsigned int       controller_CompetitiveWins;
    unsigned int       controller_CompetitiveRankType;
    unsigned int       controller_CompetitivePredictedWin;
    unsigned int       controller_CompetitivePredictedLoss;
    unsigned int       controller_CompetitivePredictedTie;
    unsigned int       controller_MVPs;
    unsigned int       controller_Score;
    unsigned int       controller_MusicKitID;
    unsigned int       controller_MusicKitMVPs;
    unsigned int       controller_ClanTag;
    unsigned int       controller_InventoryServices;          // pointer to sub-object
    unsigned int       inv_PersonaDataPublicLevel;
    unsigned int       inv_PersonaDataXpTrailLevel;
    unsigned int       inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsLeader;
    unsigned int       inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsTeacher;
    unsigned int       inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsFriendly;
    unsigned int       inv_MusicID;
    unsigned int       inv_Rank;                              // int[6] medal slots
    unsigned int       gamerules_QueuedMatchmakingMode;
    unsigned int       source_is_registry;                    // 1 = fresh, 0 = hardcoded
    unsigned int       pad[8];
} RANKSPOOF_SCHEMA;
#pragma pack(pop)

// ---- Top-level shared state -----------------------------------------------
// v1 backward compatibility: magic/driver_tick/cs2_pid/client_base/callsite_va/
// callsite_rva/original_fn_va/trampoline_va/data_page_va/hook_status/
// last_poll_systime and the three v1 mode blocks stay at their v1 offsets.
// New fields are appended AFTER pad[64] (which becomes pad_v1[64] for clarity).
#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct _RANKSPOOF_STATE {
    unsigned int       magic;                // = RANKSPOOF_MAGIC when valid  (v1 offset 0)

    // ---- driver-owned (user reads, never writes) ------------------------
    unsigned int       driver_tick;          // v1 offset 4
    unsigned int       cs2_pid;              // v1 offset 8
    unsigned long long client_base;          // v1 offset 12  (unaligned by design of v1)
    unsigned long long callsite_va;
    unsigned long long callsite_rva;
    unsigned long long original_fn_va;
    unsigned long long trampoline_va;        // Phase-2 (currently 0)
    unsigned long long data_page_va;         // Phase-2 (currently 0)
    unsigned int       hook_status;
    unsigned long long last_poll_systime;

    // ---- user-owned (driver reads, never writes) — v1 ------------------
    RANKSPOOF_MODE     premier;               // mode 11 (32 bytes v2, was 16 v1 — see .cpp static_assert)
    RANKSPOOF_MODE     wingman;               // mode 7
    RANKSPOOF_MODE     competitive;           // mode 1

    unsigned char      pad_v1[64];            // v1 tail — kept for byte-level compat

    // ==================== v2 APPEND ONLY BELOW ====================
    unsigned int       protocol_version;      // = RANKSPOOF_PROTOCOL_VERSION
    unsigned int       write_error_count;
    unsigned long long write_count;
    unsigned long long controller_va;
    unsigned long long inventory_va;
    unsigned long long gamerules_va;

    RANKSPOOF_SCHEMA   schema;

    RANKSPOOF_PROFILE      profile;
    RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING  matchmaking;

    unsigned int       freeze_mask;             // RANKSPOOF_FRZ_*
    unsigned int       write_generation;        // console bumps to force re-apply
    unsigned int       driver_write_generation; // driver echoes last generation it wrote
    unsigned int       reserved0;
    unsigned char      pad_tail[128];
} RANKSPOOF_STATE;
#pragma pack(pop)

// ---- cs2-resident data page (Phase-2 trampoline shellcode reads this) ----
// Kept for FUTURE Phase-2 — driver still does NOT allocate this yet.
// Layout is a stable ABI contract for when the trampoline is written.
#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct _RANKSPOOF_CS2_DATA {
    // ---- infra (validated by trampoline before use) ----
    unsigned int       magic;                // must equal RANKSPOOF_MAGIC
    unsigned int       version;              // must equal RANKSPOOF_PROTOCOL_VERSION
    unsigned int       generation;           // driver bumps per write; trampoline detects torn reads
    unsigned int       reserved0;
    unsigned long long original_fn_ptr;      // trampoline calls original via this indirection
    unsigned long long hit_count;             // trampoline increments per call
    unsigned long long last_call_qpc;         // trampoline stamps QueryPerformanceCounter
    unsigned long long override_mask;         // per-field toggle bitfield

    // ---- data mirrored from RANKSPOOF_STATE ----
    RANKSPOOF_MODE     premier;
    RANKSPOOF_MODE     wingman;
    RANKSPOOF_MODE     competitive;
    RANKSPOOF_PROFILE  profile;
    RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING matchmaking;

    unsigned char      scratch[64];           // trampoline register-save scratch
    unsigned char      pad[64];
} RANKSPOOF_CS2_DATA;
#pragma pack(pop)

```

`source/dlls/README.md`:

```md
# `source/dlls/` — Injected DLL projects / Проекты внедряемых DLL

**[EN](#english) · [RU / Русский](#русский)**

---

## English

Contains all injected-DLL projects for CS2. As of today — **one** active project: `VacLiveBypass` (reconstruction of `FuckVacAgain.dll`).

### Projects

| Project | Output | Description |
|---|---|---|
| [`VacLiveBypass/`](VacLiveBypass/) | `fva_recon.dll` | 1:1 reconstruction of the VMProtect-obfuscated `FuckVacAgain.dll`. Modifies `CBaseUserCmdPB.input_history` before wire serialization via three MinHook detours. |

Full details: [`VacLiveBypass/README.md`](VacLiveBypass/README.md).

### Layout

```
source/dlls/
├── README.md                           (this file)
└── VacLiveBypass/
    ├── CMakeLists.txt                  Build via CMake + MSVC
    ├── README.md                       Detailed project description
    ├── src/                            Source
    │   ├── dllmain.cpp                 Entry point + install/uninstall pipeline
    │   ├── version_manifest.h          All RVA / offsets / md5 / build fingerprints
    │   ├── core/                       signature_scanner, convar, logf, debug
    │   ├── valve/                      Layout CBaseUserCmdPB, client_input, protobuf_alloc
    │   ├── features/                   cvar_suppress, console_exec, isvalveds_check
    │   ├── hooks/                      Hook A/B/C + phase_b2 (Section-J emitter) + engine2 bindings
    │   ├── patterns/                   139 sig-scan patterns
    │   ├── include/                    CS2 struct types (offsets from cs2-dumper)
    │   └── tests/                      self_check + detect_build
    ├── ext/minhook/                    Vendored MinHook (trampoline hooking library)
    ├── releases/                       Ready .dll for different depots (14167, 24134959)
    └── scripts/                        auto_adapt_new_depot.ps1 — pipeline for a new depot
```

### History

Previously, this directory contained several parallel reverse initiatives:

- `FuckVacV2Source/` — intermediate modular skeleton
- `very very small sourceof detour/` — third-party reconstruction
- `plugin/safety/insecure_guard.*` — speculative defense, unconfirmed in the original

All consolidated into `VacLiveBypass/` in July 2026. The final project is a monolithic port with byte-verified RVAs and multi-depot manifest.

History of consolidation is described in detail in [`VacLiveBypass/README.md`](VacLiveBypass/README.md).

### Build

```powershell
cd VacLiveBypass

# Live depot (24134959):
cmake -B build -DFVA_TARGET_DEPOT=24134959
cmake --build build --config Release --target fva_recon

# Baseline (14167):
cmake -B build_baseline -DFVA_TARGET_DEPOT=14167
cmake --build build_baseline --config Release --target fva_recon
```

Ready binaries for both depots are in `VacLiveBypass/releases/`.

### Injection

For injection use `source/tools/CS2UnifiedInjector/` (11 methods, including kernel via `CS2HexSyncCompatDriver`), or the ready standalone launcher from `build/kit_kernel_inject/` — double-click on `Launch-Inject.bat` and the pipeline will raise the kernel-driver, do DSE-off, inject the DLL and restore DSE.

### License and purpose

Research-only. Not for use on Valve live servers. See root [`LICENSE`](../../LICENSE) and [`docs/ETHICS.md`](../../docs/ETHICS.md).

---

## Русский

Содержит все injected-DLL проекты для CS2. На сегодняшний день — **один** активный проект: `VacLiveBypass` (реконструкция `FuckVacAgain.dll`).

### Проекты

| Проект | Выход | Описание |
|---|---|---|
| [`VacLiveBypass/`](VacLiveBypass/) | `fva_recon.dll` | 1:1 реконструкция VMProtect-обфусцированного `FuckVacAgain.dll`. Модифицирует `CBaseUserCmdPB.input_history` до wire-сериализации через три MinHook-детура. |

Все детали: [`VacLiveBypass/README.md`](VacLiveBypass/README.md).

### Раскладка

```
source/dlls/
├── README.md                           (этот файл)
└── VacLiveBypass/
    ├── CMakeLists.txt                  Сборка через CMake + MSVC
    ├── README.md                       Подробное описание проекта
    ├── src/                            Исходники
    │   ├── dllmain.cpp                 Entry point + install/uninstall pipeline
    │   ├── version_manifest.h          Все RVA / offset'ы / md5 / build fingerprints
    │   ├── core/                       signature_scanner, convar, logf, debug
    │   ├── valve/                      Layout CBaseUserCmdPB, client_input, protobuf_alloc
    │   ├── features/                   cvar_suppress, console_exec, isvalveds_check
    │   ├── hooks/                      Hook A/B/C + phase_b2 (Section-J emitter) + engine2 bindings
    │   ├── patterns/                   139 sig-scan паттернов
    │   ├── include/                    CS2 struct типы (offsets из cs2-dumper)
    │   └── tests/                      self_check + detect_build
    ├── ext/minhook/                    Vendored MinHook (trampoline hooking library)
    ├── releases/                       Готовые .dll под разные depot'ы (14167, 24134959)
    └── scripts/                        auto_adapt_new_depot.ps1 — pipeline для нового depot
```

### Что было

Ранее в этой директории лежало несколько параллельных reverse-инициатив:

- `FuckVacV2Source/` — промежуточный modular skeleton
- `very very small sourceof detour/` — third-party реконструкция
- `plugin/safety/insecure_guard.*` — спекулятивная защита, не подтверждённая в оригинале

Все они консолидированы в `VacLiveBypass/` в июле 2026. Финальный проект — единый монолитный порт с byte-verified RVAs и multi-depot manifest.

История консолидации детально описана в [`VacLiveBypass/README.md`](VacLiveBypass/README.md).

### Сборка

```powershell
cd VacLiveBypass

# Live depot (24134959):
cmake -B build -DFVA_TARGET_DEPOT=24134959
cmake --build build --config Release --target fva_recon

# Baseline (14167):
cmake -B build_baseline -DFVA_TARGET_DEPOT=14167
cmake --build build_baseline --config Release --target fva_recon
```

Готовые бинарники под оба depot'а лежат в `VacLiveBypass/releases/`.

### Инжект

Для инжекта используйте `source/tools/CS2UnifiedInjector/` (11 методов, включая kernel через `CS2HexSyncCompatDriver`), либо готовый стендэлон-launcher из `build/kit_kernel_inject/` — двойной клик по `Launch-Inject.bat` и pipeline сам поднимет kernel-driver, выполнит DSE-off, инжектнет DLL и восстановит DSE.

### Лицензия и назначение

Research-only. Не для использования на live-серверах Valve. См. корневой [`LICENSE`](../../LICENSE) и [`docs/ETHICS.md`](../../docs/ETHICS.md).

```

`source/dlls/SafetyPlugin_recovered/DEVIRT_STATUS.md`:

```md
# Devirtualization Status

**[EN](#english) · [RU / Русский](#русский)**

---

## English

Per-module recovery confidence, current as of 2026-07-16.
Source of truth: `rebuild.i64` (Scylla-unpacked FuckVacAgain.dll dump) + Colby57 Triton+Z3 p-code-to-p-code trace.

### Legend

- **CONFIRMED** — decompiled body matches a live-dump install site AND the semantics are cross-validated against the VLB port.
- **PLAUSIBLE** — signature/behavioral match but at least one cross-check (live install site, VLB parity, or full decompile) is missing.
- **UNCONFIRMED** — no live install evidence and/or Hex-Rays failed on the containing function; carrying forward from prior work only.
- **VMP-BLOCKED** — function body is inside .#I5 / .#?n and still virtualized; only I/O behavior is known.

### Modules

#### hooks/create_move_hook.pseudo.cpp — H1_CreateMove

- **Confidence:** **CONFIRMED (runtime-verified 2026-07-16)**
- **Target:** client.dll+0xACEF90 (live) / **+0xB09528 (current depot, verified in cs2 PID 53000 memory — unique 1-hit)**
- **FVA symbol:** sub_7FFBE80C9D8C
- **Install:** inline 5-byte JMP rel32 `E9 4B 20 52 FF`, orig `85 D2 0F 85 85` (fulldiff_client_dll.csv row 2)
- **VLB counterpart:** `create_move_hook.cpp` (1:1 port; adds SEH + engine2_stable + FVA_GATE_MODE_ATTACK toggles not present in FVA)
- **Gate:** byte_7FFBE823A9A0 (armed != 0) gates the Section-J angle-fixup subpath at 0x7FFBE80CA6B4
- **Notes:** hosts the TLS-once/FNV1a init at 0x7FFBE80CA00B that first writes gate byte from decrypted RVA cache `dword_7FFBE823A9CC` (key 0xB6E8F068409FEF6C).

#### hooks/level_init_hook.pseudo.cpp — H2_LevelInit

- **Confidence:** **CONFIRMED (runtime-verified 2026-07-16)**
- **Target:** client.dll+0xAFDFB0 (live) / **+0xB3A600 (current depot, verified in cs2 PID 53000 memory — unique 1-hit at RVA 0xB3A600)**
- **FVA symbol:** IGameSystem::LevelInit dispatch (FVA-labeled 'CreateSwapChain' decoy)
- **Install:** inline 5-byte JMP rel32 `E9 DE 2F 4F FF`, orig `40 55 56 41 56` (fulldiff_client_dll.csv row 3)
- **VLB counterpart:** `level_init_hook.cpp` (calls g_original first, matches FVA order; workflow wq0rgtslf audit parity confirmed)
- **Gate:** n/a (unconditional)
- **Post-original actions:** game_state::force_reresolve + alt_symbol_reset (byte_A97C=0 gate).

#### hooks/serialize_to_array_hook.pseudo.cpp — H3_SerializePartialToArray

- **Confidence:** **CONFIRMED (runtime-verified 2026-07-16)**
- **Target:** client.dll+0x1189930 (live) / +0x11AD4E0 (source comment) / **+0x11AD520 (current runtime — +0x40 drift from source comment on build 14170; VLB pattern-scan resolves it automatically)**
- **FVA symbol:** CBaseUserCmdPB::SerializePartialToArray (usercmd.pb.cpp:1891)
- **Install:** inline 5-byte JMP rel32 `E9 1E 76 E6 FE`, orig `48 89 5C 24 18` (fulldiff_client_dll.csv row 4)
- **VLB counterpart:** `serialize_to_array_hook.cpp`
- **Gate:** capture-only (no mutation); vtable-RVA fingerprint filter distinguishes CBaseUserCmdPB from siblings (LazyString wrapper broke `GetTypeName`).
- **Related corpus:** CInButtonStatePB dtor sub_7FFBE80F80F0, usercmd MergeFrom sub_7FFBE80F853C (line 507) + sub_7FFBE80F8B4C (line 879).

#### (external) H4_ShouldUpdateSequences — animation_hook.cpp

- **Confidence:** **CONFIRMED (runtime-verified 2026-07-16)**
- **Target:** animationsystem.dll, RVA **0x14F950** (was 0x14EFF0 legacy, +0x960 drift on build 14170)
- **Runtime verification:** Live cs2.exe PID 53000, animationsystem.dll base 0x7ff906070000.
  - VLB sig `48 89 5C 24 08 48 89 74 24 18 57 48 83 EC 20 49 8B 40 48` matched at `base + 0x14F950` byte-for-byte.
  - Pattern-scan across the entire 0xbd9000-byte module returned exactly ONE hit (no false positives).
  - Disassembly of the target function shows a legit MSVC callee-save prologue with a null-check on `[r8+0x48]` — matches the expected shape of a ShouldUpdateSequences dispatch entry.
- **VLB behavior on this depot:** pattern-scanner in `animation_hook.cpp` will resolve automatically to the new RVA (0x14F950) without any code change; the `0x14EFF0` in the source comment is only a legacy hint.
- **Not present in this tree** — flagged in `docs/vlb_gap.md`, but VLB counterpart at `../VacLiveBypass/src/hooks/animation_hook.cpp` is now verified working.

#### core/dllmain.pseudo.cpp

- **Confidence:** PLAUSIBLE (skeleton only)
- **Anchors:** OEP RVA 0x122C, TLS_Callback_0 RVA 0x374254, packer entry 0x3ED6D9, IAT NtProtectVirtualMemory RVA 0x23B020
- **VMP-BLOCKED:** the actual DllMain body chains through the shared dispatcher sub_7FFF424EE1C0 (17+ callers) and tail-returns via sub_7FFF424D44B7 (`pop r10 ; add r10, -0x200EE ; jmp r10`). Only I/O boundary is known: bpdll settle after 8s zero-hits on NtProtectVirtualMemory IAT slot 0x23B020.

#### core/gate_check.pseudo.cpp

- **Confidence:** CONFIRMED
- **Byte:** byte_7FFBE823A9A0 at RVA 0x23A9A0
- **Init site:** 0x7FFBE80CA00B (`mov cl, [rax+rdi] ; mov cs:byte_7FFBE823A9A0, cl`)
- **Check site:** 0x7FFBE80CA6B4 (`cmp cs:byte_7FFBE823A9A0, r13b(=0) ; jz loc_7FFBE80CAA2F`)
- **Semantics:** non-zero enables Section-J angle/input_history reconstruction; zero skips ~900 bytes into loc_7FFBE80CAA2F.

#### core/input_history_spoof.pseudo.cpp

- **Confidence:** PLAUSIBLE (structural)
- **Entry:** 0x7FFBE80CA6C1 (falls through when gate byte != 0)
- **Vtable RVA target:** 0x1A1E028 (CSGOUserCmdPB.input_history vtable)
- **New entry factory:** CSGOInputHistoryEntryPB::New @ 0x742730 (120B) — sig `B9 78` non-unique, requires RTTI disambiguation (see memory: fva-targets-input-history)
- **Helpers observed:** sub_7FFBE80FAD0C (lazy-alloc entry), sub_7FFBE80F6FEC (sub-object deref), sub_7FFBE81B3D60 (fmod-like angle wrap), constants dword_7FFBE82190E8/EC/F4 (180/360/-180 as floats).

### Cross-cutting risks

- **NtReadVirtualMemory self-scan @ 5.6 kHz** — forbids user-mode inline hooks in FVA .text; kernel shadow (`km_driver.c` lazy IOCTL) or HW BPs only.
- **VMP dynamic import resolver** sub_7FFBE82ED25E (1.7 MB) is the only site referencing SetThreadContext/SuspendThread/Thread32First/Next — not decompilable without full VMP unwind.
- **Protobuf method-name strings stripped/inlined** — no code xrefs from `CSGOUserCmdPB`, `SerializeToArray`, `MergeFrom`. Descriptor blobs present at 0x7FFBE8210A00..0x7FFBE82163xx but init function must be pinned by pointer-table scan, not string xref.

---

## Русский

Статус восстановления FVA (SafetyPlugin-Unprotected) по модулям. Каждая запись — confidence-tag + ссылка на VLB counterpart + runtime evidence где применимо. Условные обозначения:

- **CONFIRMED** — декомпилированное тело совпадает и с live-install site, и с VLB-портом;
- **PLAUSIBLE** — сигнатурное/поведенческое совпадение но хотя бы одна из кросс-проверок отсутствует;
- **UNCONFIRMED** — нет live-install evidence или Hex-Rays упал на containing function;
- **VMP-BLOCKED** — тело всё ещё виртуализовано в `.#I5`/`.#?n`, известны только I/O boundary.

Финальный tally (2026-07-16): все 4 target hooks (H1/H2/H3/H4) — CONFIRMED + runtime-verified. H_DynamicResolver — VMP-blocked, но это FVA-internal resolver, не CS2 hook, сравнивать не с чем.

Источник истины: `rebuild.i64` (Scylla-распакованный dump FuckVacAgain.dll) + Colby57 Triton+Z3 p-code-to-p-code trace.

### Модули

#### hooks/create_move_hook.pseudo.cpp — H1_CreateMove

- **Confidence:** **CONFIRMED (runtime-verified 2026-07-16)**
- **Target:** client.dll+0xACEF90 (live) / **+0xB09528 (текущий depot, verified в памяти cs2 PID 53000 — unique 1-hit)**
- **FVA symbol:** sub_7FFBE80C9D8C
- **Install:** inline 5-байтный JMP rel32 `E9 4B 20 52 FF`, orig `85 D2 0F 85 85` (fulldiff_client_dll.csv строка 2)
- **VLB counterpart:** `create_move_hook.cpp` (1:1 порт; добавляет SEH + engine2_stable + FVA_GATE_MODE_ATTACK toggles отсутствующие в FVA)
- **Gate:** byte_7FFBE823A9A0 (armed != 0) гейтит Section-J angle-fixup подпуть на 0x7FFBE80CA6B4
- **Замечания:** содержит TLS-once/FNV1a init на 0x7FFBE80CA00B который впервые записывает гейт-байт из decoded RVA cache `dword_7FFBE823A9CC` (ключ 0xB6E8F068409FEF6C).

#### hooks/level_init_hook.pseudo.cpp — H2_LevelInit

- **Confidence:** **CONFIRMED (runtime-verified 2026-07-16)**
- **Target:** client.dll+0xAFDFB0 (live) / **+0xB3A600 (текущий depot, verified в памяти cs2 PID 53000 — unique 1-hit на RVA 0xB3A600)**
- **FVA symbol:** IGameSystem::LevelInit dispatch (FVA-labeled 'CreateSwapChain' decoy)
- **Install:** inline 5-байтный JMP rel32 `E9 DE 2F 4F FF`, orig `40 55 56 41 56` (fulldiff_client_dll.csv строка 3)
- **VLB counterpart:** `level_init_hook.cpp` (вызывает g_original первым, соответствует порядку FVA; workflow wq0rgtslf audit parity подтверждён)
- **Gate:** n/a (безусловно)
- **Post-original actions:** game_state::force_reresolve + alt_symbol_reset (byte_A97C=0 gate).

#### hooks/serialize_to_array_hook.pseudo.cpp — H3_SerializePartialToArray

- **Confidence:** **CONFIRMED (runtime-verified 2026-07-16)**
- **Target:** client.dll+0x1189930 (live) / +0x11AD4E0 (source comment) / **+0x11AD520 (текущий runtime — +0x40 drift от source comment на build 14170; VLB pattern-scan решает это автоматически)**
- **FVA symbol:** CBaseUserCmdPB::SerializePartialToArray (usercmd.pb.cpp:1891)
- **Install:** inline 5-байтный JMP rel32 `E9 1E 76 E6 FE`, orig `48 89 5C 24 18` (fulldiff_client_dll.csv строка 4)
- **VLB counterpart:** `serialize_to_array_hook.cpp`
- **Gate:** capture-only (без mutation); vtable-RVA fingerprint filter отличает CBaseUserCmdPB от siblings (LazyString wrapper сломал `GetTypeName`).
- **Related corpus:** CInButtonStatePB dtor sub_7FFBE80F80F0, usercmd MergeFrom sub_7FFBE80F853C (строка 507) + sub_7FFBE80F8B4C (строка 879).

#### (external) H4_ShouldUpdateSequences — animation_hook.cpp

- **Confidence:** **CONFIRMED (runtime-verified 2026-07-16)**
- **Target:** animationsystem.dll, RVA **0x14F950** (было 0x14EFF0 legacy, +0x960 drift на build 14170)
- **Runtime verification:** Live cs2.exe PID 53000, animationsystem.dll base 0x7ff906070000.
  - VLB sig `48 89 5C 24 08 48 89 74 24 18 57 48 83 EC 20 49 8B 40 48` matched на `base + 0x14F950` byte-for-byte.
  - Pattern-scan через весь 0xbd9000-байтный модуль вернул ровно ОДНО попадание (никаких false positives).
  - Дизасм target функции показывает легитимный MSVC callee-save prologue с null-check на `[r8+0x48]` — совпадает с ожидаемой формой ShouldUpdateSequences dispatch entry.
- **VLB поведение на этом depot:** pattern-scanner в `animation_hook.cpp` автоматически разрешит на новый RVA (0x14F950) без изменений в коде; `0x14EFF0` в source comment — это только legacy hint.
- **Не присутствует в этом дереве** — помечен в `docs/vlb_gap.md`, но VLB counterpart в `../VacLiveBypass/src/hooks/animation_hook.cpp` теперь verified working.

#### core/dllmain.pseudo.cpp

- **Confidence:** PLAUSIBLE (только skeleton)
- **Якори:** OEP RVA 0x122C, TLS_Callback_0 RVA 0x374254, packer entry 0x3ED6D9, IAT NtProtectVirtualMemory RVA 0x23B020
- **VMP-BLOCKED:** реальное тело DllMain уходит цепочкой через shared dispatcher sub_7FFF424EE1C0 (17+ callers) и tail-returns через sub_7FFF424D44B7 (`pop r10 ; add r10, -0x200EE ; jmp r10`). Известна только I/O boundary: bpdll settle после 8s zero-hits на NtProtectVirtualMemory IAT slot 0x23B020.

#### core/gate_check.pseudo.cpp

- **Confidence:** CONFIRMED
- **Byte:** byte_7FFBE823A9A0 на RVA 0x23A9A0
- **Init site:** 0x7FFBE80CA00B (`mov cl, [rax+rdi] ; mov cs:byte_7FFBE823A9A0, cl`)
- **Check site:** 0x7FFBE80CA6B4 (`cmp cs:byte_7FFBE823A9A0, r13b(=0) ; jz loc_7FFBE80CAA2F`)
- **Семантика:** non-zero включает Section-J angle/input_history reconstruction; zero пропускает ~900 байт в loc_7FFBE80CAA2F.

#### core/input_history_spoof.pseudo.cpp

- **Confidence:** PLAUSIBLE (структурная)
- **Entry:** 0x7FFBE80CA6C1 (падает вниз когда гейт-байт != 0)
- **Vtable RVA target:** 0x1A1E028 (CSGOUserCmdPB.input_history vtable)
- **New entry factory:** CSGOInputHistoryEntryPB::New @ 0x742730 (120B) — sig `B9 78` не уникален, требует RTTI disambiguation (см. memory: fva-targets-input-history)
- **Наблюдаемые helper'ы:** sub_7FFBE80FAD0C (lazy-alloc entry), sub_7FFBE80F6FEC (sub-object deref), sub_7FFBE81B3D60 (fmod-like angle wrap), constants dword_7FFBE82190E8/EC/F4 (180/360/-180 как floats).

### Cross-cutting риски

- **NtReadVirtualMemory self-scan @ 5.6 kHz** — запрещает user-mode inline hooks в .text FVA; только kernel shadow (`km_driver.c` lazy IOCTL) или HW BPs.
- **VMP dynamic import resolver** sub_7FFBE82ED25E (1.7 MB) — единственное место, ссылающееся на SetThreadContext/SuspendThread/Thread32First/Next — не декомпилируется без полного VMP unwind.
- **Protobuf method-name strings stripped/inlined** — нет code xrefs от `CSGOUserCmdPB`, `SerializeToArray`, `MergeFrom`. Descriptor blobs присутствуют на 0x7FFBE8210A00..0x7FFBE82163xx, но init function должен быть закреплён pointer-table сканом, а не string xref.

`source/dlls/SafetyPlugin_recovered/README.md`:

```md
# SafetyPlugin_recovered

**[EN](#english) · [RU / Русский](#русский)**

---

## English

Reconstructed source-code skeleton of FuckVacAgain.dll (a.k.a. SafetyPlugin-Unprotected / FVA), rebuilt from `rebuild.i64` decompilation of the Scylla-unpacked memory dump.

### Purpose

This tree collects everything the devirt pipeline produced across the .#I5 / .#?n VMP payload sections into a single project-shaped layout that can be diffed against the VLB (Visual-Language-Baseline) implementation for parity work.

Nothing here is guaranteed to compile as-is. All `.pseudo.cpp` files carry an "unverified" banner at the top and preserve the original decompiled body inline as reference.

### Layout

```
SafetyPlugin_recovered/
  README.md                                    (this file)
  DEVIRT_STATUS.md                             per-module recovery confidence
  hooks/
    create_move_hook.pseudo.cpp                H1 client.dll+0xACEF90 (sub_7FFBE80C9D8C)
    serialize_to_array_hook.pseudo.cpp         H3 client.dll+0x1189930 (CBaseUserCmdPB::SerializePartialToArray)
    level_init_hook.pseudo.cpp                 H2 client.dll+0xAFDFB0 (IGameSystem::LevelInit)
  core/
    dllmain.pseudo.cpp                         DllMain / TLS_Callback_0 (RVA 0x374254) / OEP (0x122C)
    gate_check.pseudo.cpp                      byte_7FFBE823A9A0 gate init + check
    input_history_spoof.pseudo.cpp             Section-J angle-fixup / input_history reconstruction
  docs/
    playbook.md                                6-day devirt playbook (consolidated 16 deob_docs)
    hook_map.json                              structured hook_targets_found / critical_functions
    protobuf_schema.md                         CSGOUserCmdPB / CSGOInputHistoryEntryPB / CInButtonStatePB schema
    gate_byte_logic.md                         semantics of byte_7FFBE823A9A0 gate
    vlb_gap.md                                 FVA <-> VLB parity gap analysis
```

### Anchors

| item                                | value                              |
|-------------------------------------|-------------------------------------|
| OEP RVA                             | 0x122C                              |
| Packer entry                        | 0x3ED6D9                            |
| TLS_Callback_0 RVA                  | 0x374254                            |
| Shared VMP dispatcher               | sub_7FFF424EE1C0 @ RVA 0x43E1C0     |
| Tail-return handler                 | sub_7FFF424D44B7 @ RVA 0x4244B7     |
| IAT NtProtectVirtualMemory          | RVA 0x23B020                        |
| Rebuild image base (live)           | 0x7FFBE8000000                      |
| Gate byte                           | 0x7FFBE823A9A0                      |
| Hook A body                         | sub_7FFBE80C9D8C                    |
| VMP dynamic import resolver         | sub_7FFBE82ED25E (1.7MB, VMP)       |

### Status headline

- H1 CreateMove: CONFIRMED, 1:1 with VLB `create_move_hook.cpp`
- H2 LevelInit: CONFIRMED, 1:1 with VLB `level_init_hook.cpp`
- H3 SerializePartialToArray: CONFIRMED, VLB `serialize_to_array_hook.cpp`
- H4 ShouldUpdateSequences (animation): UNCONFIRMED (no animationsystem.dll live CSV)
- H_DynamicResolver_Internal: PLAUSIBLE (VMP blob; not decompilable without unwind)

See `DEVIRT_STATUS.md` for the full breakdown.

## Русский

**SafetyPlugin_recovered** — реконструированный source-код-скелет `FuckVacAgain.dll` (внутреннее имя проекта — SafetyPlugin-Unprotected, aka FVA). Извлечён через bulk Hex-Rays декомпиляцию Scylla-распакованного memory dump (rebuild.i64).

### Цель

**Цель этого дерева** — собрать всё что devirt-pipeline произвёл поверх VMP-payload секций `.#I5` / `.#?n` в единый project-shaped layout, который можно diff'ить против VLB реализации при parity-работе.

**Не собирается как есть.** Все `.pseudo.cpp` файлы несут "unverified" баннер сверху и хранят оригинальное декомпилированное тело inline как reference.

### Раскладка

```
SafetyPlugin_recovered/
  README.md                                    (этот файл)
  DEVIRT_STATUS.md                             per-module confidence восстановления
  hooks/
    create_move_hook.pseudo.cpp                H1 client.dll+0xACEF90 (sub_7FFBE80C9D8C)
    serialize_to_array_hook.pseudo.cpp         H3 client.dll+0x1189930 (CBaseUserCmdPB::SerializePartialToArray)
    level_init_hook.pseudo.cpp                 H2 client.dll+0xAFDFB0 (IGameSystem::LevelInit)
  core/
    dllmain.pseudo.cpp                         DllMain / TLS_Callback_0 (RVA 0x374254) / OEP (0x122C)
    gate_check.pseudo.cpp                      byte_7FFBE823A9A0 gate init + check
    input_history_spoof.pseudo.cpp             Section-J angle-fixup / input_history reconstruction
  docs/
    playbook.md                                6-day devirt playbook (16 deob_docs консолидировано)
    hook_map.json                              структурированные hook_targets_found / critical_functions
    protobuf_schema.md                         Схема CSGOUserCmdPB / CSGOInputHistoryEntryPB / CInButtonStatePB
    gate_byte_logic.md                         Семантика гейт-байта byte_7FFBE823A9A0
    vlb_gap.md                                 Parity gap анализ FVA ↔ VLB
```

- **H2 LevelInit** — CONFIRMED, 1:1 с VLB `level_init_hook.cpp` (runtime-verified)
- **H3 SerializePartialToArray** — CONFIRMED, 1:1 с VLB `serialize_to_array_hook.cpp` (runtime-verified, +0x40 drift auto-handled)
- **H4 ShouldUpdateSequences** — CONFIRMED, 1:1 с VLB `animation_hook.cpp` (runtime-verified, +0x960 drift auto-handled)
