    ExFreePoolWithTag(buf, POOL_TAG);
    return proc;
}

static PVOID GetModuleBaseInTarget(PEPROCESS Process, UNICODE_STRING Name,
                                   PULONG OutSize)
{
    if (OutSize) *OutSize = 0;
    if (!Process) return NULL;
    if (KeGetCurrentIrql() > PASSIVE_LEVEL) return NULL;
    if (InterlockedOr(&g_cs2Exiting, 0)) return NULL;
    if (PsGetProcessExitStatus(Process) != STATUS_PENDING) return NULL;

    PPEB_S pebAddr = (PPEB_S)PsGetProcessPeb(Process);
    if (!pebAddr) return NULL;

    PVOID base = NULL;
    __try {
        PEB_S peb = {};
        if (!NT_SUCCESS(ReadProcMem(Process, pebAddr, &peb, sizeof(peb))))
            return NULL;
        if (!peb.Ldr) return NULL;

        PEB_LDR_DATA_S ldr = {};
        if (!NT_SUCCESS(ReadProcMem(Process, peb.Ldr, &ldr, sizeof(ldr))))
            return NULL;

        PLIST_ENTRY head = &peb.Ldr->InLoadOrderModuleList;
        PLIST_ENTRY curN = ldr.InLoadOrderModuleList.Flink;
        for (ULONG i = 0; i < 512 && curN && curN != head; i++) {
            LDR_DATA_TABLE_ENTRY_S e = {};
            PVOID entryAddr = CONTAINING_RECORD(curN, LDR_DATA_TABLE_ENTRY_S, InLoadOrderLinks);
            if (!NT_SUCCESS(ReadProcMem(Process, entryAddr, &e, sizeof(e))))
                break;
            if (e.BaseDllName.Length && e.BaseDllName.Buffer) {
                WCHAR nbuf[64] = {};
                SIZE_T nb = min((SIZE_T)e.BaseDllName.Length, sizeof(nbuf) - sizeof(WCHAR));
                if (NT_SUCCESS(ReadProcMem(Process, e.BaseDllName.Buffer, nbuf, nb))) {
                    UNICODE_STRING en;
                    en.Buffer        = nbuf;
                    en.Length        = (USHORT)nb;
                    en.MaximumLength = sizeof(nbuf);
                    if (RtlCompareUnicodeString(&en, &Name, TRUE) == 0) {
                        base = e.DllBase;
                        if (OutSize) *OutSize = e.SizeOfImage;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
            curN = e.InLoadOrderLinks.Flink;
        }
    } __except (EXCEPTION_EXECUTE_HANDLER) {
        LOG_WARN("GetModuleBaseInTarget SEH 0x%X", GetExceptionCode());
        base = NULL;
    }
    return base;
}

// ============================================================================
// Pattern scan. Reads client.dll memory in chunks and applies the masked
// signature. Returns 0 if not found.
// ============================================================================
#define SCAN_CHUNK_BYTES   (64 * 1024)

static ULONG_PTR ScanPattern(PEPROCESS proc, PVOID base, ULONG sizeOfImage)
{
    if (!proc || !base || !sizeOfImage) return 0;
    if (sizeOfImage > 0x10000000) sizeOfImage = 0x10000000; // sanity 256 MB

    ULONG patLen = g_PatLen;
    if (patLen == 0 || patLen > RANKSPOOF_PATTERN_MAX_LEN) {
        LOG_ERROR("ScanPattern: invalid g_PatLen=%u", patLen);
        return 0;
    }

    PUCHAR buf = (PUCHAR)ExAllocatePool2(POOL_FLAG_NON_PAGED,
                                         SCAN_CHUNK_BYTES + patLen,
                                         POOL_TAG);
    if (!buf) return 0;

    ULONG_PTR found = 0;
    ULONG pos = 0;
    while (pos < sizeOfImage) {
        if (StopRequested()) break;
        if (InterlockedOr(&g_cs2Exiting, 0)) break;

        ULONG chunk = sizeOfImage - pos;
        if (chunk > SCAN_CHUNK_BYTES) chunk = SCAN_CHUNK_BYTES;
        ULONG readSize = chunk + patLen;
        if (pos + readSize > sizeOfImage) readSize = sizeOfImage - pos;

        NTSTATUS rs = ReadProcMem(proc,
                                   (PVOID)((ULONG_PTR)base + pos),
                                   buf, readSize);
        if (!NT_SUCCESS(rs)) {
            // Unreadable region (e.g. discardable .reloc / unmapped). Skip
            // past it instead of bailing -- gaps inside cs2 client.dll
            // happen on some maps.
            pos += chunk;
            continue;
        }

        ULONG scanEnd = (readSize >= patLen)
                      ? (readSize - patLen) : 0;
        for (ULONG i = 0; i <= scanEnd; i++) {
            BOOLEAN ok = TRUE;
            for (ULONG j = 0; j < patLen; j++) {
                if (g_PatMask[j] && buf[i + j] != g_PatBytes[j]) { ok = FALSE; break; }
            }
            if (ok) {
                found = (ULONG_PTR)base + pos + i;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (found) break;
        pos += chunk;
    }

    ExFreePoolWithTag(buf, POOL_TAG);
    return found;
}

// ============================================================================
// Registry-driven pattern / RVA override.
//
// Consulted once at DriverEntry from
//   \Registry\Machine\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\CS2RankSpoofer
//   * Pattern       REG_BINARY  raw bytes of the callsite signature
//   * PatternMask   REG_BINARY  1 byte per Pattern byte, non-zero = must match,
//                               0 = wildcard. MUST be same length as Pattern.
//   * ClientDllRva  REG_QWORD   optional: client.dll-relative offset of the
//                               CALL instruction (byte 0 == 0xE8). Used as
//                               fallback if the pattern scan misses.
//
// All three keys are optional. Missing keys are non-fatal -- the compiled-in
// pattern is used. A malformed override falls back cleanly to the default.
// ============================================================================
static VOID InitDefaultPattern(void) {
    RtlZeroMemory(g_PatBytes, sizeof(g_PatBytes));
    RtlZeroMemory(g_PatMask,  sizeof(g_PatMask));
    RtlCopyMemory(g_PatBytes, g_PatBytesDefault, sizeof(g_PatBytesDefault));
    for (ULONG i = 0; i < RANKSPOOF_PATTERN_DEFAULT_LEN; i++)
        g_PatMask[i] = g_PatMaskDefault[i];
    g_PatLen        = RANKSPOOF_PATTERN_DEFAULT_LEN;
    g_ResolvedVia   = "default-pattern";
    g_ClientDllRvaFallback = 0;
}

static NTSTATUS ReadRegBinary(HANDLE key, LPCWSTR valueName,
                              PUCHAR outBuf, ULONG outCap, PULONG outLen)
{
    if (outLen) *outLen = 0;
    if (!key || !valueName || !outBuf || !outCap) return STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER;

    UNICODE_STRING uName; RtlInitUnicodeString(&uName, valueName);
    ULONG needed = 0;
    NTSTATUS st = ZwQueryValueKey(key, &uName, KeyValuePartialInformation,
                                   NULL, 0, &needed);
    if (st != STATUS_BUFFER_TOO_SMALL && st != STATUS_BUFFER_OVERFLOW)
        return NT_SUCCESS(st) ? STATUS_UNSUCCESSFUL : st;
    if (needed == 0 || needed > 0x10000) return STATUS_UNSUCCESSFUL;

    PKEY_VALUE_PARTIAL_INFORMATION info =
        (PKEY_VALUE_PARTIAL_INFORMATION)ExAllocatePool2(POOL_FLAG_NON_PAGED, needed, POOL_TAG);
    if (!info) return STATUS_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES;

    ULONG got = 0;
    st = ZwQueryValueKey(key, &uName, KeyValuePartialInformation,
                          info, needed, &got);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(st)) { ExFreePoolWithTag(info, POOL_TAG); return st; }
    if (info->Type != REG_BINARY || info->DataLength == 0 ||
        info->DataLength > outCap) {
        ExFreePoolWithTag(info, POOL_TAG);
        return STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER;
    }
    RtlCopyMemory(outBuf, info->Data, info->DataLength);
    if (outLen) *outLen = info->DataLength;
    ExFreePoolWithTag(info, POOL_TAG);
    return STATUS_SUCCESS;
}

static NTSTATUS ReadRegQword(HANDLE key, LPCWSTR valueName, PULONGLONG outVal)
{
    if (outVal) *outVal = 0;
    if (!key || !valueName || !outVal) return STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER;

    UNICODE_STRING uName; RtlInitUnicodeString(&uName, valueName);
    // 8-byte aligned scratch buffer sized for the QWORD partial info.
    DECLSPEC_ALIGN(8) UCHAR stack[64];
    ULONG got = 0;
    NTSTATUS st = ZwQueryValueKey(key, &uName, KeyValuePartialInformation,
                                   stack, sizeof(stack), &got);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(st)) return st;
    PKEY_VALUE_PARTIAL_INFORMATION info = (PKEY_VALUE_PARTIAL_INFORMATION)stack;
    if (info->Type != REG_QWORD || info->DataLength != sizeof(ULONGLONG))
        return STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER;
    ULONGLONG v = 0;
    RtlCopyMemory(&v, info->Data, sizeof(v));
    *outVal = v;
    return STATUS_SUCCESS;
}

static NTSTATUS ReadRegDword(HANDLE key, LPCWSTR valueName, PULONG outVal)
{
    if (outVal) *outVal = 0;
    if (!key || !valueName || !outVal) return STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER;

    UNICODE_STRING uName; RtlInitUnicodeString(&uName, valueName);
    DECLSPEC_ALIGN(8) UCHAR stack[64];
    ULONG got = 0;
    NTSTATUS st = ZwQueryValueKey(key, &uName, KeyValuePartialInformation,
                                   stack, sizeof(stack), &got);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(st)) return st;
    PKEY_VALUE_PARTIAL_INFORMATION info = (PKEY_VALUE_PARTIAL_INFORMATION)stack;
    if (info->Type != REG_DWORD || info->DataLength != sizeof(ULONG))
        return STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER;
    ULONG v = 0;
    RtlCopyMemory(&v, info->Data, sizeof(v));
    *outVal = v;
    return STATUS_SUCCESS;
}

static VOID LoadPatternOverridesFromRegistry(void)
{
    // Start from compiled-in defaults; only replace fields we can read cleanly.
    InitDefaultPattern();

    UNICODE_STRING keyPath;
    RtlInitUnicodeString(&keyPath,
        L"\\Registry\\Machine\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\CS2RankSpoofer");

    OBJECT_ATTRIBUTES oa;
    InitializeObjectAttributes(&oa, &keyPath,
        OBJ_CASE_INSENSITIVE | OBJ_KERNEL_HANDLE, NULL, NULL);

    HANDLE key = NULL;
    NTSTATUS st = ZwOpenKey(&key, KEY_READ, &oa);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(st)) {
        LOG_INFO("No CS2RankSpoofer service key (0x%X) -- using default pattern", st);
        return;
    }

    // Pattern + PatternMask (both required together to override).
    UCHAR   pat [RANKSPOOF_PATTERN_MAX_LEN] = {};
    UCHAR   mask[RANKSPOOF_PATTERN_MAX_LEN] = {};
    ULONG   patLen = 0, maskLen = 0;
    NTSTATUS pst = ReadRegBinary(key, L"Pattern",     pat,  sizeof(pat),  &patLen);
    NTSTATUS mst = ReadRegBinary(key, L"PatternMask", mask, sizeof(mask), &maskLen);
    if (NT_SUCCESS(pst) && NT_SUCCESS(mst)) {
        if (patLen == maskLen && patLen > 0 && patLen <= RANKSPOOF_PATTERN_MAX_LEN) {
            RtlZeroMemory(g_PatBytes, sizeof(g_PatBytes));
            RtlZeroMemory(g_PatMask,  sizeof(g_PatMask));
            RtlCopyMemory(g_PatBytes, pat, patLen);
            for (ULONG i = 0; i < patLen; i++) g_PatMask[i] = (mask[i] != 0);
            g_PatLen      = patLen;
            g_ResolvedVia = "registry-pattern";
            LOG_INFO("Loaded registry-override Pattern (%u bytes)", patLen);
        } else {
            LOG_WARN("Pattern/PatternMask length mismatch (%u vs %u) -- ignoring override",
                     patLen, maskLen);
        }
    } else if (NT_SUCCESS(pst) != NT_SUCCESS(mst)) {
        LOG_WARN("Only one of Pattern/PatternMask present -- ignoring override");
    }

    // ClientDllRva -- optional fallback if scan misses.
    ULONGLONG rva = 0;
    NTSTATUS qst = ReadRegQword(key, L"ClientDllRva", &rva);
    if (NT_SUCCESS(qst) && rva != 0) {
        g_ClientDllRvaFallback = rva;
        LOG_INFO("Loaded registry ClientDllRva fallback = 0x%llX", rva);
    }

    ZwClose(key);
}

// ---- Schema offset override -----------------------------------------------
// Consulted at DriverEntry from the same service key as the pattern override.
// All values are optional; any missing one leaves the corresponding
// g_Sch.<field> at its compiled-in default. Any non-zero QWORD (LPC or
// GameRules) flips g_Sch.loaded_from_registry -> TRUE so the console can
// display "registry-driven" vs "hardcoded fallback".
static VOID LoadSchemaOffsetsFromRegistry(void)
{
    UNICODE_STRING keyPath;
    RtlInitUnicodeString(&keyPath,
        L"\\Registry\\Machine\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\CS2RankSpoofer");

    OBJECT_ATTRIBUTES oa;
    InitializeObjectAttributes(&oa, &keyPath,
        OBJ_CASE_INSENSITIVE | OBJ_KERNEL_HANDLE, NULL, NULL);

    HANDLE key = NULL;
    NTSTATUS st = ZwOpenKey(&key, KEY_READ, &oa);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(st)) {
        LOG_INFO("Schema: no CS2RankSpoofer key (0x%X) -- using hardcoded fallback", st);
        return;
    }

    BOOLEAN anyQword = FALSE;
    ULONGLONG q = 0;
    if (NT_SUCCESS(ReadRegQword(key, L"dwLocalPlayerController", &q)) && q != 0) {
        g_Sch.dwLocalPlayerController = q; anyQword = TRUE;
    }
    if (NT_SUCCESS(ReadRegQword(key, L"dwGameRules", &q)) && q != 0) {
        g_Sch.dwGameRules = q; anyQword = TRUE;
    }

    ULONG d = 0;
#define RS_READ_DW(_name, _field)                                      \
    d = 0;                                                              \
    if (NT_SUCCESS(ReadRegDword(key, L##_name, &d)) && d != 0)         \
        g_Sch._field = d

    RS_READ_DW("off_ctrl_CompetitiveRanking",             off_ctrl_CompetitiveRanking);
    RS_READ_DW("off_ctrl_CompetitiveWins",                off_ctrl_CompetitiveWins);
    RS_READ_DW("off_ctrl_CompetitiveRankType",            off_ctrl_CompetitiveRankType);
    RS_READ_DW("off_ctrl_CompetitivePredictedWin",        off_ctrl_CompetitivePredictedWin);
    RS_READ_DW("off_ctrl_CompetitivePredictedLoss",       off_ctrl_CompetitivePredictedLoss);
    RS_READ_DW("off_ctrl_CompetitivePredictedTie",        off_ctrl_CompetitivePredictedTie);
    RS_READ_DW("off_ctrl_MVPs",                           off_ctrl_MVPs);
    RS_READ_DW("off_ctrl_Score",                          off_ctrl_Score);
    RS_READ_DW("off_ctrl_MusicKitID",                     off_ctrl_MusicKitID);
    RS_READ_DW("off_ctrl_MusicKitMVPs",                   off_ctrl_MusicKitMVPs);
    RS_READ_DW("off_ctrl_ClanTag",                        off_ctrl_ClanTag);
    RS_READ_DW("off_ctrl_InventoryServices",              off_ctrl_InventoryServices);
    RS_READ_DW("off_inv_PersonaDataPublicLevel",          off_inv_PersonaDataPublicLevel);
    RS_READ_DW("off_inv_PersonaDataXpTrailLevel",         off_inv_PersonaDataXpTrailLevel);
    RS_READ_DW("off_inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsLeader",   off_inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsLeader);
    RS_READ_DW("off_inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsTeacher",  off_inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsTeacher);
    RS_READ_DW("off_inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsFriendly", off_inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsFriendly);
    RS_READ_DW("off_inv_MusicID",                         off_inv_MusicID);
    RS_READ_DW("off_inv_Rank",                            off_inv_Rank);
    RS_READ_DW("off_gr_QueuedMatchmakingMode",            off_gr_QueuedMatchmakingMode);
#undef RS_READ_DW

    g_Sch.loaded_from_registry = anyQword;
    ZwClose(key);

    LOG_INFO("Schema source=%s dwLPC=0x%llX dwGR=0x%llX ctrl.Rank=0x%X inv.PubLevel=0x%X",
             anyQword ? "registry-driven" : "hardcoded fallback",
             (unsigned long long)g_Sch.dwLocalPlayerController,
             (unsigned long long)g_Sch.dwGameRules,
             g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitiveRanking,
             g_Sch.off_inv_PersonaDataPublicLevel);
}

// ============================================================================
// SHM publishing.
// ============================================================================
static void Publish(unsigned int status, unsigned int cs2Pid,
                    PVOID clientBase, ULONG_PTR callsiteVA,
                    ULONG_PTR callsiteRVA, ULONG_PTR origFnVA)
{
    if (!g_State) return;
    __try {
        g_State->magic = 0;
        KeMemoryBarrier();
        g_State->cs2_pid          = cs2Pid;
        g_State->client_base      = (unsigned long long)(ULONG_PTR)clientBase;
        g_State->callsite_va      = (unsigned long long)callsiteVA;
        g_State->callsite_rva     = (unsigned long long)callsiteRVA;
        g_State->original_fn_va   = (unsigned long long)origFnVA;
        g_State->trampoline_va    = 0;  // Phase 2
        g_State->data_page_va     = 0;  // Phase 2
        g_State->hook_status      = status;
        g_State->driver_tick++;
        LARGE_INTEGER t; KeQuerySystemTimePrecise(&t);
        g_State->last_poll_systime = (unsigned long long)t.QuadPart;
        KeMemoryBarrier();
        g_State->magic = RANKSPOOF_MAGIC;
    } __except (EXCEPTION_EXECUTE_HANDLER) {
        LOG_ERROR("Publish SEH 0x%X", GetExceptionCode());
    }
}

// One-shot publish of protocol_version + schema block. Called once from
// DriverEntry after SHM is mapped and g_Sch is finalized. Uses the magic
// barrier so the console never reads a half-written schema.
static void PublishSchemaAndVersion(void) {
    if (!g_State) return;
    __try {
        g_State->magic = 0;
        KeMemoryBarrier();
        g_State->protocol_version = RANKSPOOF_PROTOCOL_VERSION;

        g_State->schema.dwLocalPlayerController             = g_Sch.dwLocalPlayerController;
        g_State->schema.dwGameRules                         = g_Sch.dwGameRules;
        g_State->schema.controller_CompetitiveRanking       = g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitiveRanking;
        g_State->schema.controller_CompetitiveWins          = g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitiveWins;
        g_State->schema.controller_CompetitiveRankType      = g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitiveRankType;
        g_State->schema.controller_CompetitivePredictedWin  = g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitivePredictedWin;
        g_State->schema.controller_CompetitivePredictedLoss = g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitivePredictedLoss;
        g_State->schema.controller_CompetitivePredictedTie  = g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitivePredictedTie;
        g_State->schema.controller_MVPs                     = g_Sch.off_ctrl_MVPs;
        g_State->schema.controller_Score                    = g_Sch.off_ctrl_Score;
        g_State->schema.controller_MusicKitID               = g_Sch.off_ctrl_MusicKitID;
        g_State->schema.controller_MusicKitMVPs             = g_Sch.off_ctrl_MusicKitMVPs;
        g_State->schema.controller_ClanTag                  = g_Sch.off_ctrl_ClanTag;
        g_State->schema.controller_InventoryServices        = g_Sch.off_ctrl_InventoryServices;
        g_State->schema.inv_PersonaDataPublicLevel          = g_Sch.off_inv_PersonaDataPublicLevel;
        g_State->schema.inv_PersonaDataXpTrailLevel         = g_Sch.off_inv_PersonaDataXpTrailLevel;
        g_State->schema.inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsLeader   = g_Sch.off_inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsLeader;
        g_State->schema.inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsTeacher  = g_Sch.off_inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsTeacher;
        g_State->schema.inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsFriendly = g_Sch.off_inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsFriendly;
        g_State->schema.inv_MusicID                         = g_Sch.off_inv_MusicID;
        g_State->schema.inv_Rank                            = g_Sch.off_inv_Rank;
        g_State->schema.gamerules_QueuedMatchmakingMode     = g_Sch.off_gr_QueuedMatchmakingMode;
        g_State->schema.source_is_registry                  = g_Sch.loaded_from_registry ? 1 : 0;

        KeMemoryBarrier();
        g_State->magic = RANKSPOOF_MAGIC;
    } __except (EXCEPTION_EXECUTE_HANDLER) {
        LOG_ERROR("PublishSchemaAndVersion SEH 0x%X", GetExceptionCode());
    }
}

// Reads *(void**)(clientBase + g_Sch.dwLocalPlayerController) to get the
// current CCSPlayerController*; if non-null, also reads
// *(void**)(ctrl + g_Sch.off_ctrl_InventoryServices) to get the
// InventoryServices sub-object, and *(void**)(clientBase + dwGameRules)
// to get C_CSGameRules*. All reads are SEH-guarded via ReadProcMem.
//
// Returns STATUS_SUCCESS if ctrl is non-null (a valid game session is up).
// outInv / outGr may be NULL individually when the game state is early
// (main menu w/o inventory service resolved, or no active game rules yet);
// callers must tolerate that.
static NTSTATUS ResolveLocalPlayerController(PEPROCESS proc, PVOID clientBase,
                                              PVOID* outCtrl, PVOID* outInv, PVOID* outGr)
{
    if (outCtrl) *outCtrl = NULL;
    if (outInv)  *outInv  = NULL;
    if (outGr)   *outGr   = NULL;
    if (!proc || !clientBase || !outCtrl) return STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER;
    if (g_Sch.dwLocalPlayerController == 0) return STATUS_NOT_FOUND;

    PVOID ctrl = NULL;
    PVOID inv  = NULL;
    PVOID gr   = NULL;

    __try {
        NTSTATUS rs = ReadProcMem(proc,
            (PVOID)((ULONG_PTR)clientBase + g_Sch.dwLocalPlayerController),
            &ctrl, sizeof(ctrl));
        if (!NT_SUCCESS(rs) || !IsAddrValid(ctrl)) ctrl = NULL;

        if (ctrl && g_Sch.off_ctrl_InventoryServices != 0) {
            rs = ReadProcMem(proc,
                (PVOID)((ULONG_PTR)ctrl + g_Sch.off_ctrl_InventoryServices),
                &inv, sizeof(inv));
            if (!NT_SUCCESS(rs) || !IsAddrValid(inv)) inv = NULL;
        }

        if (g_Sch.dwGameRules != 0) {
            rs = ReadProcMem(proc,
                (PVOID)((ULONG_PTR)clientBase + g_Sch.dwGameRules),
                &gr, sizeof(gr));
            if (!NT_SUCCESS(rs) || !IsAddrValid(gr)) gr = NULL;
        }
    } __except (EXCEPTION_EXECUTE_HANDLER) {
        LOG_WARN("ResolveLPC SEH 0x%X", GetExceptionCode());
        ctrl = NULL; inv = NULL; gr = NULL;
    }

    *outCtrl = ctrl;
    if (outInv) *outInv = inv;
    if (outGr)  *outGr  = gr;

    return ctrl ? STATUS_SUCCESS : STATUS_NOT_FOUND;
}

// Snapshots the user-owned RANKSPOOF_STATE (mode/profile/matchmaking blocks
// + freeze_mask + write_generation) then fans the enabled fields out into
// cs2's process memory via WriteProcMem. Per-block gating obeys freeze_mask:
// a block gets written when block.enabled != 0 OR the matching FRZ_* bit is set.
//
// Returns the number of individual write ops that succeeded; total failures
// are accumulated into *outErrors. Skips any field whose OFFSET is 0
// (== "not configured, don't touch") so a partial registry override remains
// safe.
static ULONG WriteEnabledFields(PEPROCESS proc, PVOID ctrl, PVOID inv, PVOID gr,
                                 const RANKSPOOF_STATE* live, PULONG outErrors)
{
    if (outErrors) *outErrors = 0;
    if (!proc || !ctrl || !live) return 0;

    // Local snapshot -- avoid reading the live SHM while console might be
    // writing. KeMemoryBarrier around the copy so the compiler can't reorder
    // reads across; magic check is a lightweight torn-write detector (the
    // console never touches magic, only Publish does, and Publish runs on
    // this same thread -- so this is really guarding against SEH mid-copy).
    RANKSPOOF_MODE         snapPremier     = {};
    RANKSPOOF_MODE         snapWingman     = {};
    RANKSPOOF_MODE         snapCompetitive = {};
    RANKSPOOF_PROFILE      snapProfile     = {};
    RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING  snapMm          = {};
    unsigned int           snapFreezeMask  = 0;

    __try {
        KeMemoryBarrier();
        snapPremier     = live->premier;
        snapWingman     = live->wingman;
        snapCompetitive = live->competitive;
        snapProfile     = live->profile;
        snapMm          = live->matchmaking;
        snapFreezeMask  = live->freeze_mask;
        KeMemoryBarrier();
    } __except (EXCEPTION_EXECUTE_HANDLER) {
        LOG_WARN("Snapshot SEH 0x%X", GetExceptionCode());
        return 0;
    }

    ULONG wrote = 0;
    ULONG errs  = 0;

#define WR_INT32(_base, _off, _val) do {                                    \
    if ((_off) != 0) {                                                       \
        int _v = (int)(_val);                                                \
        NTSTATUS _s = WriteProcMem(proc,                                     \
            (PVOID)((ULONG_PTR)(_base) + (_off)), &_v, sizeof(_v));          \
        if (NT_SUCCESS(_s)) wrote++; else errs++;                            \
    }                                                                        \
} while (0)

#define WR_INT8(_base, _off, _val) do {                                     \
    if ((_off) != 0) {                                                       \
        UCHAR _v = (UCHAR)((_val) & 0xFF);                                   \
        NTSTATUS _s = WriteProcMem(proc,                                     \
            (PVOID)((ULONG_PTR)(_base) + (_off)), &_v, sizeof(_v));          \
        if (NT_SUCCESS(_s)) wrote++; else errs++;                            \
    }                                                                        \
} while (0)

    // ---- Per-mode blocks (rank/wins/predicted-*) ----
    // These are singleton fields on the controller (cs2 tracks one active
    // rank type at a time). If multiple modes are enabled, they are applied
    // in premier -> wingman -> competitive order and the last write wins;
    // this matches how the controller displays a single active rank.
    struct {
        const RANKSPOOF_MODE* block;
        unsigned int          frzBit;
        BOOLEAN               isPremier;
    } modes[3] = {
        { &snapPremier,     RANKSPOOF_FRZ_PREMIER,     TRUE  },
        { &snapWingman,     RANKSPOOF_FRZ_WINGMAN,     FALSE },
        { &snapCompetitive, RANKSPOOF_FRZ_COMPETITIVE, FALSE },
    };

    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        BOOLEAN activate = (modes[i].block->enabled != 0)
                       || ((snapFreezeMask & modes[i].frzBit) != 0);
        if (!activate) continue;

        WR_INT32(ctrl, g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitiveRanking, modes[i].block->rank);
        WR_INT32(ctrl, g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitiveWins,    modes[i].block->wins);

        // For premier mode: an explicit cs_rating_premier overrides `rank`.
        // Writes to the same CompetitiveRanking offset -- last write wins.
        if (modes[i].isPremier && modes[i].block->cs_rating_premier != 0) {
            WR_INT32(ctrl, g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitiveRanking,
                     modes[i].block->cs_rating_premier);
        }

        // rank_type_id per cs2-dumper is uint8; write exactly 1 byte to avoid
        // stomping the adjacent field.
        WR_INT8(ctrl, g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitiveRankType, modes[i].block->rank_type_id);

        // Predicted-{win,loss,tie} share single int32 slots on the controller.
        WR_INT32(ctrl, g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitivePredictedWin,  modes[i].block->wins);
        WR_INT32(ctrl, g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitivePredictedLoss, modes[i].block->losses);
        WR_INT32(ctrl, g_Sch.off_ctrl_CompetitivePredictedTie,  modes[i].block->draws);
    }

    // ---- Profile block (menu / scoreboard cosmetics) ----
    BOOLEAN doProfile = (snapProfile.enabled != 0)
                    || ((snapFreezeMask & RANKSPOOF_FRZ_PROFILE) != 0);
    if (doProfile) {
        // InventoryServices sub-object fields.
        if (inv) {
            WR_INT32(inv, g_Sch.off_inv_PersonaDataPublicLevel,             snapProfile.private_rank_level);
            WR_INT32(inv, g_Sch.off_inv_PersonaDataXpTrailLevel,            snapProfile.private_rank_xp);
            WR_INT32(inv, g_Sch.off_inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsLeader,    snapProfile.commends_leader);
            WR_INT32(inv, g_Sch.off_inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsTeacher,   snapProfile.commends_teacher);
            WR_INT32(inv, g_Sch.off_inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsFriendly,  snapProfile.commends_friendly);
            WR_INT32(inv, g_Sch.off_inv_MusicID,                            snapProfile.music_kit_id);
            // TODO: service_medal_year / service_medal_level / coin_id map to
            // inv + off_inv_Rank[6] slots. Array write not implemented yet --
            // needs proper struct layout (unclear from cs2-dumper: byte size,
            // slot index rules).
        } else {
            errs++;  // profile requested but InventoryServices unresolved
        }

        // Controller-level counters (no inv indirection).
        WR_INT32(ctrl, g_Sch.off_ctrl_MusicKitID,   snapProfile.music_kit_id);
        WR_INT32(ctrl, g_Sch.off_ctrl_MusicKitMVPs, snapProfile.music_kit_mvps);
        WR_INT32(ctrl, g_Sch.off_ctrl_MVPs,         snapProfile.controller_mvps);
        WR_INT32(ctrl, g_Sch.off_ctrl_Score,        snapProfile.controller_score);

        // Clan tag: naive raw-bytes write. Real clan tag is a CUtlSymbolLarge
        // handle into the intern table, so writing the string bytes here
        // typically won't change what other clients see. Warn once so the
        // operator understands why the tag "doesn't work".
        if (g_Sch.off_ctrl_ClanTag != 0) {
            if (InterlockedCompareExchange(&g_ClanTagWarnedOnce, 1, 0) == 0) {
                LOG_WARN("ClanTag direct-write engaged; controller.m_szClan is a "
                         "CUtlSymbolLarge handle -- visible tag may not update. "
                         "TODO: implement intern-table poke.");
            }
            NTSTATUS s = WriteProcMem(proc,
                (PVOID)((ULONG_PTR)ctrl + g_Sch.off_ctrl_ClanTag),
                snapProfile.clan_tag, sizeof(snapProfile.clan_tag));
            if (NT_SUCCESS(s)) wrote++; else errs++;
        }
    }

    // ---- Matchmaking block (C_CSGameRules.m_nQueuedMatchmakingMode) ----
    BOOLEAN doMm = (snapMm.enabled != 0)
               || ((snapFreezeMask & RANKSPOOF_FRZ_MATCHMAKING) != 0);
    if (doMm) {
        if (gr) {
            WR_INT32(gr, g_Sch.off_gr_QueuedMatchmakingMode, snapMm.queued_matchmaking_mode);
        } else {
            errs++;  // matchmaking requested but game rules pointer unresolved
        }
    }

#undef WR_INT32
#undef WR_INT8

    if (outErrors) *outErrors = errs;
    return wrote;
}

static VOID CleanupRuntimeResources(BOOLEAN SignalDone) {
    PKEVENT doneToSignal = SignalDone ? g_DoneEvent : NULL;
    BOOLEAN cleanupOk = TRUE;

    __try {
        if (g_ProcessNotifyRegistered) {
            PsSetCreateProcessNotifyRoutine(ProcessExitCallback, TRUE);
            g_ProcessNotifyRegistered = FALSE;
        }
        ClearTrackedCs2Pid();

        if (g_StateView) {
            MmUnmapViewInSystemSpace(g_StateView);
            g_StateView = NULL;
            g_State = NULL;
        }
        if (g_StateSection) {
            ZwClose(g_StateSection);
            g_StateSection = NULL;
        }
        if (g_UnloadEvent)       { ObDereferenceObject(g_UnloadEvent); g_UnloadEvent = NULL; }
        if (g_UnloadEventHandle) { ZwClose(g_UnloadEventHandle);       g_UnloadEventHandle = NULL; }
        if (g_DoneEvent && !doneToSignal) {
            ObDereferenceObject(g_DoneEvent);
            g_DoneEvent = NULL;
        }
        if (g_DoneEventHandle) {
            ZwClose(g_DoneEventHandle);
            g_DoneEventHandle = NULL;
        }
    } __except (EXCEPTION_EXECUTE_HANDLER) {
        cleanupOk = FALSE;
        LOG_ERROR("CleanupRuntimeResources SEH 0x%X - not signaling done",
                  GetExceptionCode());
    }

    if (doneToSignal && cleanupOk) {
        KeSetEvent(doneToSignal, IO_NO_INCREMENT, FALSE);
        LARGE_INTEGER d; d.QuadPart = -(50LL * 10000LL); // 50 ms grace
        KeDelayExecutionThread(KernelMode, FALSE, &d);
        ObDereferenceObject(doneToSignal);
        g_DoneEvent = NULL;
    }
}

// ============================================================================
// Worker thread.
// ============================================================================
_Function_class_(KSTART_ROUTINE)
VOID WorkerThread(_In_ PVOID Context) {
    UNREFERENCED_PARAMETER(Context);
    LOG_INFO("======= WorkerThread START =======");

    UNICODE_STRING uClient; RtlInitUnicodeString(&uClient, L"client.dll");

    PVOID     clientBase  = NULL;
    ULONG     clientSize  = 0;
    ULONG_PTR callsiteVa  = 0;
    ULONG_PTR callsiteRva = 0;
    ULONG_PTR origFnVa    = 0;

    while (!WaitOrStop(0)) {
        PEPROCESS proc = NULL;
        __try {
            proc = FindProcessByName(L"cs2.exe");
            if (!proc || !IsProcessAlive(proc)) {
                if (proc) { ObDereferenceObject(proc); proc = NULL; }
                Publish(RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_NO_CS2, 0, NULL, 0, 0, 0);
                if (WaitOrStop(2000)) break;
                continue;
            }
            InterlockedExchange(&g_cs2Exiting, 0);
            SetTrackedCs2Pid(PsGetProcessId(proc));
            LOG_INFO("cs2.exe PID=%p", ReadTrackedCs2Pid());

            // Let cs2 finish loading client.dll.
            if (WaitOrStop(1500)) { ClearTrackedCs2Pid(); ObDereferenceObject(proc); break; }
            if (!IsProcessAlive(proc) || InterlockedOr(&g_cs2Exiting, 0)) {
                ClearTrackedCs2Pid(); ObDereferenceObject(proc); continue;
            }

            clientBase = GetModuleBaseInTarget(proc, uClient, &clientSize);
            if (!clientBase || !clientSize) {
                Publish(RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_NO_CLIENT, (ULONG)(ULONG_PTR)ReadTrackedCs2Pid(),
                        NULL, 0, 0, 0);
                ClearTrackedCs2Pid();
                ObDereferenceObject(proc);
                if (WaitOrStop(2000)) break;
                continue;
            }
            LOG_INFO("client.dll base=%p size=0x%X", clientBase, clientSize);

            Publish(RANKSPOOF_HOOK_SCANNING, (ULONG)(ULONG_PTR)ReadTrackedCs2Pid(),
                    clientBase, 0, 0, 0);

            callsiteVa = ScanPattern(proc, clientBase, clientSize);
            const char* resolvedVia = g_ResolvedVia;
            if (!callsiteVa && g_ClientDllRvaFallback != 0 &&
                g_ClientDllRvaFallback < clientSize) {
                // Verify the fallback RVA still points at an E8 CALL before
                // publishing it -- protects against a stale registry value.
                UCHAR probe = 0;
                NTSTATUS ps = ReadProcMem(proc,
                    (PVOID)((ULONG_PTR)clientBase + g_ClientDllRvaFallback),
                    &probe, 1);
                if (NT_SUCCESS(ps) && probe == 0xE8) {
                    callsiteVa  = (ULONG_PTR)clientBase + (ULONG_PTR)g_ClientDllRvaFallback;
                    resolvedVia = "registry-rva-fallback";
                    LOG_INFO("Pattern miss; using registry ClientDllRva fallback");
                } else {
                    LOG_WARN("Registry ClientDllRva fallback byte=0x%02X (not 0xE8) or unreadable",
                             probe);
                }
            }
            if (!callsiteVa) {
                LOG_ERROR("get_rank_data pattern NOT found in client.dll (resolver=%s)",
                          resolvedVia);
                Publish(RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_PATTERN, (ULONG)(ULONG_PTR)ReadTrackedCs2Pid(),
                        clientBase, 0, 0, 0);
            } else {
                LOG_INFO("callsite resolved via %s", resolvedVia);
                callsiteRva = callsiteVa - (ULONG_PTR)clientBase;

                // Read the 4-byte rel32 displacement so we can log the original
                // function address. (Phase 2 will be the place that actually
                // patches the displacement.)
                INT32 disp = 0;
                NTSTATUS rs = ReadProcMem(proc, (PVOID)(callsiteVa + 1), &disp, sizeof(disp));
                if (NT_SUCCESS(rs)) {
                    origFnVa = (ULONG_PTR)(callsiteVa + 5 + (INT64)disp);
                    LOG_INFO("CALL get_rank_data @ VA=0x%llX RVA=0x%llX disp=0x%X orig=0x%llX",
                             (unsigned long long)callsiteVa,
                             (unsigned long long)callsiteRva,
                             (unsigned)disp,
                             (unsigned long long)origFnVa);
                } else {
                    LOG_WARN("Failed to read disp32 at callsite+1 (0x%X)", rs);
                }
                Publish(RANKSPOOF_HOOK_PATTERN_FOUND, (ULONG)(ULONG_PTR)ReadTrackedCs2Pid(),
                        clientBase, callsiteVa, callsiteRva, origFnVa);
                LOG_INFO("Pattern-scan complete; Phase 1.5 direct-write path taking over");
            }

            // ---- inner loop: Phase 1.5 direct-write path -----------------
            // Every tick: resolve local-player-controller from the client.dll
            // global, fan out the enabled RANKSPOOF_MODE / PROFILE / MATCHMAKING
            // blocks into cs2 memory via WriteProcMem, publish stats. Pattern
            // scan results (callsite_va etc.) stay published for Phase 2 info.
            while (IsProcessAlive(proc) && !WaitOrStop(POLL_INTERVAL_MS)) {
                if (InterlockedOr(&g_cs2Exiting, 0)) break;

                unsigned int tickStatus = 0;
                ULONG        wroteCount = 0;
                ULONG        errCount   = 0;
                PVOID        ctrl = NULL, inv = NULL, gr = NULL;

                if (g_Sch.dwLocalPlayerController == 0) {
                    // Mandatory offset missing -- registry was broken and no
                    // hardcoded fallback survived.
                    tickStatus = RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_OFFSETS;
                } else {
                    NTSTATUS rst = ResolveLocalPlayerController(proc, clientBase,
                                                                 &ctrl, &inv, &gr);
                    if (rst == STATUS_SUCCESS && ctrl) {
                        wroteCount = WriteEnabledFields(proc, ctrl, inv, gr,
                                                        g_State, &errCount);
                        tickStatus = (wroteCount > 0)
                                   ? RANKSPOOF_HOOK_WRITING
                                   : RANKSPOOF_HOOK_INSTALLED;
                    } else {
                        // Menu / early game state: LPC not populated yet.
                        // Not an error condition -- just wait for next tick.
                        tickStatus = RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_LPC;
                    }
                }

                Publish(tickStatus,
                        (ULONG)(ULONG_PTR)ReadTrackedCs2Pid(),
                        clientBase, callsiteVa, callsiteRva, origFnVa);

                // v2 stats (Publish only knows the v1 field set).
                __try {
                    g_State->controller_va           = (unsigned long long)(ULONG_PTR)ctrl;
                    g_State->inventory_va            = (unsigned long long)(ULONG_PTR)inv;
                    g_State->gamerules_va            = (unsigned long long)(ULONG_PTR)gr;
                    g_State->write_count            += wroteCount;
                    g_State->write_error_count      += errCount;
                    g_State->driver_write_generation = g_State->write_generation;
                } __except (EXCEPTION_EXECUTE_HANDLER) {
                    LOG_WARN("v2 stats update SEH 0x%X", GetExceptionCode());
                }
            }

            ClearTrackedCs2Pid();
            ObDereferenceObject(proc); proc = NULL;
            clientBase = NULL;
            clientSize = 0;
            callsiteVa = 0;
            callsiteRva = 0;
            origFnVa = 0;
            LOG_INFO("cs2 session ended");
        } __except (EXCEPTION_EXECUTE_HANDLER) {
            LOG_ERROR("Worker SEH 0x%X", GetExceptionCode());
            if (proc) { ObDereferenceObject(proc); proc = NULL; }
        }
    }

    LOG_INFO("WorkerThread cleanup");
    CleanupRuntimeResources(TRUE);
    LOG_INFO("======= WorkerThread EXIT =======");
}

// ============================================================================
// Admin-only DACL (SYSTEM + Administrators).
// ============================================================================
typedef struct _ADMIN_ONLY_SD {
    SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR sd;
    PACL                dacl;
    PSID                adminSid;
    PSID                systemSid;
} ADMIN_ONLY_SD, *PADMIN_ONLY_SD;

static NTSTATUS BuildAdminOnlySd(PADMIN_ONLY_SD ctx) {
    if (!ctx) return STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER;
    RtlZeroMemory(ctx, sizeof(*ctx));
    SID_IDENTIFIER_AUTHORITY ntAuth = SECURITY_NT_AUTHORITY;
    ULONG adminSidSize  = RtlLengthRequiredSid(2);
    ULONG systemSidSize = RtlLengthRequiredSid(1);
    ctx->adminSid  = (PSID)ExAllocatePool2(POOL_FLAG_NON_PAGED, adminSidSize,  POOL_TAG);
    ctx->systemSid = (PSID)ExAllocatePool2(POOL_FLAG_NON_PAGED, systemSidSize, POOL_TAG);
    if (!ctx->adminSid || !ctx->systemSid) goto fail;

    NTSTATUS s;
    s = RtlInitializeSid(ctx->adminSid, &ntAuth, 2);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(s)) goto fail;
    *RtlSubAuthoritySid(ctx->adminSid, 0) = SECURITY_BUILTIN_DOMAIN_RID;
    *RtlSubAuthoritySid(ctx->adminSid, 1) = DOMAIN_ALIAS_RID_ADMINS;
    s = RtlInitializeSid(ctx->systemSid, &ntAuth, 1);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(s)) goto fail;
    *RtlSubAuthoritySid(ctx->systemSid, 0) = SECURITY_LOCAL_SYSTEM_RID;

    ULONG daclSize = sizeof(ACL) +
                     2 * (sizeof(ACCESS_ALLOWED_ACE) - sizeof(ULONG)) +
                     adminSidSize + systemSidSize;
    ctx->dacl = (PACL)ExAllocatePool2(POOL_FLAG_NON_PAGED, daclSize, POOL_TAG);
    if (!ctx->dacl) goto fail;
    s = RtlCreateAcl(ctx->dacl, daclSize, ACL_REVISION);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(s)) goto fail;
    s = RtlAddAccessAllowedAce(ctx->dacl, ACL_REVISION, GENERIC_ALL, ctx->systemSid);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(s)) goto fail;
    s = RtlAddAccessAllowedAce(ctx->dacl, ACL_REVISION, GENERIC_ALL, ctx->adminSid);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(s)) goto fail;

    s = RtlCreateSecurityDescriptor(&ctx->sd, SECURITY_DESCRIPTOR_REVISION);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(s)) goto fail;
    s = RtlSetDaclSecurityDescriptor(&ctx->sd, TRUE, ctx->dacl, FALSE);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(s)) goto fail;
    return STATUS_SUCCESS;
fail:
    if (ctx->dacl)      { ExFreePoolWithTag(ctx->dacl, POOL_TAG);      ctx->dacl = NULL; }
    if (ctx->adminSid)  { ExFreePoolWithTag(ctx->adminSid, POOL_TAG);  ctx->adminSid = NULL; }
    if (ctx->systemSid) { ExFreePoolWithTag(ctx->systemSid, POOL_TAG); ctx->systemSid = NULL; }
    return STATUS_UNSUCCESSFUL;
}

static VOID FreeAdminOnlySd(PADMIN_ONLY_SD ctx) {
    if (!ctx) return;
    if (ctx->dacl)      { ExFreePoolWithTag(ctx->dacl, POOL_TAG);      ctx->dacl = NULL; }
    if (ctx->adminSid)  { ExFreePoolWithTag(ctx->adminSid, POOL_TAG);  ctx->adminSid = NULL; }
    if (ctx->systemSid) { ExFreePoolWithTag(ctx->systemSid, POOL_TAG); ctx->systemSid = NULL; }
}

// ============================================================================
// DriverEntry.
// ============================================================================
extern "C" NTSTATUS DriverEntry(_In_ PDRIVER_OBJECT D, _In_ PUNICODE_STRING R) {
    UNREFERENCED_PARAMETER(D);
    UNREFERENCED_PARAMETER(R);

    if (InterlockedCompareExchange(&g_DriverEntered, 1, 0) != 0) {
        LOG_ERROR("DriverEntry called twice in the same kernel session - REJECT");
        return STATUS_DRIVER_INTERNAL_ERROR;
    }

    LOG_INFO("======================================");
    LOG_INFO(" RankSpoofDriver  " RANKSPOOF_VERSION_STRING);
    LOG_INFO("======================================");

    // Populate g_PatBytes/g_PatMask (defaults, or registry override if present).
    // Safe from DriverEntry: pure ZwOpenKey + ZwQueryValueKey, no process walk.
    LoadPatternOverridesFromRegistry();
    LOG_INFO("Pattern resolver = %s (len=%u, rvaFallback=0x%llX)",
             g_ResolvedVia, g_PatLen, (unsigned long long)g_ClientDllRvaFallback);

    // Populate g_Sch (schema offsets for the Phase-1.5 direct-write path).
    // Also safe from DriverEntry: same key, same simple query flow.
    LoadSchemaOffsetsFromRegistry();

    KeInitializeEvent(&g_StopEvent, NotificationEvent, FALSE);

    ADMIN_ONLY_SD sdCtx;
    NTSTATUS sdStatus = BuildAdminOnlySd(&sdCtx);
    if (!NT_SUCCESS(sdStatus)) {
        LOG_ERROR("BuildAdminOnlySd failed: 0x%X", sdStatus);
        return STATUS_UNSUCCESSFUL;
    }

    // ---- SHM section ----
    {
        UNICODE_STRING shmName;
        RtlInitUnicodeString(&shmName, RANKSPOOF_SHM_KERNEL_NAME);
        OBJECT_ATTRIBUTES oa;
        InitializeObjectAttributes(&oa, &shmName,
            OBJ_CASE_INSENSITIVE | OBJ_KERNEL_HANDLE | OBJ_OPENIF, NULL, &sdCtx.sd);
        LARGE_INTEGER shmSize; shmSize.QuadPart = PAGE_SIZE;
        NTSTATUS shmSt = ZwCreateSection(&g_StateSection, SECTION_ALL_ACCESS,
                                          &oa, &shmSize, PAGE_READWRITE,
                                          SEC_COMMIT, NULL);
        if (NT_SUCCESS(shmSt)) {
            PVOID secObj = NULL;
            if (NT_SUCCESS(ObReferenceObjectByHandle(g_StateSection, SECTION_ALL_ACCESS,
                                                      NULL, KernelMode, &secObj, NULL))) {
                SIZE_T vs = PAGE_SIZE;
                if (NT_SUCCESS(MmMapViewInSystemSpace(secObj, &g_StateView, &vs))) {
                    g_State = (RANKSPOOF_STATE*)g_StateView;
                    __try {
                        RtlZeroMemory(g_State, sizeof(RANKSPOOF_STATE));
                        g_State->hook_status = RANKSPOOF_HOOK_IDLE;
                        g_State->magic = RANKSPOOF_MAGIC;
                        LOG_INFO("SHM ready");
                    } __except (EXCEPTION_EXECUTE_HANDLER) {
                        g_State = NULL;
                        LOG_ERROR("SHM init SEH 0x%X", GetExceptionCode());
                    }
                } else {
                    LOG_ERROR("MmMapViewInSystemSpace failed");
                }
                ObDereferenceObject(secObj);
            }
        } else {
            LOG_ERROR("ZwCreateSection failed 0x%X", shmSt);
        }
    }

    // ---- stop event ----
    {
        UNICODE_STRING evName;
        RtlInitUnicodeString(&evName, RANKSPOOF_STOP_KERNEL_NAME);
        OBJECT_ATTRIBUTES oa;
        InitializeObjectAttributes(&oa, &evName,
            OBJ_CASE_INSENSITIVE | OBJ_KERNEL_HANDLE | OBJ_OPENIF, NULL, &sdCtx.sd);
        NTSTATUS es = ZwCreateEvent(&g_UnloadEventHandle, EVENT_ALL_ACCESS, &oa,
                                     NotificationEvent, FALSE);
        if (NT_SUCCESS(es)) {
            PVOID evObj = NULL;
            if (NT_SUCCESS(ObReferenceObjectByHandle(g_UnloadEventHandle, EVENT_ALL_ACCESS,
                                                      *ExEventObjectType, KernelMode, &evObj, NULL))) {
                g_UnloadEvent = (PKEVENT)evObj;
                KeClearEvent(g_UnloadEvent);
                LOG_INFO("Stop event ready (DACL=SYSTEM+Administrators)");
            }
        } else {
            LOG_ERROR("ZwCreateEvent(stop) failed 0x%X", es);
        }
    }

    // ---- done event ----
    {
        UNICODE_STRING evName;
        RtlInitUnicodeString(&evName, RANKSPOOF_DONE_KERNEL_NAME);
        OBJECT_ATTRIBUTES oa;
        InitializeObjectAttributes(&oa, &evName,
            OBJ_CASE_INSENSITIVE | OBJ_KERNEL_HANDLE | OBJ_OPENIF, NULL, &sdCtx.sd);
        NTSTATUS es = ZwCreateEvent(&g_DoneEventHandle, EVENT_ALL_ACCESS, &oa,
                                     NotificationEvent, FALSE);
        if (NT_SUCCESS(es)) {
            PVOID evObj = NULL;
            if (NT_SUCCESS(ObReferenceObjectByHandle(g_DoneEventHandle, EVENT_ALL_ACCESS,
                                                      *ExEventObjectType, KernelMode, &evObj, NULL))) {
                g_DoneEvent = (PKEVENT)evObj;
                KeClearEvent(g_DoneEvent);
                LOG_INFO("Done event ready");
            }
        } else {
            LOG_ERROR("ZwCreateEvent(done) failed 0x%X", es);
        }
    }

    FreeAdminOnlySd(&sdCtx);

    if (!g_State || !g_UnloadEvent || !g_DoneEvent) {
        LOG_ERROR("Control plane incomplete (state=%p stop=%p done=%p) - aborting",
                  g_State, g_UnloadEvent, g_DoneEvent);
        CleanupRuntimeResources(FALSE);
        return STATUS_UNSUCCESSFUL;
    }

    // Publish protocol_version + schema once. Worker thread only bumps stats,
    // not schema, so a one-shot here is enough.
    PublishSchemaAndVersion();

    NTSTATUS ps = PsSetCreateProcessNotifyRoutine(ProcessExitCallback, FALSE);
    if (NT_SUCCESS(ps)) { g_ProcessNotifyRegistered = TRUE; LOG_INFO("ProcessExitCallback registered"); }
    else                LOG_WARN("PsSetCreateProcessNotifyRoutine: 0x%X", ps);

    HANDLE h = NULL;
    NTSTATUS ts = PsCreateSystemThread(&h, THREAD_ALL_ACCESS, NULL, NULL, NULL,
                                        WorkerThread, NULL);
    if (NT_SUCCESS(ts)) {
        ZwClose(h);
        LOG_INFO("Driver loaded");
        return STATUS_SUCCESS;
    }
    LOG_ERROR("PsCreateSystemThread failed: 0x%X", ts);
    CleanupRuntimeResources(FALSE);
    return ts;
}

```

`source/drivers/CS2RankSpooferDriver/shared.h`:

```h
#pragma once

// Shared header — usable from both kernel-mode driver and user-mode console.
// We intentionally do NOT include <cstdint> here so the kernel build does not
// drag in user-mode <stdint.h>; only built-in language types are used below.
//
// v2 protocol (2026-07-15, "spoof everything"):
//   - Extended RANKSPOOF_MODE with draws + rank_type + cs_rating_premier (append-only)
//   - New RANKSPOOF_PROFILE block (private_rank/XP/medals/music_kit/MVPs/score/clan tag)
//   - New RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING block (queued matchmaking mode)
//   - freeze_mask on RANKSPOOF_STATE — driver re-applies enabled fields every tick
//   - Runtime schema offsets pushed into SHM by Load-Spoofer.ps1 (registry-driven)
//   - Every existing user-mode field kept at the same offset for back-compat with v1 clients.
//   - RANKSPOOF_CS2_DATA extended with infra header (magic/version/generation/hit_count/scratch)

// ---- Object names ----------------------------------------------------------
#define RANKSPOOF_SHM_KERNEL_NAME    L"\\BaseNamedObjects\\CS2RankSpoofState"
#define RANKSPOOF_STOP_KERNEL_NAME   L"\\BaseNamedObjects\\CS2RankSpoofStop"
#define RANKSPOOF_DONE_KERNEL_NAME   L"\\BaseNamedObjects\\CS2RankSpoofStopped"

#define RANKSPOOF_SHM_USER_NAME      "Global\\CS2RankSpoofState"
#define RANKSPOOF_STOP_USER_NAME     "Global\\CS2RankSpoofStop"
#define RANKSPOOF_DONE_USER_NAME     "Global\\CS2RankSpoofStopped"

// ---- Magic + protocol version ---------------------------------------------
#define RANKSPOOF_MAGIC              0x52415358u   // 'RASX'
#define RANKSPOOF_PROTOCOL_VERSION   2u

// ---- Game-mode IDs (as observed in cs2 get_rank_data calls) ---------------
#define RANKSPOOF_MODE_PREMIER       11
#define RANKSPOOF_MODE_WINGMAN       7
#define RANKSPOOF_MODE_COMPETITIVE   1

// ---- Hook / worker status --------------------------------------------------
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_IDLE            0
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_SCANNING        1
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_INSTALLED       2   // direct-write path active (Phase 1.5)
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_REMOVED         3
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_PATTERN_FOUND   4   // Phase-2 trampoline pattern resolved (info)
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_WRITING         5   // actively pushing values into cs2 memory
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_NO_CS2      10
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_NO_CLIENT   11
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_PATTERN     12
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_ALLOC       13
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_WRITE       14
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_PROTECT     15
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_LPC         16   // could not resolve local-player-controller pointer
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_INV         17   // could not resolve InventoryServices sub-object
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_OFFSETS     18   // registry offsets missing / all zero
#define RANKSPOOF_HOOK_ERR_INTERNAL    99

// ---- Freeze bit-mask (RANKSPOOF_STATE.freeze_mask) ------------------------
#define RANKSPOOF_FRZ_PREMIER          (1u <<  0)
#define RANKSPOOF_FRZ_WINGMAN          (1u <<  1)
#define RANKSPOOF_FRZ_COMPETITIVE      (1u <<  2)
#define RANKSPOOF_FRZ_PROFILE          (1u <<  3)
#define RANKSPOOF_FRZ_MATCHMAKING      (1u <<  4)
#define RANKSPOOF_FRZ_ALL              0x0000001Fu

// ---- Per-mode block (Premier / Wingman / Competitive) --------------------
// v1 compatibility: first 16 bytes = original layout (enabled/rank/wins/losses).
#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct _RANKSPOOF_MODE {
    unsigned int   enabled;             // 0/1  (v1)
    int            rank;                // 0..18 (comp/wingman) OR 0..40000 (premier)  (v1)
    int            wins;                // (v1)
    int            losses;              // (v1)
    // ---- v2 additions (appended-only) ----
    int            draws;               // Premier match ties
    int            rank_type_id;        // 0=none, 6=classic-comp, 7=wingman, 11=premier
    int            cs_rating_premier;   // explicit Premier Elo when 'rank' semantics differ (0..40000)
    int            pad0;
} RANKSPOOF_MODE;
#pragma pack(pop)

// ---- Profile block (menu / scoreboard cosmetics) -------------------------
// InventoryServices sub-object fields + controller-level counters.
#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct _RANKSPOOF_PROFILE {
    unsigned int   enabled;
    int            private_rank_level;  // 1..40, InventoryServices.m_nPersonaDataPublicLevel
    int            private_rank_xp;     // InventoryServices.m_nPersonaDataXpTrailLevel
    int            commends_leader;     // InventoryServices.m_nPersonaDataPublicCommendsLeader
    int            commends_teacher;
    int            commends_friendly;
    int            music_kit_id;        // controller.m_iMusicKitID (mirror: InventoryServices.m_unMusicID)
    int            music_kit_mvps;      // controller.m_iMusicKitMVPs
    int            controller_mvps;     // controller.m_iMVPs
    int            controller_score;    // controller.m_iScore
    int            service_medal_year;  // InventoryServices.m_rank[0].year_earned
    int            service_medal_level; // InventoryServices.m_rank[0].rank
    int            coin_id;             // InventoryServices.m_rank[X] slot id
    // Clan tag: 15 chars + NUL. Writable — see driver notes on CUtlSymbolLarge.
    char           clan_tag[16];
    int            pad0;
} RANKSPOOF_PROFILE;
#pragma pack(pop)

// ---- Matchmaking / gamerules block ---------------------------------------
#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct _RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING {
    unsigned int   enabled;
    int            queued_matchmaking_mode; // C_CSGameRules.m_nQueuedMatchmakingMode
    int            pad0[2];
} RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING;
#pragma pack(pop)

// ---- Runtime schema offsets ------------------------------------------------
// Load-Spoofer.ps1 fetches a2x/cs2-dumper HEAD, writes into
// HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\CS2RankSpoofer; driver reads on
// DriverEntry, then publishes into SHM so the console can display "loaded
// from GitHub HEAD" vs "hardcoded fallback". All fields = zero means fallback.
#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct _RANKSPOOF_SCHEMA {
    unsigned long long dwLocalPlayerController; // client.dll global -> CCSPlayerController*
    unsigned long long dwGameRules;             // client.dll global -> C_CSGameRules*
    unsigned int       controller_CompetitiveRanking;
    unsigned int       controller_CompetitiveWins;
    unsigned int       controller_CompetitiveRankType;
    unsigned int       controller_CompetitivePredictedWin;
    unsigned int       controller_CompetitivePredictedLoss;
    unsigned int       controller_CompetitivePredictedTie;
    unsigned int       controller_MVPs;
    unsigned int       controller_Score;
    unsigned int       controller_MusicKitID;
    unsigned int       controller_MusicKitMVPs;
    unsigned int       controller_ClanTag;
    unsigned int       controller_InventoryServices;          // pointer to sub-object
    unsigned int       inv_PersonaDataPublicLevel;
    unsigned int       inv_PersonaDataXpTrailLevel;
    unsigned int       inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsLeader;
    unsigned int       inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsTeacher;
    unsigned int       inv_PersonaDataPublicCommendsFriendly;
    unsigned int       inv_MusicID;
    unsigned int       inv_Rank;                              // int[6] medal slots
    unsigned int       gamerules_QueuedMatchmakingMode;
    unsigned int       source_is_registry;                    // 1 = fresh, 0 = hardcoded
    unsigned int       pad[8];
} RANKSPOOF_SCHEMA;
#pragma pack(pop)

// ---- Top-level shared state -----------------------------------------------
// v1 backward compatibility: magic/driver_tick/cs2_pid/client_base/callsite_va/
// callsite_rva/original_fn_va/trampoline_va/data_page_va/hook_status/
// last_poll_systime and the three v1 mode blocks stay at their v1 offsets.
// New fields are appended AFTER pad[64] (which becomes pad_v1[64] for clarity).
#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct _RANKSPOOF_STATE {
    unsigned int       magic;                // = RANKSPOOF_MAGIC when valid  (v1 offset 0)

    // ---- driver-owned (user reads, never writes) ------------------------
    unsigned int       driver_tick;          // v1 offset 4
    unsigned int       cs2_pid;              // v1 offset 8
    unsigned long long client_base;          // v1 offset 12  (unaligned by design of v1)
    unsigned long long callsite_va;
    unsigned long long callsite_rva;
    unsigned long long original_fn_va;
    unsigned long long trampoline_va;        // Phase-2 (currently 0)
    unsigned long long data_page_va;         // Phase-2 (currently 0)
    unsigned int       hook_status;
    unsigned long long last_poll_systime;

    // ---- user-owned (driver reads, never writes) — v1 ------------------
    RANKSPOOF_MODE     premier;               // mode 11 (32 bytes v2, was 16 v1 — see .cpp static_assert)
    RANKSPOOF_MODE     wingman;               // mode 7
    RANKSPOOF_MODE     competitive;           // mode 1

    unsigned char      pad_v1[64];            // v1 tail — kept for byte-level compat

    // ==================== v2 APPEND ONLY BELOW ====================
    unsigned int       protocol_version;      // = RANKSPOOF_PROTOCOL_VERSION
    unsigned int       write_error_count;
    unsigned long long write_count;
    unsigned long long controller_va;
    unsigned long long inventory_va;
    unsigned long long gamerules_va;

    RANKSPOOF_SCHEMA   schema;

    RANKSPOOF_PROFILE      profile;
    RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING  matchmaking;

    unsigned int       freeze_mask;             // RANKSPOOF_FRZ_*
    unsigned int       write_generation;        // console bumps to force re-apply
    unsigned int       driver_write_generation; // driver echoes last generation it wrote
    unsigned int       reserved0;
    unsigned char      pad_tail[128];
} RANKSPOOF_STATE;
#pragma pack(pop)

// ---- cs2-resident data page (Phase-2 trampoline shellcode reads this) ----
// Kept for FUTURE Phase-2 — driver still does NOT allocate this yet.
// Layout is a stable ABI contract for when the trampoline is written.
#pragma pack(push, 1)
typedef struct _RANKSPOOF_CS2_DATA {
    // ---- infra (validated by trampoline before use) ----
    unsigned int       magic;                // must equal RANKSPOOF_MAGIC
    unsigned int       version;              // must equal RANKSPOOF_PROTOCOL_VERSION
    unsigned int       generation;           // driver bumps per write; trampoline detects torn reads
    unsigned int       reserved0;
    unsigned long long original_fn_ptr;      // trampoline calls original via this indirection
    unsigned long long hit_count;             // trampoline increments per call
    unsigned long long last_call_qpc;         // trampoline stamps QueryPerformanceCounter
    unsigned long long override_mask;         // per-field toggle bitfield

    // ---- data mirrored from RANKSPOOF_STATE ----
    RANKSPOOF_MODE     premier;
    RANKSPOOF_MODE     wingman;
    RANKSPOOF_MODE     competitive;
    RANKSPOOF_PROFILE  profile;
    RANKSPOOF_MATCHMAKING matchmaking;

    unsigned char      scratch[64];           // trampoline register-save scratch
    unsigned char      pad[64];
} RANKSPOOF_CS2_DATA;
#pragma pack(pop)

```

`source/drivers/shared/stealth_mode.h`:

```h
#pragma once
//
// stealth_mode.h — общий header для всех .sys драйверов репо.
// Централизует anti-detection утилиты из KDU + TheCruZ/kdmapper.
//
// Использование:
//   #include "shared/stealth_mode.h"
//   в DriverEntry:
//     Stealth::EraseLoaderTraces(DriverObject);
//
// Все функции опциональны. Не-обнаруживаемые targets могут пропустить.
//

#ifndef _WINDOWS_H_
#include <ntifs.h>
#endif

extern "C" {
    NTKERNELAPI NTSTATUS NTAPI PsRemoveLoadImageNotifyRoutine(PLOAD_IMAGE_NOTIFY_ROUTINE);
}

namespace Stealth {

// ---- Cleanup #1: MmUnloadedDrivers list ----------------------------------
// Windows держит список последних 50 unloaded драйверов. Если наш driver
// был "загружен и выгружен", здесь остаётся запись. Anti-cheat читает это
// через ZwQuerySystemInformation(SystemUnloadedDrivers, ...).
//
// KDU (TheCruZ/kdmapper) чистит через паттерн-скан ntoskrnl!MmUnloadedDrivers
// и обнуляет соответствующую entry.
//
// НЕЛЬЗЯ вызывать напрямую из нашего driver'а — memory этого списка
// защищена от writes. Работает только если запущено из другого драйвера
// (например KDU, который через vulnerable provider уже имеет kernel r/w).
//
inline VOID EraseMmUnloadedDrivers() {
    // Реализация в KDU: Source/Kdu/Source/kdulib/paging.c (см. функцию KduxClearMmUnloadedDrivers).
    // Не портирована в этот заголовок — требует sig-scan ntoskrnl + write в защищённую page.
    // TODO: интегрировать полный KDU-путь как отдельный tool.
}

// ---- Cleanup #2: PiDDBCacheTable ------------------------------------------
// PiDDBCacheTable хранит hash timestamp'ов свежих загруженных driver'ов для
// PatchGuard verification. После manual-map должен содержать нашу timestamp.
// Anti-cheat может проверять этот cache для детекта.
//
// KDU/kdmapper очищают через AVL tree walk + удаление matching hash.
//
inline VOID ErasePiDDBCacheEntry(ULONG /*driverTimestamp*/) {
    // Порт находится в TheCruZ/kdmapper: src/utils.cpp::EraseDriverPiDDBCacheEntry
    // Sig-scan PiDDBLock + PiDDBCacheTable → walk AVL tree → delete entry.
    // Не портирован сюда — требует внешний loader (kdmapper) сделать это ЗА нас.
}

// ---- Cleanup #3: Kernel hash bucket ---------------------------------------
// nt!g_KernelHashBucketList хранит SHA1 hash'и всех загруженных ntoskrnl'ем
// driver'ов (использовано в SHA integrity checks). После manual-map hash
// нашего driver'а может остаться там.
//
// TheCruZ/kdmapper: src/utils.cpp::ClearKernelHashBucketList
//
inline VOID EraseKernelHashBucket(PDRIVER_OBJECT /*drvObj*/) {
    // Тот же паттерн что PiDDBCache — sig-scan + AVL walk.
}

// ---- Cleanup #4: NtQuerySystemInformation SystemBigPoolInformation --------
// Наш driver'ом аллоцированные NonPagedPool блоки видны через
// ZwQuerySystemInformation(SystemBigPoolInformation, ...). Anti-cheat может
// корелировать pool tag с известными пiterns.
//
// Best practice: генерить случайный pool tag на каждый DriverEntry.
//
inline ULONG RandomPoolTag() {
    LARGE_INTEGER now;
    KeQuerySystemTime(&now);
    return static_cast<ULONG>(now.QuadPart) ^ 0xA5A5A5A5u;
}

// ---- Cleanup #5: Hide from PsSet* callbacks -------------------------------
// Если target отслеживает PsSetLoadImageNotifyRoutine, мы можем убрать нашу
// entry перед завершением DriverEntry.
//
inline VOID DetachLoadImageCallbacks() {
    // Only useful when driver actually registered a PsSetLoadImageNotifyRoutine.
    // Наш kdmapper-style driver обычно не регистрирует — noop.
}

// ---- Master: erase all что можем ------------------------------------------
inline VOID EraseLoaderTraces(PDRIVER_OBJECT drv) {
    EraseMmUnloadedDrivers();
    EraseKernelHashBucket(drv);
    // PiDDBCache требует driver timestamp — resolves loader-provided.
}

// ---- Anti-hooking check: verify SSDT/inline hooks -----------------------
// Проверка что критичные kernel APIs (MmCopyVirtualMemory, PsLookupProcess-
// ByProcessId, ZwCreateThreadEx) не хукнуты anti-cheat kernel driver'ом.
//
inline BOOLEAN VerifyApiClean(PVOID apiAddr) {
    if (!apiAddr) return FALSE;
    // Первый opcode типичной функции — 4C 8B DC (mov r11, rsp) или
    // 48 89 5C 24 08 (mov [rsp+8], rbx). Если E9 (jmp rel32) — хук.
    UCHAR opcode = *reinterpret_cast<PUCHAR>(apiAddr);
    return opcode != 0xE9 && opcode != 0xEB && opcode != 0xFF && opcode != 0xE8;
}

// ---- Silent DriverEntry macro --------------------------------------------
// Дебаг-логи в release build'е — trace-source для anti-cheat.
// Все DbgPrintEx в hot path должны быть #ifdef'нуты этим.
#ifndef STEALTH_LOG
#if defined(NDEBUG) && !defined(STEALTH_VERBOSE)
    #define STEALTH_LOG(fmt, ...)  ((void)0)
#else
    #define STEALTH_LOG(fmt, ...)  DbgPrintEx(0, 3u, "[stealth] " fmt "\n", ##__VA_ARGS__)
#endif
#endif

} // namespace Stealth

```

`source/lua_reverse/AW/README.md`:

```md
# VACLiveGuard — реверс Aimware/DevX anti-VAC Lua-плагина

Полностью восстановленная clean Lua-реализация плагина **DevX VAC Live Guard** —
защиты от VAC-детекта для чит-клиента **Aimware CS2**. Оригинал продаётся автором
`Moderator m0nsterJ` на [devx-shop.com](https://devx-shop.com).

Обфусцированный исходник (Luraph v14.2, 207 KB) → чистая 968-строчная Lua-реализация,
проверенная LuaJIT'ом и локальным Aimware sandbox'ом.

---

## Что делает VAC Live Guard

**Автоматически отключает ragebot Aimware'а в опасные моменты**, чтобы игрок
не получил VAC-бан за подозрительное поведение. Это не защита от античит-сканов
памяти — это **behavioral guard**: он смотрит что игрок делает и убирает автостреляние
когда его использование выглядит "неестественно".

### Три сценария срабатывания

#### 1. Игрок нажал `+use` (клавиша E)

**Условие**: в UserCmd.buttons установлен бит `IN_USE` (0x20 = 32).

**Что делает VAC Live Guard**:
- Немедленно выставляет `gui.SetValue("rbot.enable", false)` — ragebot **выключается**
- Показывает верхний-левый угол экрана баннер `"WARNING: Ragebot has been disabled due to unsafe conditions"`
- Баннер держится 4 секунды (сравнивается `real_time() - lastWarning < 4`)
- Следующий тик — если игрок отпустил `+use` — ragebot автоматически включается обратно

**Почему это важно для VAC-safety**: `+use` в CS2 — это дефьюз бомбы, пикап
оружия, взаимодействие с миром. Стрельба в это же время выглядит подозрительно
(нельзя стрелять и одновременно активировать объект). Antichit + human review
могли бы поймать этот паттерн.

#### 2. FFI разрешение не выдано пользователем

**Условие**: `gui.GetValue("lua.luaperms.ffi")` возвращает `false`.

**Что делает VAC Live Guard**:
- Не выходит из работы, но **отказывается защищать ragebot** (`OnCreateMove` bail'ит
  на `if not state then return end`)
- Каждый Draw-tick рисует в центре экрана баннер:
  `"Enable FFI to use VAC Live Guard; Lua Scripts -> Security -> Allow FFI -> Save"`
- Позиция: `(screenW/2, screenH/2.75)` — примерно в верхней трети экрана

**Почему нужен FFI**: плагин через `steam_api64.dll` интегрируется с Steam GameOverlay
для открытия магазина DevX. Также FFI-доступ даёт возможность плагину читать
низкоуровневые Windows APIs (`GetModuleHandleA`, `GetProcAddress`), что необходимо
для anti-VAC внутренней логики.

#### 3. `m_MoveType` игрока изменился (косвенная защита)

**Условие**: каждый тик читается `entity:GetFieldInt("m_MoveType")` (offset `0x525`
в `C_BaseEntity`).

**Что делает VAC Live Guard**:
- Явно **не** реагирует на изменение — просто читает значение
- Это side-effect для Aimware **internal dispatch**: чтение поля keeps Aimware'овские
  internal detection routines активными

**Почему**: Aimware при чтении полей entity через её publik API поднимает свои
внутренние счётчики. Если ragebot просыпается когда MoveType неожиданный
(например, `MOVETYPE_LADDER` во время атаки), Aimware отработает свою внутреннюю
защиту. Наш плагин просто "тыкает" систему чтобы она работала.

---

## Пропуск проверки (когда VAC Live Guard молча пропускает тик)

`OnCreateMove(cmd)` — центральный hook — выходит без действий, если:

1. **Игрок мёртв или не существует**: `player_ready(self) == false` (пешка `entity == nil`
   или `entity:IsAlive() == false`)
2. **Мастер-переключатель выключен**: чекбокс `devx.vacliveguard.enable` не установлен
3. **FFI не резолвится**: `steam_api64.dll` не загружен или его функции не биндятся
4. **cmd = nil**: edge case когда Aimware вызвал callback без UserCmd

Только пройдя все 4 гейта, VAC Live Guard делает свои проверки и решает включать/выключать ragebot.

---

## Полная логика на каждый tick (144 Hz)

```
[Draw callback — вызывается Aimware'ом каждый кадр]
   ↓
onDrawModules[] (по-порядку):
   ↓
1. playerStateModule:OnDraw()
     → entities.GetLocalPawn()  ← кеш пешки локального игрока
     → entities.FindByClass("CCSPlayerController")  ← кеш контроллера
     → entity:GetFieldFloat("m_flFlashOverlayAlpha")  ← флешбенг?
     → entity:IsAlive()
     → entity:GetFieldBool("m_bIsScoped")  ← в скопе?
   ↓
2. screenCacheModule:OnDraw()
     → draw.GetScreenSize()  ← актуальное разрешение
   ↓
3. ffiWarningModule:OnDraw()  ← отрисовка баннеров
     if not player_ready: return
     if not ffiState:
         DrawM0nsterRect(FFI_WARNING) — центр экрана
     if lastWarning ~= 0 and real_time() - lastWarning < 4:
         DrawM0nsterRect(RAGEBOT_WARNING) — верхний угол

[PreMove callback — вызывается Aimware'ом каждый тик 64 Hz]
   ↓
onCreateMoveModules[]:
   ↓
ragebotAutomationModule:OnCreateMove(cmd)
     if not player_ready: return
     if not guard_enabled: return
     if not ffiState: return
     if not cmd: return

     self:GetFPS()  ← "sanity call" для Aimware'ского dispatch'а

     inUse = 32 (IN_USE bit)
     cmdButtons = cmd:GetButtons()
     pressedUse = bit.band(cmdButtons, inUse) ~= 0

     if pressedUse:
         gui.SetValue("rbot.enable", false)  ← ВЫКЛЮЧАЕМ RAGEBOT
         lastWarning = real_time()           ← запускаем 4-сек баннер
         return

     entity:GetFieldInt("m_MoveType")  ← поддерживаем Aimware dispatch

     gui.SetValue("rbot.enable", true)  ← ВКЛЮЧАЕМ RAGEBOT
```

---

## Настройки в меню Aimware

VAC Live Guard создаёт своё окно "DevX VAC Live Guard" (430×170px), где два groupbox'а:

### Левый groupbox: "DevX-Shop.com" (225×100px)

**Реклама магазина автора**:
- Текст: `"Dominate the competition with Aimware\nModerator m0nsterJ's private HvH config\nand Wallbang Helper."`
- Кнопка **"Get HvH Config"** (ширина 90) — при клике открывает `https://devx-shop.com/product/aimware-hvh-config` через **Steam GameOverlay**
- Кнопка **"Get Wallbang Lua"** (ширина 115) — открывает `https://devx-shop.com/product/aimware-devx-wallbang-helper`

### Правый groupbox: "Main" (160×100px)

**Настройки плагина**:
- **Guard Masterswitch** — чекбокс `devx.vacliveguard.enable` (default: false)
- **Background Accent** — ColorPicker `devx.vacliveguard.bgaccent` (default: RGB `159,45,43`, alpha `150`)
- **Text Accent** — ColorPicker `devx.vacliveguard.textaccent` (default: RGB `255,255,255`, alpha `255`)

---

## Стилистика баннеров (эстетика "m0nsterJ")

Оба баннера — `FFI_WARNING` и `RAGEBOT_WARNING` — рисуются функцией `DrawM0nsterRect()`.

Особенности:
- **Пульсирующая прозрачность**: `alpha = floor(sin(real_time() * 4) * 80 + 160)` —
  колеблется от 80 до 240, период ~1.57 секунды. Даёт "дышащий" эффект.
- **Скруглённые углы**: `draw.RoundedRectFill` с радиусом 10 px по всем углам, отступ 10 px
- **Двухслойный рендер**: сначала фон (`bgAccent`), потом текст (`textAccent`) через
  `draw.TextShadow` (текст с тенью)
- **Fallback размера текста**: если `draw.GetTextSize()` не сработал — берётся
  `#text * 8` (8 pixels per char)
- **Шрифт**: `Verdana`, 16pt, скалируется по DPI из `adv.dpi`

---

## Интеграция со Steam через FFI

Плагин **не работает** без разрешения `lua.luaperms.ffi` в настройках Aimware.

### Что резолвится из `steam_api64.dll`

```c
typedef int32_t HSteamPipe;
typedef int32_t HSteamUser;
typedef struct ISteamClient  ISteamClient;
typedef struct ISteamFriends ISteamFriends;

void* GetModuleHandleA(const char* lpModuleName);
void* GetProcAddress(void* hModule, const char* lpProcName);
```

### Функции Steam SDK, к которым биндится (все __cdecl):

| Функция Steam | Возвращает | Назначение |
|---|---|---|
| `SteamClient()` | `ISteamClient*` | Root client interface |
| `SteamAPI_GetHSteamUser()` | `HSteamUser` | Handle текущего юзера |
| `SteamAPI_GetHSteamPipe()` | `HSteamPipe` | Handle IPC pipe |
| `SteamAPI_ISteamClient_GetISteamFriends(client, user, pipe, "SteamFriends018")` | `ISteamFriends*` | Friends interface |
| `SteamAPI_ISteamFriends_ActivateGameOverlayToWebPage(friends, url)` | void | Открыть URL в Steam Overlay |

### Использование

Клик по любой из двух кнопок в left groupbox → `OpenWebPage(URL)` → зовёт
`ActivateGameOverlayToWebPage()` → Steam Overlay поднимается поверх игры и
рендерит браузер с указанным URL.

**Версия интерфейса `SteamFriends018`** — залочена в плагине; более старые
Aimware-билды использовали `017` (без `ActivateGameOverlayToWebPage`).

---

## Всё, что плагин пишет в CVar'ы CS2

**Один CVar** — `engine_no_focus_sleep = 0`, устанавливается через
`client.SetConVar("engine_no_focus_sleep", 0, true)` (третий параметр = sync flag).

**Зачем**: Steam / CS2 при потере фокуса окна замедляют FPS движка (энергосбережение).
VAC Live Guard требует **стабильный tick rate**, чтобы `OnCreateMove` вызывался
регулярно даже во время alt-tab'а. `engine_no_focus_sleep = 0` отключает это замедление.

---

## Структура папки

```
AW/
├── VACLiveGuard.lua       ← 🎯 итоговый чистый порт (968 строк, drop-in ready)
├── README.md              ← этот файл
├── orig/                  ← обфусцированные оригиналы (Luraph)
│   ├── VACLiveGuard.lua   (v14.2, 207 KB)
│   └── vac_live_safe.lua  (v14.0.2, 187 KB — тот же скрипт, старая версия)
├── sandbox/               ← локальный тест-runner (Aimware API mock)
│   ├── aimware_mock.lua   Полный fake Aimware/CS2 API
│   ├── test_runner.lua    Стартовый скрипт
│   └── run_test.bat       Windows launcher (LuaJIT)
├── schema/                ← справочные данные (source2gen, gitignored)
│   └── cs2_sdk/           3748 headers CS2 SDK через source2gen
└── docs/                  ← документация реверса
    ├── ANALYSIS.md        Полный отчёт: как реверсили, что не удалось
    ├── SYMBOL_MAP.md      Таблица восстановленных API/keys/fields
    ├── API_REFERENCE.md   Aimware API (89 endpoints, docs.aimware.net)
    ├── CS2_RECV_PROPS.md  CS2 entity fields
    ├── CSGO_CALLBACKS.md  Aimware callback signatures
    └── original_devirt_reference.lua  Human-devirt reference (2026-06-15)
```

---

## Как использовать

### Как Aimware Lua-скрипт

Положить `VACLiveGuard.lua` в:
```
C:\Users\...\Aimware\aw v5 dlls\lua\VACLiveGuard.lua
```

Enable в `Lua Scripts` menu → появится окно "DevX VAC Live Guard".
Включить чекбокс "Guard Masterswitch" → защита активна.

**Требование**: `Security → Allow FFI = ON`, иначе увидите красный
"Enable FFI to use VAC Live Guard" banner в центре экрана.

### Локальное тестирование (без Aimware / без CS2)

```powershell
cd source\lua_reverse\AW\sandbox
run_test.bat
```

Скрипт запустит `VACLiveGuard.lua` под fake Aimware API (полный mock:
gui/draw/entities/callbacks), симулирует 100 кадров и залогирует все API-вызовы:
- Создание GUI (window, groupboxes, checkbox, color pickers, buttons)
- Регистрация callbacks (`Draw`, `PreMove`)
- Каждый Draw-tick — probe entity fields (`m_flFlashOverlayAlpha`, `m_bIsScoped`) +
  чтение GUI settings
- Каждый PreMove-tick — probe `m_MoveType`, IN_USE check, ragebot toggle

Пример:
```
luajit test_runner.lua ..\VACLiveGuard.lua 100
```

---

## Проверенная полнота реверса

| Что проверялось | Coverage |
|---|---|
| Экспорты `M.*` | **26/26 = 100%** |
| Пространства имён Aimware API | **12/12 = 100%** |
| CS2 entity fields | **3/3 = 100%** (m_flFlashOverlayAlpha, m_bIsScoped, m_MoveType) |
| Steam FFI bindings | **5/5 = 100%** |
| GUI settings keys | **10/10 = 100%** |
| Callbacks | **2/2 = 100%** (Draw, PreMove) |
| LuaJIT syntax check | **PASS** |
| Sandbox runtime (10 кадров) | **PASS** |

Каждый offset CS2 (`0x1c70` для `m_bIsScoped`, `0x525` для `m_MoveType`) сверен
с headers, сгенерированными `source2gen`'ом из живого CS2 (build 24134959).

---

## Только для исследовательских целей

Не запускать против live Valve серверов — [`docs/ETHICS.md`](../../../docs/ETHICS.md).
Реверс сделан для образовательных / security research / bug-bounty целей.

```

`source/lua_reverse/AW/VACLiveGuard.lua`:

```lua
-- ============================================================================
-- VAC Live Guard — FULL production reconstruction
-- ============================================================================
--
-- Cheat / plugin:      Aimware CS2 client (via DevX shop)
-- Original author:     Moderator m0nsterJ (DevX shop)
-- Purpose:             Anti-VAC safety guard for ragebot — auto-disables ragebot
--                      when unsafe conditions detected (+use held, invalid MoveType)
--
-- Source corpus:
--    - orig/VACLiveGuard.lua (Luraph v14.2, 203 KB obfuscated)
--    - orig/vac_live_safe.lua (Luraph v14.0.2, 187 KB obfuscated)
--    - reference/vac_live_safe.old.devirtualized.lua (human devirt, 722 lines)
--
-- Verified against:
--    - CS2 SDK (schema/cs2_sdk/) — 3748 headers via source2gen
--    - Aimware API docs (schema/aimware_docs/) — 89 endpoints via Browser MCP
--
-- Symbol coverage:      26/26 M.* exports (100%)
--                       31/31 Aimware API calls (100%)
--                       3/3 CS2 entity fields (100%)
--
-- Anti-VAC logic:
--   * Reads GetButtons() from UserCmd every PreMove tick
--   * If IN_USE (0x20) held → force gui.SetValue("rbot.enable", false)
--   * Reads m_MoveType from local pawn — used for Aimware internal detection
--   * Shows DrawM0nsterRect warning banner for 4 seconds after ragebot cutoff
--   * On Draw: renders "Enable FFI" warning if FFI perm not granted
--
-- CS2 fields probed (offsets from source2gen v24134959):
--   * C_CSPlayerPawn::m_bIsScoped         @ 0x1c70   bool
--   * C_CSPlayerPawn::m_flFlashDuration   @ ~0x1c40  float32 (or m_flFlashOverlayAlpha, alias)
--   * C_BaseEntity::m_MoveType            @ 0x525    MoveType_t (uint8)
--
-- Aimware GUI keys used:
--   Read:  rbot.master, rbot.enable, lbot.master, lua.luaperms.ffi,
--          adv.menukey, adv.dpi
--   Write: rbot.enable = false (safety cutoff)
--   Save:  devx.vacliveguard.enable / bgaccent / textaccent
--   Cvars: engine_no_focus_sleep = 0 (via client.SetConVar)
--
-- Runtime FFI (Steam GameOverlay integration):
--   * steam_api64.dll → SteamClient / GetHSteamUser / GetHSteamPipe
--   * SteamAPI_ISteamClient_GetISteamFriends → ISteamFriends*
--   * SteamAPI_ISteamFriends_ActivateGameOverlayToWebPage → open shop URLs
--
-- ============================================================================

local M = {}

-- ---- Aimware host imports -------------------------------------------------
--    Documentation: https://docs.aimware.net/lua/csgo/callbacks.html
local callbacks  = callbacks   -- callbacks.Register(name, fn)
local gui        = gui         -- gui.{Window,Groupbox,Checkbox,ColorPicker,Text,Button,Reference,GetValue,SetValue}
local common     = common      -- common.Time() → float seconds
local draw       = draw        -- draw.{GetScreenSize,GetTextSize,SetFont,Color,RoundedRectFill,TextShadow,CreateFont}
local entities   = entities    -- entities.{GetLocalPawn,FindByClass}
local client     = client      -- client.SetConVar(name, value, sync_flag)
local globals    = globals     -- globals.RealTime() → float
local input      = input       -- input.{IsButtonDown,IsButtonPressed}
local buttons    = buttons     -- buttons.IN_USE = 32, IN_JUMP = 2, IN_ATTACK = 1, ...
local game       = game        -- game.buttons = buttons
local bit        = bit         -- bit.{band,bxor,bor}
local interfaces = interfaces  -- interfaces.{steamClient,steamUser,steamPipe,steamFriends}

-- ---- Module-scoped state --------------------------------------------------
local onDrawModules       = {}          -- registered Draw() handlers
local onCreateMoveModules = {}          -- registered PreMove() handlers

-- GUI object handles (populated by setupGuiShell + initGui)
local window, devxGbox, mainGbox
local guardCheckbox, bgAccent, textAccent, infoText
local hvhConfigButton, wbConfigButton

-- Cached entity references (updated every Draw tick via playerStateModule)
local controller                -- CCSPlayerController*
local entity                    -- C_CSPlayerPawn* (local player pawn)
