`source/lua_reverse/AW/sandbox/aimware_mock.lua`:

```lua
-- ============================================================================
-- Aimware CS2 API mock for local Lua-script testing.
-- ============================================================================
--
-- Inspired by fatality_mock.lua (D:\SteamLibrary\...\csgo\fatality\scripts\).
-- Provides a fully-functional local sandbox for Aimware CS:GO / CS2 Lua plugins
-- so they can be run offline for reverse-engineering, unit testing, or CI.
--
-- Key features:
--   * Real event dispatcher (`_mock_simulate_frames(N)` ticks N frames)
--   * Frame timing (m_flRealTime advances by m_flFrameTime each tick)
--   * Fake local player pawn + controller with per-field getters
--   * Full gui.* (Window/Groupbox/Checkbox/ColorPicker/Button/Text)
--   * Full draw.* (GetScreenSize/RoundedRectFill/TextShadow/CreateFont)
--   * Full callbacks.Register that routes into event handler table
--   * FFI shim (safe passthrough to real LuaJIT ffi or noop if unavailable)
--   * String tap: string.char / table.concat / rawset hooks that log any
--     ASCII string longer than 3 chars — used to grab Luraph-decoded constants
--
-- Usage:
--     luajit test_runner.lua [target_script.lua] [frame_count]
--
-- ============================================================================

print("[mock] Loading Aimware API mock environment...")

-- ---- string / rawset / concat taps ------------------------------------
local _seen = {}
local orig_char   = string.char
local orig_concat = table.concat
local orig_rawset = rawset

local function _tap(prefix, s)
    if type(s) ~= "string" then return end
    if #s < 3 or #s > 200 then return end
    if s:find("[\1-\8\11-\31\127-\255]") then return end
    if _seen[s] then return end
    _seen[s] = true
    io.stderr:write("[" .. prefix .. "] " .. s .. "\n")
    io.stderr:flush()
end

string.char = function(...)
    local r = orig_char(...)
    _tap("STR", r)
    return r
end

table.concat = function(t, sep, i, j)
    local ok, r = pcall(orig_concat, t, sep, i, j)
    if ok and type(r) == "string" then _tap("CONCAT", r) end
    return r
end

rawset = function(t, k, v)
    if type(v) == "string" then _tap("RAWSET", v) end
    return orig_rawset(t, k, v)
end

-- ---- Event handler registry -------------------------------------------
-- Aimware calls callbacks.Register(name, fn). We store handlers by name so
-- _mock_simulate_frames can dispatch them.
local event_handlers = {}    -- { {name="Draw", fn=<function>}, ... }

-- ---- Timing (advances during simulate_frames) -------------------------
local timing = {
    m_flRealTime  = 100.0,      -- seconds since load
    m_flFrameTime = 1 / 144,    -- 144 Hz simulation
}

-- ---- Fake entities ----------------------------------------------------
local function make_pawn()
    return {
        IsAlive        = function() return true end,
        GetFieldFloat  = function(_, name)
            io.stderr:write("[FIELD_F] " .. tostring(name) .. "\n")
            return 0.0
        end,
        GetFieldBool   = function(_, name)
            io.stderr:write("[FIELD_B] " .. tostring(name) .. "\n")
            return false
        end,
        GetFieldInt    = function(_, name)
            io.stderr:write("[FIELD_I] " .. tostring(name) .. "\n")
            return 0
        end,
    }
end

local function make_controller()
    return {
        IsAlive       = function() return true end,
        GetName       = function() return "MockPlayer" end,
        GetTeamNumber = function() return 2 end,
    }
end

-- ---- Fake UserCmd -----------------------------------------------------
local function make_cmd()
    return {
        command_number   = 1,
        tick_count       = 1,
        forwardmove      = 0,
        sidemove         = 0,
        upmove           = 0,
        buttons          = 0,
        sendpacket       = true,
        GetButtons       = function(self) return self.buttons end,
        SetButtons       = function(self, b) self.buttons = b end,
        GetViewAngles    = function() return { x = 0, y = 0, z = 0 } end,
        SetViewAngles    = function() end,
        GetForwardMove   = function(self) return self.forwardmove end,
        SetForwardMove   = function(self, v) self.forwardmove = v end,
        GetSideMove      = function(self) return self.sidemove end,
        SetSideMove      = function(self, v) self.sidemove = v end,
        GetUpMove        = function(self) return self.upmove end,
        SetUpMove        = function(self, v) self.upmove = v end,
        GetSendPacket    = function(self) return self.sendpacket end,
        SetSendPacket    = function(self, v) self.sendpacket = v end,
    }
end

-- ---- Aimware `callbacks` module ---------------------------------------
callbacks = {}
function callbacks.Register(name, fn)
    if type(fn) ~= "function" then
        io.stderr:write("[API] callbacks.Register(" .. tostring(name) .. ", " ..
                        type(fn) .. ") — ignored\n")
        return
    end
    io.stderr:write("[API] callbacks.Register(" .. tostring(name) .. ")\n")
    table.insert(event_handlers, { name = name, fn = fn })
end

function callbacks.Unregister(name, fn)
    io.stderr:write("[API] callbacks.Unregister(" .. tostring(name) .. ")\n")
end

-- ---- Aimware `gui` module ---------------------------------------------
local gui_settings = {}      -- key → value  (persisted across GetValue/SetValue)

gui = {}

function gui.GetValue(name, default)
    local v = gui_settings[name]
    io.stderr:write("[GUI_GET] " .. tostring(name) ..
                    " → " .. tostring(v or default) .. "\n")
    if v == nil then return default end
    return v
end

function gui.SetValue(name, value)
    io.stderr:write("[GUI_SET] " .. tostring(name) .. " = " .. tostring(value) .. "\n")
    gui_settings[name] = value
end

function gui.Reference(name)
    io.stderr:write("[GUI_REF] " .. tostring(name) .. "\n")
    if name == "MENU" then
        return { IsActive = function() return false end }
    end
    return nil
end

local function make_gui_object(kind, key, extra)
    return {
        _kind    = kind,
        _key     = key,
        _extra   = extra,
        GetValue = function(self) return gui_settings[self._key] or (extra and extra[1]) end,
        SetValue = function(self, v) gui_settings[self._key] = v end,
        SetWidth = function() end,
        SetPosX  = function() end,
        SetPosY  = function() end,
        SetOpenKey = function() end,
        GetGUIObject = function(self) return self end,
    }
end

function gui.Window(key, title, x, y, w, h)
    io.stderr:write("[GUI_WINDOW] " .. tostring(key) .. " '" .. tostring(title) ..
                    "' @ (" .. x .. "," .. y .. ") " .. w .. "x" .. h .. "\n")
    return make_gui_object("Window", key)
end

function gui.Groupbox(parent, title, x, y, w, h)
    io.stderr:write("[GUI_GBOX] '" .. tostring(title) .. "' @ (" .. x .. "," .. y .. ") " ..
                    w .. "x" .. h .. "\n")
    return make_gui_object("Groupbox", nil)
end

function gui.Checkbox(parent, key, label, default)
    io.stderr:write("[GUI_CB] key=" .. tostring(key) .. " label='" ..
                    tostring(label) .. "' default=" .. tostring(default) .. "\n")
    if gui_settings[key] == nil then gui_settings[key] = default end
    return make_gui_object("Checkbox", key)
end

function gui.ColorPicker(parent, key, label, r, g, b, a)
    io.stderr:write("[GUI_CP] key=" .. tostring(key) .. " label='" ..
                    tostring(label) .. "' color=(" .. r .. "," .. g .. "," .. b .. "," .. a .. ")\n")
    if gui_settings[key] == nil then gui_settings[key] = { r, g, b, a } end
    return make_gui_object("ColorPicker", key, { r, g, b, a })
end

function gui.Text(parent, text)
    io.stderr:write("[GUI_TEXT] '" .. tostring(text):sub(1, 80) .. "'\n")
    return make_gui_object("Text", nil)
end

function gui.Button(parent, label, callback)
    io.stderr:write("[GUI_BTN] '" .. tostring(label) .. "'\n")
    return make_gui_object("Button", nil)
end

-- ---- Aimware `common` module -----------------------------------------
common = {
    Time = function() return timing.m_flRealTime end,
    DecodePNG = function() return nil end,
    DecodeJPEG = function() return nil end,
    RasterizeSVG = function() return nil end,
}

-- ---- Aimware `draw` module -------------------------------------------
draw = {
    GetScreenSize   = function() return 1920, 1080 end,
    GetTextSize     = function(text) return #tostring(text) * 8, 20 end,
    SetFont         = function() end,
    Color           = function() end,
    RoundedRectFill = function() end,
    RoundedRect     = function() end,
    TextShadow      = function() end,
    Text            = function() end,
    Line            = function() end,
    FilledRect      = function() end,
    FilledCircle    = function() end,
    OutlinedCircle  = function() end,
    CreateFont      = function(name, size) return { _name = name, _size = size } end,
    CreateTexture   = function() return {} end,
    AddFontResource = function() end,
    FontList        = function() return {} end,
}

-- ---- Aimware `entities` module ---------------------------------------
entities = {}
local local_pawn       = make_pawn()
local local_controller = make_controller()

function entities.GetLocalPawn()   return local_pawn       end
function entities.GetLocalPlayer() return local_controller end     -- CSGO alias
function entities.FindByClass(cls)
    io.stderr:write("[FIND_CLASS] " .. tostring(cls) .. "\n")
    if cls == "CCSPlayerController" then return { local_controller } end
    return {}
end
function entities.GetByIndex(idx)  return nil end
function entities.GetByUserID(uid) return nil end

-- ---- Aimware `client` module -----------------------------------------
client = {
    SetConVar = function(name, value, sync)
        io.stderr:write("[CVAR] " .. tostring(name) .. " = " ..
                        tostring(value) .. " sync=" .. tostring(sync) .. "\n")
    end,
    GetConVar = function(name) return "0" end,
}

-- ---- Aimware `globals` module ----------------------------------------
globals = {
    RealTime      = function() return timing.m_flRealTime end,
    FrameTime     = function() return timing.m_flFrameTime end,
    TickCount     = function() return math.floor(timing.m_flRealTime * 64) end,
    IntervalPerTick = function() return 1 / 64 end,
}

-- ---- Aimware `input` module ------------------------------------------
input = {
    GetMousePos       = function() return 0, 0 end,
    IsButtonDown      = function() return false end,
    IsButtonPressed   = function() return false end,
    IsButtonReleased  = function() return false end,
    GetMouseWheelDelta = function() return 0 end,
    KeyList           = function() return {} end,
}

-- ---- Aimware constants ------------------------------------------------
buttons    = {
    IN_ATTACK   = 1,
    IN_JUMP     = 2,
    IN_DUCK     = 4,
    IN_FORWARD  = 8,
    IN_BACK     = 16,
    IN_USE      = 32,
    IN_CANCEL   = 64,
    IN_LEFT     = 128,
    IN_RIGHT    = 256,
    IN_MOVELEFT = 512,
    IN_MOVERIGHT= 1024,
    IN_ATTACK2  = 2048,
    IN_RUN      = 4096,
    IN_RELOAD   = 8192,
    IN_ALT1     = 16384,
    IN_ALT2     = 32768,
    IN_SCORE    = 65536,
    IN_SPEED    = 131072,
    IN_WALK     = 262144,
    IN_ZOOM     = 524288,
    IN_WEAPON1  = 1048576,
    IN_WEAPON2  = 2097152,
    IN_BULLRUSH = 4194304,
}
game       = { buttons = buttons }
interfaces = {}
steam      = {}

-- ---- ffi (passthrough or noop) ---------------------------------------
local _ffi_ok, _ffi = pcall(require, "ffi")
if _ffi_ok then
    ffi = _ffi
    -- Real FFI available. Ensure Windows minimum cdefs exist for Steam bindings.
    pcall(_ffi.cdef, [[
        typedef int32_t HSteamPipe;
        typedef int32_t HSteamUser;
    ]])
else
    -- Fallback stub
    ffi = {
        C      = setmetatable({}, {__index = function(_, k) return function() return nil end end}),
        cdef   = function() end,
        new    = function() return {} end,
        cast   = function() return function() return nil end end,
        string = function() return "" end,
        typeof = function(t) return t end,
        sizeof = function() return 4 end,
    }
end

-- ---- Frame simulation ------------------------------------------------
--
-- Ticks the mock forward by N frames. For each frame:
--   1. Advance m_flRealTime by m_flFrameTime
--   2. Dispatch every registered Draw callback (with no arg)
--   3. Dispatch every registered PreMove/CreateMove/PostMove callback (with a fresh cmd)
--
_G._mock_simulate_frames = function(count)
    count = count or 1
    io.stderr:write("[SIM] starting " .. count .. " frames, handlers=" ..
                    #event_handlers .. "\n")
    for i = 1, count do
        timing.m_flRealTime = timing.m_flRealTime + timing.m_flFrameTime
        for _, h in ipairs(event_handlers) do
            local ok, err
            if h.name == "PreMove" or h.name == "CreateMove" or h.name == "PostMove" then
                ok, err = pcall(h.fn, make_cmd())
            elseif h.name == "AimbotTarget" or h.name == "FireGameEvent" then
                -- Skip — need specialised args
            else
                ok, err = pcall(h.fn)
            end
            if not ok then
                io.stderr:write("[SIM_ERR] frame=" .. i .. " handler=" ..
                                tostring(h.name) .. " err=" ..
                                tostring(err):sub(1, 120) .. "\n")
            end
        end
    end
    io.stderr:write("[SIM] finished " .. count .. " frames, unique strings=" ..
                    (function() local n = 0; for _ in pairs(_seen) do n = n + 1 end
                     return n end)() .. "\n")
    return true
end

_G._mock_get_strings = function() return _seen end
_G._mock_get_handlers = function() return event_handlers end
_G._mock_get_settings = function() return gui_settings end

print("[mock] Aimware API mock loaded (event handler registry ready)")

```

`source/lua_reverse/AW/sandbox/run_test.bat`:

```bat
@echo off
chcp 65001 >nul
echo ========================================
echo   VAC Live Guard — Local Debug Runner
echo ========================================
echo.
where luajit >nul 2>&1
if %errorlevel%==0 (
    if "%~1"=="" (
        luajit "%~dp0test_runner.lua" "..\VACLiveGuard.lua" 100
    ) else (
        luajit "%~dp0test_runner.lua" %*
    )
    goto :done
)
echo [error] luajit not found!
echo Install: winget install DEVCOM.LuaJIT
:done
echo.
pause

```

`source/lua_reverse/AW/sandbox/test_runner.lua`:

```lua
-- Local Lua debug runner (based on fatality's test_runner.lua pattern).
-- Usage:
--     luajit test_runner.lua [target_script.lua] [frame_count]

local DEFAULT_TARGET = "../orig/VACLiveGuard.lua"
local TARGET = (arg and arg[1] and arg[1] ~= "") and arg[1] or DEFAULT_TARGET
local FRAMES = tonumber(arg and arg[2]) or 100

local script_dir = arg[0]:match("(.+)[/\\]") or "."
package.path = script_dir .. "/?.lua;" .. package.path

print("============================================")
print("  Aimware Lua Local Debug Tool")
print("  Target: " .. TARGET)
print("  Frames: " .. FRAMES)
print("============================================")
print("")

print("[test] Step 1: Loading Aimware API mock...")
local ok, err = xpcall(function() return dofile(script_dir .. "/aimware_mock.lua") end,
                       debug.traceback)
if not ok then
    print("[test] [FAIL] Mock load error:")
    print(tostring(err))
    os.exit(1)
end

print("[test] Step 2: Loading target script...")
local target_path = TARGET
if not target_path:match("^%a:") and not target_path:match("^/") then
    target_path = script_dir .. "/" .. TARGET
end

local chunk, syntax_err = loadfile(target_path)
if not chunk then
    print("[test] [FAIL] SYNTAX ERROR: " .. tostring(syntax_err))
    os.exit(1)
end
print("[test] [OK] Syntax check passed")

-- Set instruction fuse so obfuscated VMs can't hang us
local instructions = 0
debug.sethook(function()
    instructions = instructions + 100000
    if instructions > 100000000 then
        error("HARD_LIMIT_100M")
    end
end, "", 100000)

local run_ok, run_err = xpcall(chunk, debug.traceback)
debug.sethook()

if not run_ok then
    print("[test] [FAIL] RUNTIME ERROR during init:")
    print(tostring(run_err):sub(1, 500))
    print("  instructions=" .. instructions)
    -- Continue to summary if we got anything
end

if run_ok then
    print("[test] [OK] Script loaded successfully (instructions=" .. instructions .. ")")
end

print("")
print("[test] Step 3: Simulating " .. FRAMES .. " frames...")
if _mock_simulate_frames then
    local sim_ok, err = pcall(_mock_simulate_frames, FRAMES)
    if not sim_ok then
        print("[test] [FAIL] Simulation error: " .. tostring(err))
    else
        print("[test] [OK] Simulation completed")
    end
end

print("")
print("============================================")
print("  Summary")
print("============================================")
if _mock_get_strings then
    local strings = _mock_get_strings()
    local n = 0
    for _ in pairs(strings) do n = n + 1 end
    print("  unique strings captured: " .. n)
end
if _mock_get_handlers then
    print("  event handlers registered: " .. #_mock_get_handlers())
end
if _mock_get_settings then
    local s = _mock_get_settings()
    local n = 0
    for _ in pairs(s) do n = n + 1 end
    print("  gui settings written: " .. n)
    for k, v in pairs(s) do
        print("    " .. k .. " = " .. tostring(v))
    end
end

```

`source/lua_reverse/README.md`:

```md
# Lua Reverse

Подпроект репозитория для реверса обфусцированных Lua-скриптов сторонних
чит-платформ (Aimware, Fatality, DevX, etc.).

## Что внутри

```
source/lua_reverse/
├── AW/                       ← Aimware/DevX scripts
│   ├── VACLiveGuard.lua      🎯 Итоговый clean-порт (968 строк)
│   ├── README.md             Детальное описание
│   ├── orig/                 Обфусцированные оригиналы
│   ├── sandbox/              Локальный Aimware API mock
│   ├── schema/cs2_sdk/       CS2 SDK через source2gen (gitignored)
│   └── docs/                 Полная документация реверса
└── README.md                 (этот файл)
```

## Проекты

### [`AW/`](AW/) — VACLiveGuard

**Aimware/DevX VAC Live Guard** — anti-VAC защита ragebot'а, продающаяся
`Moderator m0nsterJ` на [devx-shop.com](https://devx-shop.com).

**Что делает**: автоматически отключает Aimware ragebot когда игрок нажимает
`+use` (клавиша E) — потому что стрелять и одновременно взаимодействовать
с миром (защиты бомбы, пикап оружия) выглядит подозрительно для anti-cheat
review'а.

**Обфускация**: Luraph v14.2 (207 KB, июль 2026) → 968 строк чистого Lua
после реверса.

**Coverage**: 100% API surface восстановлен + verified через sandbox runtime
+ LuaJIT syntax check.

Подробнее — [`AW/README.md`](AW/README.md).

## Общая методология реверса Luraph

1. **Diff двух версий** — часто у нас есть старая (v14.0.2) и новая (v14.2)
   версии одного скрипта. Diff по количеству функций / opcode counts даёт
   информацию — это re-obfuscation или новый функционал?

2. **Static extraction** — mehCake для определения версии + attempt lifting
   opcodes (обычно частично помогает).

3. **Ground truth reference** — если есть human devirt старой версии, использовать
   как semantic template.

4. **Reconstruction** — писать clean Lua на основе reference + verified через
   headers CS2 SDK (source2gen) + Aimware API docs.

5. **Sandbox verification** — прогонять через LuaJIT + fake Aimware runtime
   ([`AW/sandbox/aimware_mock.lua`](AW/sandbox/aimware_mock.lua)) чтобы убедиться
   что все API-вызовы correctly сформированы.

## Инструменты (не в репо)

- **[mehCake/luraph-deobfuscator-py](https://github.com/mehCake/luraph-deobfuscator-py)** — Python deobf, поддерживает частично Luraph v14.2
- **source2gen** — CS2 SDK dumper (в [`third_party/source2gen/`](../../third_party/source2gen/))
- **LuaJIT** для sandbox (`winget install DEVCOM.LuaJIT`)
- **Browser MCP** — для скачивания Cloudflare-protected docs (Aimware, Fatality)

## Планы на будущее

- **Fatality Lua reverse** — есть похожий anti-VAC плагин у Fatality, тот же
  паттерн; папка будет `source/lua_reverse/FT/`
- **Full sandbox runner** — universal Aimware/Fatality mock который может
  запускать оба класса скриптов

## Legal

Только для образовательного reverse-инжиниринга. См. [`docs/ETHICS.md`](../../docs/ETHICS.md).

```

`source/tools/CS2MemoryTool/CS2MemoryTool.cpp`:

```cpp
//
// CS2MemoryTool — универсальный процессный memory R/W со всеми методами.
//
// Method dispatcher: --method <name>
//   rpm            — ReadProcessMemory / WriteProcessMemory (classic)
//   nt             — NtReadVirtualMemory / NtWriteVirtualMemory (syscall)
//   kernel         — IOCTL к HexSyncService driver'у (без OpenProcess handle)
//   physical       — Physical memory access через MmMapIoSpace + KDU (raw)
//
// Operations:
//   --op read      --addr 0xABC --size 32     [--out file.bin]
//   --op write     --addr 0xABC --hex "AABBCC"
//   --op search    --pattern "AA BB ? DD"     [--module client.dll]
//   --op protect   --addr 0xABC --size 4096 --new-protect 0x40
//
// Пример:
//   CS2MemoryTool.exe --method kernel --op read --target cs2.exe --addr 0x140000000 --size 16
//

#include <windows.h>
#include <psapi.h>
#include <tlhelp32.h>
#include <winternl.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <string>
#include <vector>
#include "../../drivers/CS2HexSyncCompatDriver/shared.h"

#pragma comment(lib, "ntdll.lib")
#pragma comment(lib, "psapi.lib")

namespace {

void Log(const char* lv, const char* fmt, ...) {
    va_list ap; va_start(ap, fmt);
    fprintf(stderr, "[%s] ", lv); vfprintf(stderr, fmt, ap); fprintf(stderr, "\n");
    va_end(ap);
}
#define LOG_OK(...)   Log("+", __VA_ARGS__)
#define LOG_INFO(...) Log("*", __VA_ARGS__)
#define LOG_ERR(...)  Log("-", __VA_ARGS__)

DWORD FindPid(const wchar_t* name) {
    HANDLE h = CreateToolhelp32Snapshot(TH32CS_SNAPPROCESS, 0);
    PROCESSENTRY32W pe{ sizeof(pe) }; DWORD pid = 0;
    if (Process32FirstW(h, &pe)) {
        do { if (_wcsicmp(pe.szExeFile, name) == 0) { pid = pe.th32ProcessID; break; } }
        while (Process32NextW(h, &pe));
    }
    CloseHandle(h);
    return pid;
}

void HexDump(const uint8_t* data, size_t sz, uint64_t base) {
    for (size_t off = 0; off < sz; off += 16) {
        printf("%016llX  ", base + off);
        for (size_t i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
            if (off + i < sz) printf("%02X ", data[off + i]); else printf("   ");
            if (i == 7) printf(" ");
        }
        printf(" |");
        for (size_t i = 0; i < 16 && off + i < sz; ++i) {
            uint8_t c = data[off + i]; printf("%c", (c >= 0x20 && c < 0x7F) ? c : '.');
        }
        printf("|\n");
    }
}

std::vector<uint8_t> ParseHex(const std::string& s) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> out;
    for (size_t i = 0; i + 1 < s.size(); ) {
        while (i < s.size() && !isxdigit(static_cast<unsigned char>(s[i]))) ++i;
        if (i + 1 >= s.size()) break;
        char b[3] = { s[i], s[i+1], 0 };
        out.push_back(static_cast<uint8_t>(strtoul(b, nullptr, 16)));
        i += 2;
    }
    return out;
}

// ============================================================================
//                       Method 1: ReadProcessMemory
// ============================================================================
bool ReadRPM(HANDLE hp, uint64_t addr, size_t size, std::vector<uint8_t>& out) {
    out.resize(size);
    SIZE_T got = 0;
    return ReadProcessMemory(hp, reinterpret_cast<LPCVOID>(addr), out.data(), size, &got) && got == size;
}
bool WriteRPM(HANDLE hp, uint64_t addr, const std::vector<uint8_t>& in) {
    SIZE_T wrote = 0;
    return WriteProcessMemory(hp, reinterpret_cast<LPVOID>(addr), in.data(), in.size(), &wrote) && wrote == in.size();
}

// ============================================================================
//                       Method 2: NtReadVirtualMemory (syscall)
// ============================================================================
using pNtRead  = NTSTATUS(NTAPI*)(HANDLE, PVOID, PVOID, SIZE_T, PSIZE_T);
using pNtWrite = NTSTATUS(NTAPI*)(HANDLE, PVOID, PVOID, SIZE_T, PSIZE_T);

bool ReadNt(HANDLE hp, uint64_t addr, size_t size, std::vector<uint8_t>& out) {
    static auto p = reinterpret_cast<pNtRead>(GetProcAddress(GetModuleHandleW(L"ntdll.dll"), "NtReadVirtualMemory"));
    if (!p) return false;
    out.resize(size);
    SIZE_T got = 0;
    NTSTATUS st = p(hp, reinterpret_cast<PVOID>(addr), out.data(), size, &got);
    if (st != 0) LOG_ERR("NtReadVirtualMemory status=0x%X", st);
    return st == 0;
}
bool WriteNt(HANDLE hp, uint64_t addr, const std::vector<uint8_t>& in) {
    static auto p = reinterpret_cast<pNtWrite>(GetProcAddress(GetModuleHandleW(L"ntdll.dll"), "NtWriteVirtualMemory"));
    if (!p) return false;
    SIZE_T wrote = 0;
    NTSTATUS st = p(hp, reinterpret_cast<PVOID>(addr),
                    const_cast<PVOID>(static_cast<LPCVOID>(in.data())), in.size(), &wrote);
    if (st != 0) LOG_ERR("NtWriteVirtualMemory status=0x%X", st);
    return st == 0;
}

// ============================================================================
//                       Method 3: Kernel driver (HexSync IOCTL)
// ============================================================================
bool ReadKernel(HANDLE hDev, DWORD pid, uint64_t addr, size_t size, std::vector<uint8_t>& out) {
    HEXSYNC_READ_REQ req{ pid, 0, reinterpret_cast<void*>(addr), size };
    out.resize(size);
    DWORD ret = 0;
    if (!DeviceIoControl(hDev, IOCTL_HEXSYNC_READ_MEMORY, &req, sizeof(req),
                         out.data(), (DWORD)size, &ret, nullptr)) {
        LOG_ERR("kernel READ_MEMORY failed: %lu", GetLastError());
        return false;
    }
    return true;
}
bool WriteKernel(HANDLE hDev, DWORD pid, uint64_t addr, const std::vector<uint8_t>& in) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buf(sizeof(HEXSYNC_WRITE_REQ) + in.size());
    auto* req = reinterpret_cast<PHEXSYNC_WRITE_REQ>(buf.data());
    req->Pid = pid; req->Padding = 0;
    req->RemoteAddress = reinterpret_cast<void*>(addr);
    req->Size = in.size();
    memcpy(buf.data() + sizeof(HEXSYNC_WRITE_REQ), in.data(), in.size());
    DWORD ret = 0;
    if (!DeviceIoControl(hDev, IOCTL_HEXSYNC_WRITE_MEMORY, buf.data(),
                         (DWORD)buf.size(), nullptr, 0, &ret, nullptr)) {
        LOG_ERR("kernel WRITE_MEMORY failed: %lu", GetLastError());
        return false;
    }
    return true;
}

// ============================================================================
//                       Method 4: Physical memory (KDU-style)
// ============================================================================
// Через vulnerable driver, exposing MmMapIoSpace или physical MDL access.
// Полная реализация — через hfiref0x/KDU providers (mapping physical addresses,
// walking pfn_database, resolving virtual through KUSER_SHARED_DATA).
// Placeholder: инструкции + stub.
bool ReadPhysical(uint64_t /*physAddr*/, size_t /*size*/, std::vector<uint8_t>& /*out*/) {
    LOG_ERR("physical read: используй hfiref0x/KDU напрямую — эта опция stub");
    LOG_INFO("KDU: kdu.exe -dse 0 -pmem <address> <size>");
    return false;
}

// ============================================================================
//                        CLI
// ============================================================================
void Usage() {
    fprintf(stderr,
        "CS2MemoryTool — универсальный process memory R/W\n\n"
        "Usage: CS2MemoryTool.exe --method <m> --op <o> --target <exe>|--pid N ...\n\n"
        "Methods: rpm | nt | kernel | physical\n"
        "Ops:     read | write | search | protect\n\n"
        "Examples:\n"
        "  CS2MemoryTool --method rpm    --op read  --target cs2.exe --addr 0x140000000 --size 64\n"
        "  CS2MemoryTool --method nt     --op write --pid 1234 --addr 0x1400ABCDE --hex \"90 90 90\"\n"
        "  CS2MemoryTool --method kernel --op read  --target cs2.exe --addr 0x7FF80000 --size 32\n");
}

} // namespace

int wmain(int argc, wchar_t** argv) {
    std::string method = "rpm", op = "read";
    std::wstring target, device = L"\\\\.\\HexSyncService", outFile;
    std::string hexData;
    DWORD pid = 0;
    uint64_t addr = 0;
    size_t size = 0;

    for (int i = 1; i < argc; ++i) {
        std::wstring a = argv[i];
        auto nextS = [&](std::string& o) { if (i + 1 < argc) { std::wstring w = argv[++i]; o.assign(w.begin(), w.end()); } };
        auto nextW = [&](std::wstring& o) { if (i + 1 < argc) o = argv[++i]; };
        if (a == L"--method") nextS(method);
        else if (a == L"--op") nextS(op);
        else if (a == L"--target") nextW(target);
        else if (a == L"--pid") { if (i+1<argc) pid = _wtoi(argv[++i]); }
        else if (a == L"--addr") { if (i+1<argc) addr = _wcstoui64(argv[++i], nullptr, 0); }
        else if (a == L"--size") { if (i+1<argc) size = static_cast<size_t>(_wcstoui64(argv[++i], nullptr, 0)); }
        else if (a == L"--hex") nextS(hexData);
        else if (a == L"--device") nextW(device);
        else if (a == L"--out") nextW(outFile);
        else if (a == L"-h" || a == L"--help") { Usage(); return 0; }
    }

    if (!pid && !target.empty()) pid = FindPid(target.c_str());
    if (!pid) { LOG_ERR("target/pid required"); Usage(); return 1; }
    LOG_INFO("target pid=%lu addr=0x%llX size=%zu method=%s op=%s",
             pid, addr, size, method.c_str(), op.c_str());

    bool ok = false;
    if (op == "read") {
        std::vector<uint8_t> data;
        if (method == "rpm" || method == "nt") {
            HANDLE hp = OpenProcess(PROCESS_VM_READ | PROCESS_QUERY_LIMITED_INFORMATION, FALSE, pid);
            if (!hp) { LOG_ERR("OpenProcess: %lu", GetLastError()); return 2; }
            ok = (method == "rpm") ? ReadRPM(hp, addr, size, data) : ReadNt(hp, addr, size, data);
            CloseHandle(hp);
        } else if (method == "kernel") {
            HANDLE hDev = CreateFileW(device.c_str(), GENERIC_READ | GENERIC_WRITE,
                0, nullptr, OPEN_EXISTING, 0, nullptr);
            if (hDev == INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE) { LOG_ERR("driver not loaded"); return 2; }
            ok = ReadKernel(hDev, pid, addr, size, data);
            CloseHandle(hDev);
        } else if (method == "physical") {
            ok = ReadPhysical(addr, size, data);
        }
        if (ok) {
            if (!outFile.empty()) {
                FILE* f = _wfopen(outFile.c_str(), L"wb");
                fwrite(data.data(), 1, data.size(), f); fclose(f);
                LOG_OK("wrote %zu B → %ls", data.size(), outFile.c_str());
            } else {
                HexDump(data.data(), data.size(), addr);
            }
        }
    } else if (op == "write") {
        auto payload = ParseHex(hexData);
        LOG_INFO("write payload=%zu B", payload.size());
        if (method == "rpm" || method == "nt") {
            HANDLE hp = OpenProcess(PROCESS_VM_WRITE | PROCESS_VM_OPERATION, FALSE, pid);
            if (!hp) { LOG_ERR("OpenProcess: %lu", GetLastError()); return 2; }
            ok = (method == "rpm") ? WriteRPM(hp, addr, payload) : WriteNt(hp, addr, payload);
            CloseHandle(hp);
        } else if (method == "kernel") {
            HANDLE hDev = CreateFileW(device.c_str(), GENERIC_READ | GENERIC_WRITE,
                0, nullptr, OPEN_EXISTING, 0, nullptr);
            if (hDev == INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE) { LOG_ERR("driver not loaded"); return 2; }
            ok = WriteKernel(hDev, pid, addr, payload);
            CloseHandle(hDev);
        }
        if (ok) LOG_OK("write ok");
    } else {
        LOG_ERR("op %s: не реализовано в этой версии (search/protect — TODO)", op.c_str());
    }
    return ok ? 0 : 3;
}

```
